With the help of you and this grassroots team, we made history last year – flipping the Virginia House, expanding our majorities, and securing victories in over 30 special elections. **But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high.**
State Democrats are facing _a slew_ special elections over the next two months – some of which are vital for Democratic control.
**Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. **

name: Biden-Harris 2024
subject: Biden vs. Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The list of differences goes on and on and on... | | |
---
Just think about the stakes in this election. Joe Biden is fighting to protect abortion access for all women. Donald Trump brags about having overturned _Roe v. Wade_. Joe Biden is trying to make it harder for criminals to buy guns. Donald Trump has the unwavering support of organizations like the NRA that want guns everywhere. Joe Biden is fighting to provide access to health care for all Americans. Donald Trump is promising to try and kill the Affordable Care Act -- again. The list goes on and on and on... And with all this at stake -- and more -- it's a wonder that a relatively small percentage of Americans volunteer or contribute to political campaigns. Because that support makes a HUGE difference. That's why President Biden needs you today, Peter. We know you know what's at stake in this election. But maybe you don't know that the majority of the donations we receive come in response to emails like this one. So we are asking, humbly: [Can you please use this link to contribute $25 or whatever you can afford today directly to Joe Biden's reelection campaign? clean_body: The list of differences goes on and on and on... | | | Just think about the stakes in this election. Joe Biden is fighting to protect abortion access for all women. Donald Trump brags about having overturned Roe v. Wade. Joe Biden is trying to make it harder for criminals to buy guns. Donald Trump has the unwavering support of organizations like the NRA that want guns everywhere. Joe Biden is fighting to provide access to health care for all Americans. Donald Trump is promising to try and kill the Affordable Care Act -- again. The list goes on and on and on... And with all this at stake -- and more -- it's a wonder that a relatively small percentage of Americans volunteer or contribute to political campaigns. Because that support makes a HUGE difference. That's why President Biden needs you today, Peter. We know you know what's at stake in this election. But maybe you don't know that the majority of the donations we receive come in response to emails like this one. So we are asking, humbly: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Some can do more, some can do less. But if you have the capacity to chip in today, it would mean a lot if you did. Thank you, Team Joe

body:
“Supporting Josh Hawley was... the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life”
#
**“Supporting Josh Hawley was... the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.”**
Peter — that’s a real quote from Josh Hawley’s former mentor, Missouri’s three-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth. **Here’s what happened:**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43296?refcode=em20240203-4740&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4740%2E614464%2Ew95HGj)**
**FIRST —** In 2018, former Missouri Senator Jack Danforth recruited Josh Hawley to run for U.S. Senate. Danforth even cleared the crowded field of Republican challengers in Hawley’s primary.
**THEN —** On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed the world that he’s a coward and a fraud by raising his fist then running for his life at the U.S. Capitol.
**NOW —** Danforth and a handful of Hawley’s other mentors + mega-donors are refusing to support his re-election campaign — and recent reports from _Morning Consult_ found Hawley’s approvals plummeting among Missouri voters.
**Republicans and Democrats across Missouri agree: We can’t afford another six years of Josh Hawley representing us in the U.S. Senate.**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43296?refcode=em20240203-4740&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4740%2E614464%2Ew95HGj)**
Now here’s why we need your help, Peter:
Every dollar we raise gives us an opportunity to keep exposing Hawley as a fraud and a coward — and allows us to reach voters with Lucas’ election-winning message every day between now and November 5.
That’s what it’ll take to win this race. **So now we’re asking you:**
**[Can you chip in $10 or just whatever you can today so we can get Lucas’ message in front of Missouri voters and continue to hold Josh Hawley accountable for embarrassing our state and betraying our country? Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so your support today really will make a big impact on our grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43296?refcode=em20240203-4740&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4740%2E614464%2Ew95HGj)**

subject: Exposing Garvey for who he is

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5342%2E5257348%2ExViqhN ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, we just
launched a new television ad comparing my vision for the future of
California with Steve Garvey’s.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3828?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240203_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=5342%2E5257348%2ExViqhN ]You can watch our ad here, and then I hope you will pitch in a few
dollars to help us keep it on the air.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3828?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240203_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=5342%2E5257348%2ExViqhN ]WATCH OUR AD HERE

Simply put, Steve Garvey is way too conservative for California.

He voted for Trump. Twice. And on the debate stage last month, it was
clear he may support him again. Even after he incited an insurrection.

He’s also supported far-right conservatives who are trying to take away
our rights and freedoms – including the right to an abortion.

He called me a liar in the debate and then again on Fox News because of my
work to hold Donald Trump accountable for his crimes.

Derek,
Steve Garvey doesn't share California values.

I’m running for Senate to secure more funding for affordable housing, to
fight for access to health care and lower prescription drug costs, and to
continue defending our democracy from those trying to dismantle our
institutions.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240203_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=5342%2E5257348%2ExViqhN ]If you believe in my vision for California, please chip in to my
campaign today. As Steve Garvey surges in the polls, we have to expose him
for who he is.

subject: IMPEACH over the border crisis!
body:
Can't be trusted. |
---
| | Peter, did you see the news this week?

Republicans just voted to send articles of impeachment against Biden's Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas to the floor of Congress.

**_This news came the same day that a group of illegal immigrants assaulted two New York police officers and were released without bail!_**

We have good, legitimate people patiently waiting in line to come into our country LEGALLY while Mayorkas, Biden and Democrats hand a free pass to these thugs??
---
|
---
| I called on Congress to impeach Mayorkas months ago and I want to be clear:****_**I would absolutely vote for these impeachment articles without hesitation.**_

Anyone who so flagrantly prioritizes the Far Left's Open Borders agenda over our country's security _**can't be allowed to stay in office.**_** **

We have to put America First.
---
| [ENDORSE MAX](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=7d0fc15299&e=86e91e802d "ENDORSE MAX")
---
| **Here's what scares me though: Washington Democrats - including our own radical liberal Congresswoman Katie Porter - will vote to protect Mayorkas!!**

They are content to sit around and do nothing while Joe Biden lets millions of illegal immigrants break our laws and enter our country!

It's truly twisted and sickening that our leaders would allow this to happen.

**That's why we absolutely have to win this Election.**

[**> >> If you're with me on this, please ADD YOUR NAME and endorse my campaign for Congress today. **](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=ad2e020099&e=86e91e802d)

Securing our border is my top priority. I even visited the border myself to learn how we can fix it. If we don't have a border, we don't have a country.

**I will be more than a Republican vote for border security in Congress. I will be a FIGHTER for it. **I will work with anyone in Washington who believes, like I do, that we have to secure our border by any means necessary.

We have to start putting America First. That requires bold leadership.

I hope I can earn your support and your vote,

\- Max Ukropina
---
| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=cc8fdbc027&e=86e91e802d)

name: Joe Biden
subject: South Carolina

body:
"It's the lucky person who gets up in the morning, puts both feet on the floor, knows what they are about to do, and thinks it still matters.” | | |
---

⛅️ To all of my supporters, please don't click away from this important message. ⛅️

Four years ago, we won the South Carolina Democratic Primary. A number of grassroots supporters donated to my campaign shortly after, and that support laid the foundation for our campaign’s eventual victory against Donald Trump.

Tonight, we won the South Carolina Democratic Primary once again. And if we want to win again this November, I am going to need your help _today_.

My dad used to have an expression -- "It's the lucky person who gets up in the morning, puts both feet on the floor, knows what they are about to do, and thinks it still matters.” _Your support matters._ _**Your donation matters.**_

Because I cannot win this race against Donald Trump alone, Peter. _I need you with me._ [**Can I count on you to make a $25 contribution to my reelection campaign? name: Pro Life Update
subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqmp9ekqejhcfrbsucv9nf63dc92j4n7mbidg7lo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm2ob2cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc2cpijmbm35km4lgtp1j6at3untvshrj3s73ar8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm2ob2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsmcbea75kcph6ok6fn2r67ps3ila6i9m34q8oq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm2ob2cth2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zibkf84v9u7eghv3lmdhe91lrf5k1msmjoj1tlmo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm2pb5chh2bs)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr7j4qtqucur997dltuq76rcllrjqt9hmc7d8ffo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm2pb5chh2bs)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkfntphqp4scot1t9o1tcb2thb6l6mfknnk5ed78_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm2pb5chh2bs)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5v04mu7c55de6l1bmptnebjl7rt6651frh1pif0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm2pb5chh2bs)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2msetmfr2csjcamcvd99f5uggfe94qo9nfih548_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm2pb5chh2bs)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6gsi9d5ros45teidtiphmuvheomucipn96gukf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm2pb5chh2bs)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7cv7pag2tub62qlo47q7jpbj7kdougipurlckf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm2pb5chh2bs)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgrutc5scj26r8sgkg2gtvjh40isgm425nv9ig10_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm2pb5chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zotchp4ck2dp8r60ncngu63m681vjqdfel3a2rg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm2pb5chh2bs)
---
| | **PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE**

9070 Irvine Center Drive, Suite 150Irvine, CA 92618

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'

| **Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zimvevrkn1u2805f6b6erbdjr364ua7nnttijndg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm1o36c5h2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We’ve recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange ‘reverse ATMs.’](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvrk1h5vejk3t4ibg92g1ier01u4ei4io9gu5s80_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm1o36c5h2bs)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. name: Karen Dabney
subject: Police are under attack in America
body:
I’ve never done something like this before.

Friend,

I've never done something like this before.

But right now my family is up against more than we can handle on our own. And there's nothing I won't do to protect my family - even ask a perfect stranger for help.

Next month, my beloved son - former Deputy James Johnson of the Williamson County, TX Sheriff's Department - will go on trial for manslaughter.

He faces decades in prison for doing his job by the book.

This is a photo of James with his son.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkd7nnc8ksj7ir0clbtt49p1eru30h2vsm227ltg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm1o36c5h2bs)
James dreamed of being a police officer ever since he took his first "ride-along" in a cop car at the age of 18.

How could we know back then that one day he would find himself the target of a nationwide political movement directed and financed by radical anti-cop billionaire George Soros?

**[If you're sick of our men and women in blue being targeted by anti-cop prosecutors, then I pray you'll find it in your heart to help my son today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc511htlhs8hhquqfstrfvud15bs3a9gc7khi9k0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm1o36c5h2bs)**

Please let me explain...

On the night of March 28, 2019, my son conducted a routine traffic stop.

But instead of pulling over, the driver - a convicted drug dealer named Javier Ambler - floored the gas and tried to flee.

The suspect's speed quickly exceeded 100 miles per hour. Along the way, he collided with signs, trees, fences, and other roadside objects.

The chase lasted for 22 minutes and spanned two counties. At any moment, another driver or a pedestrian could have been struck and killed by the drug dealer's reckless driving. It was a deadly serious situation.

Eventually, the chase ended when the suspect crashed head-first into a tree.

My son ordered him to get on the ground at gunpoint. He refused. James ordered again, and still the driver did not comply.

That's when another Deputy and an Austin Police Officer arrived on scene. Together, they tried to handcuff the giant man - but he kept resisting and fighting to get back on his feet.

Now, my son is strong. . . but this man was twice his size. . . **nearly 400 pounds.** And even together, the three officers could not subdue him.

So, to put a stop to his fighting and get him handcuffed, they deployed a taser again.

Still nothing - he kept resisting.

They tased him once more and they were finally able to get him into handcuffs.

That's when they noticed that the suspect had lost consciousness. Without missing a beat, they immediately began life-saving tactics and radioed for an ambulance to respond with high priority.

The suspect was rushed to the hospital - but despite the prompt medical attention, he was declared dead on arrival.

According to the medical examiner, Javier Ambler's "morbid obesity" had given him "congestive heart failure" and "hyper intensive cardiovascular disease," - which, in the heat of the struggle, caused his death.

Soon after, an internal affairs investigation by my son's department found that the deputies did nothing wrong. A second independent investigation by the Austin Police Department concluded my son and the other officers committed no such crimes and did not cause Ambler's death.

**But two years after being cleared, James was charged with manslaughter!**

So what changed?

Well, Travis County - where the suspect crashed and the chase concluded - elected a new District Attorney.

A George Soros-funded District Attorney . . . a Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren-endorsed District Attorney . . . a socialist District Attorney, who campaigned not on fighting crime - but on cracking down on police.

His name is Jose Garza, and in just over three years in office, he's charged dozens of cops with crimes while letting countless violent criminals go free!

Somehow, my son James got caught up in something much bigger than himself, and now he's lost his job and his life savings trying to defend his good name in court.

Worst of all, if convicted James's children will lose their dad to decades in prison.

**[Now I hope you can see why I'm swallowing my pride and asking you to help me fight for my son - and my grandchildren - by supporting James' legal defense.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z680bamtpk5bnie7tl622hmek6jkniffcn25a3lg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm1o36c5h2bs)**

You see, right when we thought all hope was lost - we got a call from Jason Johnson at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).

This incredible organization helps innocent cops who are unfairly prosecuted for split-second, life-or-death decisions they make in the line of duty.

They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses. . . whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court.

And they do it all free of charge!

They're funded entirely by the generous support of big-hearted donors like you, who can recognize a miscarriage of justice. . . and want to help fix it.

My son has told me he feels abandoned by the people he dedicated his life to helping. I told him there are people out there who still support the police...

...and I pray you are one of these people and that you will step up and help to fund the $150,000+ in legal fees he's facing.

**[Will you please help my son clear his name by making a generous tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhiho1cni8e9nvi1i9q8ts31ca65m7p3jl0nk23o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm1o36c5h2bs)**

No matter how much you can give to help LELDF fund James' defense, I hope you'll know how grateful I - and my entire family - will be for your help.

With deep appreciation,

**Karen Dabney**

P.S. My son has four children of his own. If James is convicted and receives the maximum sentence of 20 years, they'll be grown adults by the time he's finally set free. He will miss out on everything. And his children will grow up without a dad.

**[So, please- PLEASE - won't you send the best donation you can today to help keep my brave son out of prison and with his children, where he belongs?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zal4i4g79fv4spj4m6e15mb2l5j00edijb1tqvkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm1o36c5h2bs)** Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU!
\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcf17lu699ato2qku73sdt73ts2v9efhl537o4bg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm1o36c5h2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

clean_body: I’ve never done something like this before. Friend, I've never done something like this before. But right now my family is up against more than we can handle on our own. And there's nothing I won't do to protect my family - even ask a perfect stranger for help. Next month, my beloved son - former Deputy James Johnson of the Williamson County, TX Sheriff's Department - will go on trial for manslaughter. He faces decades in prison for doing his job by the book. This is a photo of James with his son. James dreamed of being a police officer ever since he took his first "ride-along" in a cop car at the age of 18. How could we know back then that one day he would find himself the target of a nationwide political movement directed and financed by radical anti-cop billionaire George Soros? Please let me explain... On the night of March 28, 2019, my son conducted a routine traffic stop. But instead of pulling over, the driver - a convicted drug dealer named Javier Ambler - floored the gas and tried to flee. The suspect's speed quickly exceeded 100 miles per hour. Along the way, he collided with signs, trees, fences, and other roadside objects. The chase lasted for 22 minutes and spanned two counties. At any moment, another driver or a pedestrian could have been struck and killed by the drug dealer's reckless driving. It was a deadly serious situation. Eventually, the chase ended when the suspect crashed head-first into a tree. My son ordered him to get on the ground at gunpoint. He refused. James ordered again, and still the driver did not comply. That's when another Deputy and an Austin Police Officer arrived on scene. Together, they tried to handcuff the giant man - but he kept resisting and fighting to get back on his feet. Now, my son is strong. . . but this man was twice his size. . . nearly 400 pounds. And even together, the three officers could not subdue him. So, to put a stop to his fighting and get him handcuffed, they deployed a taser again. Still nothing - he kept resisting. They tased him once more and they were finally able to get him into handcuffs. That's when they noticed that the suspect had lost consciousness. Without missing a beat, they immediately began life-saving tactics and radioed for an ambulance to respond with high priority. The suspect was rushed to the hospital - but despite the prompt medical attention, he was declared dead on arrival. According to the medical examiner, Javier Ambler's "morbid obesity" had given him "congestive heart failure" and "hyper intensive cardiovascular disease," - which, in the heat of the struggle, caused his death. Soon after, an internal affairs investigation by my son's department found that the deputies did nothing wrong. A second independent investigation by the Austin Police Department concluded my son and the other officers committed no such crimes and did not cause Ambler's death. But two years after being cleared, James was charged with manslaughter! So what changed? Well, Travis County - where the suspect crashed and the chase concluded - elected a new District Attorney. A George Soros-funded District Attorney . . . a Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren-endorsed District Attorney . . . a socialist District Attorney, who campaigned not on fighting crime - but on cracking down on police. His name is Jose Garza, and in just over three years in office, he's charged dozens of cops with crimes while letting countless violent criminals go free! Somehow, my son James got caught up in something much bigger than himself, and now he's lost his job and his life savings trying to defend his good name in court. Worst of all, if convicted James's children will lose their dad to decades in prison. You see, right when we thought all hope was lost - we got a call from Jason Johnson at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). This incredible organization helps innocent cops who are unfairly prosecuted for split-second, life-or-death decisions they make in the line of duty. They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses. . . whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge! They're funded entirely by the generous support of big-hearted donors like you, who can recognize a miscarriage of justice. . . and want to help fix it. My son has told me he feels abandoned by the people he dedicated his life to helping. I told him there are people out there who still support the police... ...and I pray you are one of these people and that you will step up and help to fund the $150,000+ in legal fees he's facing. No matter how much you can give to help LELDF fund James' defense, I hope you'll know how grateful I - and my entire family - will be for your help. With deep appreciation, Karen Dabney P.S. My son has four children of his own. If James is convicted and receives the maximum sentence of 20 years, they'll be grown adults by the time he's finally set free. He will miss out on everything. And his children will grow up without a dad. Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU! \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.PoliceDefense.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: American Action News
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'

| **Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zas99l4tbrhiu8ppui1lbuliiadf155afma4fah8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm1p33c1h2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We’ve recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange ‘reverse ATMs.’](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb9r45lravietkfkd7lqteen4kig2nvpr68cu830_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm1p33c1h2bs)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead.To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and **how much time you have to prepare.** **[Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh8mlcmgje6u958spirkat4bif5co2vgon4c32g8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1gm1p33c1h2bs)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Not about politics
body:
About results

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi4pakk1sjp0mjjmtig8nfgde0e1ajib9fpfp710_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or6c5h2bs)
---

Friend,

Since day one, I've been underestimated in this race.

But, that didn't stop me. Instead I said, _**" Underestimate me... that'll be fun."**_

Then, after only two states voted, the political class said this race was over.

But, that didn't stop me. Instead I told them I wasn't going _**ANYWHERE.**_

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za078rf9t1mhii9einckv6a16tc5rmcplp816i5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or6c5h2bs)
---

I know it's the people who decide this race.

It's why I have been pounding the pavement for almost a year, not just in one state, but across the country.

It's why I've hosted hundreds of packed town halls and rallies, and at every one of them, I talk to every person and shake every hand.

I listen to voters, offer real solutions, and **NEVER** waver in my fight for America's future.

We outwork everyone around us. We focus on building relationships with people on the ground and gaining their trust.

_And it 's paying off._ **And it 's going to continue to pay off!**

Voters across America are resonating with my message and my vision for our future.

And they're resonating with the fact that we have to move on from the chaos, the drama, and candidates of the past.

We've got to stop the reckless spending.

We've got to strengthen our economy and bring down inflation.

We've got to secure our border once and for all.

We've got to make our country strong and proud again!

_This is not about politics or what the political elites want.**It's about policy and RESULTS! **_

**[Will you join me in the fight for our future RIGHT NOW?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5en2gn7qhub47gq0ae689rm510fmqfgadsq67eo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or6c5h2bs "Will you join me in the fight for our future RIGHT NOW?")**

---

---

Our movement is getting stronger by the day, but it's going to take all hands on deck to crush both of these upcoming milestones and **WIN** the fight to save our future.

**YOU** can help fuel my campaign.

**YOU** can help amplify my message.

**YOU** can help fund our get out the vote efforts.

**YOU** can help us **WIN.**

**[Even $5 or more makes a difference. Will you chip in today?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zahn243kd2435n40ufc8hgkk7s5v7uf3e3bm8ol8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or6c5h2bs "Even $5 or more makes a difference. Will you chip in today?") **

We can't waste a single moment. Not when the future of our country is on the line.

---

| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu9puprdgh25a5mpiuojj71uu201hdc9h0n57030_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or6c5h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4b9b4h59e2h8f35vlncb48clpaggb50csv7oskg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or6c5h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztgiquh7v9sr3v3a6da0iatv7aaoh5aoso9r9ebo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or6c5h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Not about politics
body:
About results

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z704br2i6o5evod8eigbrk0broa8dmvuf0bkpm9o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or4cdh2bs)
---

Friend,

Since day one, I've been underestimated in this race.

But, that didn't stop me. Instead I said, _**" Underestimate me... that'll be fun."**_

Then, after only two states voted, the political class said this race was over.

But, that didn't stop me. Instead I told them I wasn't going _**ANYWHERE.**_

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl6ca2e243efg2mebn4k2vqgs7hsso64k8lbinog_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or4cdh2bs)
---

I know it's the people who decide this race.

It's why I have been pounding the pavement for almost a year, not just in one state, but across the country.

It's why I've hosted hundreds of packed town halls and rallies, and at every one of them, I talk to every person and shake every hand.

I listen to voters, offer real solutions, and **NEVER** waver in my fight for America's future.

We outwork everyone around us. We focus on building relationships with people on the ground and gaining their trust.

_And it 's paying off._ **And it 's going to continue to pay off!**

Voters across America are resonating with my message and my vision for our future.

And they're resonating with the fact that we have to move on from the chaos, the drama, and candidates of the past.

We've got to stop the reckless spending.

We've got to strengthen our economy and bring down inflation.

We've got to secure our border once and for all.

We've got to make our country strong and proud again!

_This is not about politics or what the political elites want.**It's about policy and RESULTS! **_

**[Will you join me in the fight for our future RIGHT NOW?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh76jhp6bl824pesic65nl0nggtf281j3fv6e0bg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or4cdh2bs "Will you join me in the fight for our future RIGHT NOW?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgc49eja9kqelarm97h7b8tm21g2qgcthadjehv8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or4cdh2bs)
---

Our movement is getting stronger by the day, but it's going to take all hands on deck to crush both of these upcoming milestones and **WIN** the fight to save our future.

**YOU** can help fuel my campaign.

**YOU** can help amplify my message.

**YOU** can help fund our get out the vote efforts.

**YOU** can help us **WIN.**

**[Even $5 or more makes a difference. Will you chip in today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp727d878irmd0jl99e2k593kdr15h7r6em79ql0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or4cdh2bs "Even $5 or more makes a difference. Will you chip in today?") **

We can't waste a single moment. Not when the future of our country is on the line.

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za9itrdosjlp86em21j90tivrttho0rq2qhf65d0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or4cdh2bs)
---

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc03qo4resmsrdo13pn0cdruclektat074majmeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or4cdh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9o290v2oqvv7dspb2dne6jg9fj9tkin0frvuipg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or4cdh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf4llv0thv5tofv8j1h903qt9hoded6bjbdkvh3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or4cdh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjvvsfg5i17rhbqeeaoq0is2mj8pgq82ba9b3nf8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or4cdh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7lqnnk843qmnt3p5p1iumovec5jk75tdbasbnd8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c1im8or4cdh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Keep Congress Republican
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'

| **Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkDFr6zAUhX-NvNlcX8mSPHh4vEeW4DeEQkehXF87IpJtJIfSf18SaOeu5zscPs776EYfYliX_z7xcKfscnE5uchLnbaVP-vk6RZWdgioasAalGuraZh60l5XPLQGDMi-M1jdBmk1dyCRlAGcepzZkpHGsp31fG2hCsNzBxAUWNUpbLRW0xWl72EC0NYKBT5yPpo7807bumQuJfP-uMZAfm1oS1UcbsexFyH_CDwJPBWmR-Ymb8uDmbZ1S4HKs_nE8kRhEvLfeH4zEm2LAjX_JD10vRKo_Tw7ioHu7oUuY33-e6m_Xas8TPtHiDEUbYSCJfkQXyrHrz_7CgAA___ryW-0) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We’ve recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange ‘reverse ATMs.’](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkDFr6zAUhX-NvNlcX8mSPHh4vEeW4DeEQkehXF87IpJtJIfSf18SaOeu5zscPs776EYfYliX_z7xcKfscnE5uchLnbaVP-vk6RZWdgioasAalGuraZh60l5XPLQGDMi-M1jdBmk1dyCRlAGcepzZkpHGsp31fG2hCsNzBxAUWNUpbLRW0xWl72EC0NYKBT5yPpo7807bumQuJfP-uMZAfm1oS1UcbsexFyH_CDwJPBWmR-Ymb8uDmbZ1S4HKs_nE8kRhEvLfeH4zEm2LAjX_JD10vRKo_Tw7ioHu7oUuY33-e6m_Xas8TPtHiDEUbYSCJfkQXyrHrz_7CgAA___ryW-0)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead.To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and **how much time you have to prepare.** **[Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkDFr6zAUhX-NvNlcX8mSPHh4vEeW4DeEQkehXF87IpJtJIfSf18SaOeu5zscPs776EYfYliX_z7xcKfscnE5uchLnbaVP-vk6RZWdgioasAalGuraZh60l5XPLQGDMi-M1jdBmk1dyCRlAGcepzZkpHGsp31fG2hCsNzBxAUWNUpbLRW0xWl72EC0NYKBT5yPpo7807bumQuJfP-uMZAfm1oS1UcbsexFyH_CDwJPBWmR-Ymb8uDmbZ1S4HKs_nE8kRhEvLfeH4zEm2LAjX_JD10vRKo_Tw7ioHu7oUuY33-e6m_Xas8TPtHiDEUbYSCJfkQXyrHrz_7CgAA___ryW-0)**
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Not about politics.
body:
About results

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683660%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IiMu17nw8QOYEzwwn3CCDQ&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

Since day one, I’ve been underestimated in this race.

But, that didn’t stop me. Instead I said, _**“Underestimate me ... that’ll be fun.”**_

Then, after only two states voted, the political class said this race was over.

But, that didn’t stop me. Instead I told them I wasn’t going _**ANYWHERE.**_

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683660%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IiMu17nw8QOYEzwwn3CCDQ&sysid=1)
---

I know it’s the people who decide this race.

It’s why I have been pounding the pavement for almost a year, not just in one state, but across the country.

It’s why I’ve hosted hundreds of packed town halls and rallies, and at every one of them, I talk to every person and shake every hand.

I listen to voters, offer real solutions, and **NEVER** waver in my fight for America’s future.

We outwork everyone around us. We focus on building relationships with people on the ground and gaining their trust.

_And it’s paying off._ **And it’s going to continue to pay off!**

Voters across America are resonating with my message and my vision for our future.

And they’re resonating with the fact that we have to move on from the chaos, the drama, and candidates of the past.

We've got to stop the reckless spending.

We've got to strengthen our economy and bring down inflation.

We’ve got to secure our border once and for all.

We've got to make our country strong and proud again!

_This is not about politics or what the political elites want.**It's about policy and RESULTS! **_

**[Will you join me in the fight for our future RIGHT NOW?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683661%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fit9TsA9SUBxycZ%2b7NNnsA&sysid=1 "Will you join me in the
fight for our future RIGHT NOW?")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683662%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oWNqun3%2f0UwfMgeCRiXjmg&sysid=1)
---

Our movement is getting stronger by the day, but it’s going to take all hands on deck to crush both of these upcoming milestones and **WIN** the fight to save our future.

**YOU** can help fuel my campaign.

**YOU** can help amplify my message.

**YOU** can help fund our get out the vote efforts.

**YOU** can help us **WIN.**

**[Even $5 or more makes a difference. Will you chip in today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683663%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uNQghOWKBf64HC3OqFThxQ&sysid=1 "Even $5 or more makes a
difference. Will you chip in today?") **

We can’t waste a single moment. Not when the future of our country is on the line.

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683662%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oWNqun3%2f0UwfMgeCRiXjmg&sysid=1)
---

My very best,
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683660%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IiMu17nw8QOYEzwwn3CCDQ&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| | | | |
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683664%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3OC2m7I6F3s%2figX3hW9N6g&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683675%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lphrhR20FTu%2fmJLKQsdn9A&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683676%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4VxB7YaYryEKhYeXAZFrCA&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683677%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bP8YFVAKp9JZ4DiLU1hofA&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683678%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NXo7mX9IOVS8lO24pPX7iw&sysid=1 "DONATE")
---

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683679%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C7ODkTWhjSLaNbuMZaaDSA&sysid=1)
---

name: The Republican Team
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'

| **Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkDFrwzAQhX-NvNmc7xS5GjQUSpbiDiHQUSjS2RaV7CAr9O8XB9q56_sej4_3OdrRxRTX-cNlNrVUW3Zbsk08t9n5Ja5sEVC2gC1I2zfByAEDqYZNP8AAknpJzWI8BAAHOiCxBu_UdANQoVc0kQd5a6I5dgBBgpYnog61CpJRAziHWpOQ4BKXund14cL3xy1F79bKLnd-y00yS633XdCrwLPA887-Ubgr2_xg9tu65ej3o3lgOvsYBL2N79eB8KVHgYr_Eg0nLQUqN03Wp-i_7BNdxvZ6uba_nk0x4f4dU4q7GoSEObuYnir1H0_9BAAA__8ssGmg) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We’ve recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange ‘reverse ATMs.’](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkDFrwzAQhX-NvNmc7xS5GjQUSpbiDiHQUSjS2RaV7CAr9O8XB9q56_sej4_3OdrRxRTX-cNlNrVUW3Zbsk08t9n5Ja5sEVC2gC1I2zfByAEDqYZNP8AAknpJzWI8BAAHOiCxBu_UdANQoVc0kQd5a6I5dgBBgpYnog61CpJRAziHWpOQ4BKXund14cL3xy1F79bKLnd-y00yS633XdCrwLPA887-Ubgr2_xg9tu65ej3o3lgOvsYBL2N79eB8KVHgYr_Eg0nLQUqN03Wp-i_7BNdxvZ6uba_nk0x4f4dU4q7GoSEObuYnir1H0_9BAAA__8ssGmg)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead.To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and **how much time you have to prepare.** **[Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkDFrwzAQhX-NvNmc7xS5GjQUSpbiDiHQUSjS2RaV7CAr9O8XB9q56_sej4_3OdrRxRTX-cNlNrVUW3Zbsk08t9n5Ja5sEVC2gC1I2zfByAEDqYZNP8AAknpJzWI8BAAHOiCxBu_UdANQoVc0kQd5a6I5dgBBgpYnog61CpJRAziHWpOQ4BKXund14cL3xy1F79bKLnd-y00yS633XdCrwLPA887-Ubgr2_xg9tu65ej3o3lgOvsYBL2N79eB8KVHgYr_Eg0nLQUqN03Wp-i_7BNdxvZ6uba_nk0x4f4dU4q7GoSEObuYnir1H0_9BAAA__8ssGmg)**

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Friend,

Since day one, I've been underestimated in this race.

But, that didn't stop me. Instead I said, _**" Underestimate me... that'll be fun."**_

Then, after only two states voted, the political class said this race was over.

But, that didn't stop me. Instead I told them I wasn't going _**ANYWHERE.**_

---

I know it's the people who decide this race.

It's why I have been pounding the pavement for almost a year, not just in one state, but across the country.

It's why I've hosted hundreds of packed town halls and rallies, and at every one of them, I talk to every person and shake every hand.

I listen to voters, offer real solutions, and **NEVER** waver in my fight for America's future.

We outwork everyone around us. We focus on building relationships with people on the ground and gaining their trust.

_And it 's paying off._ **And it 's going to continue to pay off!**

Voters across America are resonating with my message and my vision for our future.

And they're resonating with the fact that we have to move on from the chaos, the drama, and candidates of the past.

We've got to stop the reckless spending.

We've got to strengthen our economy and bring down inflation.

We've got to secure our border once and for all.

We've got to make our country strong and proud again!

_This is not about politics or what the political elites want.**It's about policy and RESULTS! **_

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77476826c8584222b48088e995b2303f&_e=iAT00uWcssWoqiakSs67KhwTR2vcIe_kU9RcXgDxqbz-a9lJdSqsn5iRAa6ZXw4BRoCoj0HsBxqDdRXQT3Usyb75SZiKepDk24uaP9_RNXG2s_A3fsPydFRvUzPfAGMT5scdiZ25XenPxW4o1aFQMbvFTMYa--OXiOUcDqOtcfElwn4uDXhq4qOsNi8yU-8p2gfP-LUyoKNe8Ss0aYVtG5GXMlLkHPHotShNQCidMtiNxg4CPXxu7CHWPsmiKxUb5KWgU-f_Re-ybxE2_pJlWlXUwRANzjG4hztxyxyIPCkhVE_BDZ43BoJTrzR7LYJaOKudIfKkJNTelb8mttlUt7Bwate_LE7Kb61xUmQkrV_EwKzDKwRUvqJYRe0x4Akh06fNrrdb6jKQfyNUE5ngOjWq7kbAX9Q4I3vfILgo0tNOv6Q9_wu3UdSA8fSGiI6obtOshpOgjvJTXdWrnsVj3oWw-dDDdBNDVcBTVhejRT8_Ll7wej7ldPhH-O7JzUwGBfjMLSqWxPTnYWihkVbHGvBCqzzieI2xFwfDxBkhsGajxdlRUqVVFibU4s2302_67SLsa-TcFOcxglQnaOsqXTi4_ffMt5soJNaYYT09slrWZGHu_zMozKdBjklCjc4D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: About results | | | | | | Friend, Since day one, I've been underestimated in this race. But, that didn't stop me. Instead I said, " Underestimate me... that'll be fun." Then, after only two states voted, the political class said this race was over. But, that didn't stop me. Instead I told them I wasn't going ANYWHERE. | I know it's the people who decide this race. It's why I have been pounding the pavement for almost a year, not just in one state, but across the country. It's why I've hosted hundreds of packed town halls and rallies, and at every one of them, I talk to every person and shake every hand. I listen to voters, offer real solutions, and NEVER waver in my fight for America's future. We outwork everyone around us. We focus on building relationships with people on the ground and gaining their trust. And it 's paying off. And it 's going to continue to pay off! Voters across America are resonating with my message and my vision for our future. And they're resonating with the fact that we have to move on from the chaos, the drama, and candidates of the past. We've got to stop the reckless spending. We've got to strengthen our economy and bring down inflation. We've got to secure our border once and for all. We've got to make our country strong and proud again! This is not about politics or what the political elites want.It's about policy and RESULTS! "Will you join me in the fight for our future RIGHT NOW?" | | Our movement is getting stronger by the day, but it's going to take all hands on deck to crush both of these upcoming milestones and WIN the fight to save our future. YOU can help fuel my campaign. YOU can help amplify my message. YOU can help fund our get out the vote efforts. YOU can help us WIN. "Even $5 or more makes a difference. Will you chip in today?" We can't waste a single moment. Not when the future of our country is on the line. | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I’m the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUUT2vnDAQ_DWmM7LXxkBBcdIT3UVRFCml5YOF28Q2yJj7yK-POCV5RZq8djQzOzvz7WzPjjzF-ZML2KVg02bzza7kaeUR788l_bAgQHMBXGgri7EzLdSNLLCTtaiFripdF9dO1mqcGtO2qmk16KYaGwMIOJmpNU4MBXWHjwChpdCVhnKs3HRR2NaDuaihNUyLhOt-8TS4GNz3JVF-lhFz4btrzuvG1IlBz6DfcNgTlneKCcdyWAKDPrifxKcl8WGJc8Jt4xehBEhjGPRX9Ct_Me4UmerxQZlixpiZestpRwYmHaaJ4vwOubDsL4oSDMyegx1cWB3Nkam3399I-_nEv5y_nk-llBoaabPUGowRXAlz6PBhM40fUYQl4tOuHscZ39O87i9_U994CvxPpQzMY4-3f_AideN6J-9pMzXTYg6O_NFYkf9n7V8BAAD__2OxptU)

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUUT2vnDAQ_DWmM7LXxkBBcdIT3UVRFCml5YOF28Q2yJj7yK-POCV5RZq8djQzOzvz7WzPjjzF-ZML2KVg02bzza7kaeUR788l_bAgQHMBXGgri7EzLdSNLLCTtaiFripdF9dO1mqcGtO2qmk16KYaGwMIOJmpNU4MBXWHjwChpdCVhnKs3HRR2NaDuaihNUyLhOt-8TS4GNz3JVF-lhFz4btrzuvG1IlBz6DfcNgTlneKCcdyWAKDPrifxKcl8WGJc8Jt4xehBEhjGPRX9Ct_Me4UmerxQZlixpiZestpRwYmHaaJ4vwOubDsL4oSDMyegx1cWB3Nkam3399I-_nEv5y_nk-llBoaabPUGowRXAlz6PBhM40fUYQl4tOuHscZ39O87i9_U994CvxPpQzMY4-3f_AideN6J-9pMzXTYg6O_NFYkf9n7V8BAAD__2OxptU)

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUUT2vnDAQ_DWmM7LXxkBBcdIT3UVRFCml5YOF28Q2yJj7yK-POCV5RZq8djQzOzvz7WzPjjzF-ZML2KVg02bzza7kaeUR788l_bAgQHMBXGgri7EzLdSNLLCTtaiFripdF9dO1mqcGtO2qmk16KYaGwMIOJmpNU4MBXWHjwChpdCVhnKs3HRR2NaDuaihNUyLhOt-8TS4GNz3JVF-lhFz4btrzuvG1IlBz6DfcNgTlneKCcdyWAKDPrifxKcl8WGJc8Jt4xehBEhjGPRX9Ct_Me4UmerxQZlixpiZestpRwYmHaaJ4vwOubDsL4oSDMyegx1cWB3Nkam3399I-_nEv5y_nk-llBoaabPUGowRXAlz6PBhM40fUYQl4tOuHscZ39O87i9_U994CvxPpQzMY4-3f_AideN6J-9pMzXTYg6O_NFYkf9n7V8BAAD__2OxptU)
---

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUUT2vnDAQ_DWmM7LXxkBBcdIT3UVRFCml5YOF28Q2yJj7yK-POCV5RZq8djQzOzvz7WzPjjzF-ZML2KVg02bzza7kaeUR788l_bAgQHMBXGgri7EzLdSNLLCTtaiFripdF9dO1mqcGtO2qmk16KYaGwMIOJmpNU4MBXWHjwChpdCVhnKs3HRR2NaDuaihNUyLhOt-8TS4GNz3JVF-lhFz4btrzuvG1IlBz6DfcNgTlneKCcdyWAKDPrifxKcl8WGJc8Jt4xehBEhjGPRX9Ct_Me4UmerxQZlixpiZestpRwYmHaaJ4vwOubDsL4oSDMyegx1cWB3Nkam3399I-_nEv5y_nk-llBoaabPUGowRXAlz6PBhM40fUYQl4tOuHscZ39O87i9_U994CvxPpQzMY4-3f_AideN6J-9pMzXTYg6O_NFYkf9n7V8BAAD__2OxptU)

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eEVXJpa9NOlHQ5bxZGMttA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eEVXJpa9NOlHQ5bxZGMttA~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eEVXJpa9NOlHQ5bxZGMttA~~/AARclAA~~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b2614b62774469da78cf0abffd4d4dd&_e=XQUQ-HlOHzxYAdyMoLtbVDxR72jG-qk_ygFjz5o0HeLVXF0AhakAudA4JIbaNcgqXDsvkld3asbePJdm4P5TMVce7AJnDsiuFcA8AtDxw2ChGAt9oLZWj6Po94GWR8e9F7T0QX_BCetiMM-2gNy8Vu1myAIcadgrUcm1e8sbqYD2EiUB7H4aFmYPpwL-7n4DQ_VdRM1-CabkeSbgpZH5ailydzA5XYEdzyESX8krNSVKvKtmUcY2_1dFwLXv2YeqwRGT_h-f_QFjTigtb1tO_LovxNR3OaHm3w-nfti9_KoNRpdqLtyTvdb9u7ckin6c1GWQbiLbqZn8_aLzOnA2tU2_kSWoax27S2iuW83MFPcZYlllO1YdM7pZ5mrx-qD7pwHTEbsUg99b42o3pP7t6A%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b2614b62774469da78cf0abffd4d4dd&_e=XQUQ-HlOHzxYAdyMoLtbVDxR72jG-qk_ygFjz5o0HeLVXF0AhakAudA4JIbaNcgqXDsvkld3asbePJdm4P5TMVce7AJnDsiuFcA8AtDxw2ChGAt9oLZWj6Po94GWR8e9F7T0QX_BCetiMM-2gNy8Vu1myAIcadgrUcm1e8sbqYD2EiUB7H4aFmYPpwL-7n4DQ_VdRM1-CabkeSbgpZH5ailydzA5XYEdzyESX8krNSVKvKtmUcY2_1dFwLXv2Yeq72b_AgFtPYDlbmZK7Ju6QAMhTZsX4y8XZBOo30dekP5iZWUWV_F19iUl90rHqVG9lY7OboeV7owecGE1H1LjLCXAgIRmUUu7cvh5CKB-tjiBIc9g9N5fLkElGorjWU_pxFILaTljDRKpbJb_ldXY9Q%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b2614b62774469da78cf0abffd4d4dd&_e=XQUQ-HlOHzxYAdyMoLtbVDxR72jG-qk_ygFjz5o0HeLVXF0AhakAudA4JIbaNcgqXDsvkld3asbePJdm4P5TMVce7AJnDsiuFcA8AtDxw2ChGAt9oLZWj6Po94GWR8e9F7T0QX_BCetiMM-2gNy8Vu1myAIcadgrUcm1e8sbqYD2EiUB7H4aFmYPpwL-7n4DQ_VdRM1-CabkeSbgpZH5ailydzA5XYEdzyESX8krNSVKvKtmUcY2_1dFwLXv2YeqzxpXUGnkRgzT7-1u7CdgNub8yVC6mnbZ1CAjygh80r3DZdWRlRBGE3H44GX4a8RT-1zHbmcuZ_JQB2Fz5tswYVjaik50yzKI5m-DpfDSNFad09KHYtO1JaH181j9U-NV4zkjicniwebuATqDQV1AjA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
