name: Karen Dabney
subject: He's a victim of a George Soros prosecutor
body:
I’ve never done something like this before.

Friend,

I've never done something like this before.

But right now my family is up against more than we can handle on our own. And there's nothing I won't do to protect my family - even ask a perfect stranger for help.

Next month, my beloved son - former Deputy James Johnson of the Williamson County, TX Sheriff's Department - will go on trial for manslaughter.

He faces decades in prison for doing his job by the book.

This is a photo of James with his son.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a170dbcb106743dc8d2257b18811cb1b&_e=uy7eu5Kxa4TvIcg-AaD3U3yRZJLhn5R5Lb-y1e0hBFygmOf2Iw6SzAEDRb4seCT3Nu3ULQHfmlBtwsJq8la3n-ec4K7dNqj1cjA7CgiH1QgeB681pkgar88KyaB3yZ0y5WVlINd7-b7hxhORBVcNowQ6rYZi-8qPu_use8GtRz3WAlHN6_WB2-UBLqXCHv_aEv_Q3jOcRHWT2dXxhu3DfHwz0AN4_W4l9EOJMcVSBgod6R23C4tBWJxnpX7ipyxPRqyZhGoGmJ2cyAtrGiiJt_IJzSfOy0dKWZHsAWubyiqzGhssrg8ADwHIu0i4WLDdFEDHunLdIIYabkl_bXTy_O3fSg5B7no3UBGga2d4PSn5-dMGBZydVcgigdP9YMJW)
James dreamed of being a police officer ever since he took his first "ride-along" in a cop car at the age of 18.

How could we know back then that one day he would find himself the target of a nationwide political movement directed and financed by radical anti-cop billionaire George Soros?

**[If you're sick of our men and women in blue being targeted by anti-cop prosecutors, then I pray you'll find it in your heart to help my son today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a170dbcb106743dc8d2257b18811cb1b&_e=uy7eu5Kxa4TvIcg-AaD3U3yRZJLhn5R5Lb-y1e0hBFygmOf2Iw6SzAEDRb4seCT3Nu3ULQHfmlBtwsJq8la3n-ec4K7dNqj1cjA7CgiH1QgeB681pkgar88KyaB3yZ0y5WVlINd7-b7hxhORBVcNowQ6rYZi-8qPu_use8GtRz3WAlHN6_WB2-UBLqXCHv_aEv_Q3jOcRHWT2dXxhu3DfIHNQgVFr4iuIenlOKjbeACVq-oHTodRxpJSBetaMU5Yj5vqosxfp26npLriB6C8eWpqWn6i__TksmMxxpE3UOa0LUfxYoUCc1BVY11T1pOM3N0BX8yxQxcXyQ3ts5MS_BClvo9dMD5TWkoGWVW0DQEJA3LMfHrIze8Ms-U9Gqbr)**

Please let me explain...

On the night of March 28, 2019, my son conducted a routine traffic stop.

But instead of pulling over, the driver - a convicted drug dealer named Javier Ambler - floored the gas and tried to flee.

The suspect's speed quickly exceeded 100 miles per hour. Along the way, he collided with signs, trees, fences, and other roadside objects.

The chase lasted for 22 minutes and spanned two counties. At any moment, another driver or a pedestrian could have been struck and killed by the drug dealer's reckless driving. It was a deadly serious situation.

Eventually, the chase ended when the suspect crashed head-first into a tree.

My son ordered him to get on the ground at gunpoint. He refused. James ordered again, and still the driver did not comply.

That's when another Deputy and an Austin Police Officer arrived on scene. Together, they tried to handcuff the giant man - but he kept resisting and fighting to get back on his feet.

Now, my son is strong. . . but this man was twice his size. . . **nearly 400 pounds.** And even together, the three officers could not subdue him.

So, to put a stop to his fighting and get him handcuffed, they deployed a taser again.

Still nothing - he kept resisting.

They tased him once more and they were finally able to get him into handcuffs.

That's when they noticed that the suspect had lost consciousness. Without missing a beat, they immediately began life-saving tactics and radioed for an ambulance to respond with high priority.

The suspect was rushed to the hospital - but despite the prompt medical attention, he was declared dead on arrival.

According to the medical examiner, Javier Ambler's "morbid obesity" had given him "congestive heart failure" and "hyper intensive cardiovascular disease," - which, in the heat of the struggle, caused his death.

Soon after, an internal affairs investigation by my son's department found that the deputies did nothing wrong. A second independent investigation by the Austin Police Department concluded my son and the other officers committed no such crimes and did not cause Ambler's death.

**But two years after being cleared, James was charged with manslaughter!**

So what changed?

Well, Travis County - where the suspect crashed and the chase concluded - elected a new District Attorney.

A George Soros-funded District Attorney . . . a Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren-endorsed District Attorney . . . a socialist District Attorney, who campaigned not on fighting crime - but on cracking down on police.

His name is Jose Garza, and in just over three years in office, he's charged dozens of cops with crimes while letting countless violent criminals go free!

Somehow, my son James got caught up in something much bigger than himself, and now he's lost his job and his life savings trying to defend his good name in court.

Worst of all, if convicted James's children will lose their dad to decades in prison.

**[Now I hope you can see why I'm swallowing my pride and asking you to help me fight for my son - and my grandchildren - by supporting James' legal defense.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a170dbcb106743dc8d2257b18811cb1b&_e=uy7eu5Kxa4TvIcg-AaD3U3yRZJLhn5R5Lb-y1e0hBFygmOf2Iw6SzAEDRb4seCT3Nu3ULQHfmlBtwsJq8la3n-ec4K7dNqj1cjA7CgiH1QgeB681pkgar88KyaB3yZ0y5WVlINd7-b7hxhORBVcNowQ6rYZi-8qPu_use8GtRz3WAlHN6_WB2-UBLqXCHv_aEv_Q3jOcRHWT2dXxhu3DfP1QwFYMHOUV3WEXlKUOlfYG-DK_U-iyiwHlJpo9mrkL-oJtmxc4rsdqqRCrw3HMJZKfeJyRjnwI-Tu7rrP0DV2R36h79wE5yJfQC_e3r_pQL_yD2FBnKziHG0VycHl70KKnPCvb6CSPKnq8lppUvO6B-Qj0M1mJViGGDXeeNDcR)**

You see, right when we thought all hope was lost - we got a call from Jason Johnson at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).

This incredible organization helps innocent cops who are unfairly prosecuted for split-second, life-or-death decisions they make in the line of duty.

They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses. . . whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court.

And they do it all free of charge!

They're funded entirely by the generous support of big-hearted donors like you, who can recognize a miscarriage of justice. . . and want to help fix it.

My son has told me he feels abandoned by the people he dedicated his life to helping. I told him there are people out there who still support the police...

...and I pray you are one of these people and that you will step up and help to fund the $150,000+ in legal fees he's facing.

**[Will you please help my son clear his name by making a generous tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a170dbcb106743dc8d2257b18811cb1b&_e=uy7eu5Kxa4TvIcg-AaD3U3yRZJLhn5R5Lb-y1e0hBFygmOf2Iw6SzAEDRb4seCT3Nu3ULQHfmlBtwsJq8la3n-ec4K7dNqj1cjA7CgiH1QgeB681pkgar88KyaB3yZ0y5WVlINd7-b7hxhORBVcNowQ6rYZi-8qPu_use8GtRz3WAlHN6_WB2-UBLqXCHv_aEv_Q3jOcRHWT2dXxhu3DfJ0gSYxB_6tClnAgm8Qcj6gBrzuRBaAyCd7itUgxJVSXB_3C6YE-8XwH5gXw09Cqkl6Zj-4sXBytE6xxjaplASdCptrIUCSa4MKU5o_AuoSk4QTeDfvrY9ES-3IiH8p2hfbzFFcosy5nvSeeaTWj7vPN5cgHlkw7R0sO-FHbj-XN)**

No matter how much you can give to help LELDF fund James' defense, I hope you'll know how grateful I - and my entire family - will be for your help.

With deep appreciation,

**Karen Dabney**

P.S. My son has four children of his own. If James is convicted and receives the maximum sentence of 20 years, they'll be grown adults by the time he's finally set free. He will miss out on everything. And his children will grow up without a dad.

**[So, please- PLEASE - won't you send the best donation you can today to help keep my brave son out of prison and with his children, where he belongs?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a170dbcb106743dc8d2257b18811cb1b&_e=uy7eu5Kxa4TvIcg-AaD3U3yRZJLhn5R5Lb-y1e0hBFygmOf2Iw6SzAEDRb4seCT3Nu3ULQHfmlBtwsJq8la3n-ec4K7dNqj1cjA7CgiH1QgeB681pkgar88KyaB3yZ0y5WVlINd7-b7hxhORBVcNowQ6rYZi-8qPu_use8GtRz3WAlHN6_WB2-UBLqXCHv_aEv_Q3jOcRHWT2dXxhu3DfNMnzhuUvQ-hC9fLfZk4Bbo2vqfxq9f0xYo9vmp9vkAs76PR1og3esoXmx_b9OBnHULn26zJBEXxOd2pVzLNh_Gs8dj9t1wHPKGOWTK2TwnPKhVAjVTeiOAdTWYrmZf_Q9p8-cdvUtSvPGAhxNM7G9Pl7tJfnPxmhxQj1wQd0Ag6)** Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU!
\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a170dbcb106743dc8d2257b18811cb1b&_e=uy7eu5Kxa4TvIcg-AaD3U9PdsUNXPLQLw5VN_JEP2ntZJRdEZ0lxTl1MwKXLHL4QnJjhjcwz8Qt_q7sOmSvCHzUTyMLJ4_ZzzbM8uBxx27n1wgUcJ9NDWgdGLvviqIRkJX_N3yN6ttnVDB72YLgfyWvVGZBUYDddrzAgiIGQ8aQUhvit1YwwVk2TjYoGDRqT1x4w7x6EA9JMyzaFW0G5gg%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=a170dbcb106743dc8d2257b18811cb1b&_t=LNDr3qSmi1PeZS49o8yNqyTnftSl1FaiGCtUWAs39rQvBaCJolAdw8r0s_hIS33Vi7lCmYyAkLCBb_XmVPCg0mNG8MK54hESevbcZTnBVd877pV0EfS9D3doCcRhzsWQluK1QiC5J9JiqhnwoTVJIoKbVHCzX0dBgS2GgSQc9KQ%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a170dbcb106743dc8d2257b18811cb1b&_e=5vpYwKy6jbdkhVU5mxEaSiEN8_nZErkq8WnQ_NKsXORsSfNuCpHpW1QBXDBvhsfe_kILDHaLhp3HP53BQULN5BY8S8E8ekygQg16dl95h10hEjtE-h2pyiElM9m0yT8sGv2BQkU6X9MxrA_Qdrag8jOKoQKu_zSaLn796MhJiIqABXNPOQKnKTcg7jfoxBQxOGnPTS-1xGCaMoJZM6s8DUUqk5UCaNh2TIW0hJoLpKrIQzu7PVjyyaWbrjb1e7jekhuDzE5xgWZ-rCCbQLH-MA%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a170dbcb106743dc8d2257b18811cb1b&_e=uy7eu5Kxa4TvIcg-AaD3U6mKWNnSpl-lZjhM4HhCGUnVYxOddErlpQ3Zv0vqi0S3mZ3HKUiBXyEpl-IeAsKbt9bAevZyb9Bdw9FbOGMsfwR9ZEC33v72w6pni8JrVLVMP0Cjhxgt1MFwsmmBkaQp-Riy9HP6UmONAiBmhOt2UlsRaRr76g5yhXnbVnHo3JVonaYQd3QJhm-P6wnG4Q1NadQThpe1yvXl-kjSrSxvYdw%3D)_

Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU! \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.PoliceDefense.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Initiatives update
body:
Given the certification of all six initiatives, we want to highlight our recent interview with Let's Go Washington founder, Brian Heywood. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62764195:W5WVxdi2N:m:1:2610672541:6E4DC1CC3E71560630B1C9F6FD983A1C:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

The 2024 legislative session is continues with and - unsurprisingly - Democrats continue to ignore their constitutional duty to take up the certified Let's Go Washington initiatives. And, as we continue delivering the latest news coming out of Olympia, we hope to keep you up-to-date with an item or two of interest last week from your own backyard. Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
Republican State Representative April Connors (8th LD) joins us to discuss top priorities for the 2024 legislative session, including addressing overregulation for housing, ensuring energy access, and safeguarding the Snake River dams. Expressing disappointment in Democrats' refusal to hear Let's Go Washington Initiatives, Connors emphasizes the importance of citizen-driven change. She also discusses how overregulation has led to the housing crisis and highlights the solutions her bill (House Bill 2464) presents. Optimistic about its passage, Connors also discusses her bill (House Bill 2040), proposing a $200 gas rebate to offset the Climate Commitment Act's impact. **[Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62764196:W5WVxdi2N:m:1:2610672541:6E4DC1CC3E71560630B1C9F6FD983A1C:r)**.

**This week 's top story...**
Democrats love to claim that they are commited to defending democracy, yet they continue to ignore the state constitution by refusing public hearings on all six of the certified Let's Go Washington initiatives. Last week, supporters of the initiatives held a rally outside the Capitol Building to urge action and expose Democrats for their hypocrisy. House Minority Leader Rep. Drew Stokesbary called out Democrats for obstructing the initiatives despite significant voter support. _**[Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62764197:W5WVxdi2N:m:1:2610672541:6E4DC1CC3E71560630B1C9F6FD983A1C:r)**_.

**In case you missed it ...**
Washington State Democrats are considering a new strategy to garner voter support by proposing the "Evergreen Basic Income Pilot Program," which involves sending recurring cash payments to 7,500 low-income residents for two years. Democrat Senator Claudia Kaufman says it's part of economic security. Apparently, that it is not a reality for many in the state after 40 years of Democratic governors. This is just another questionable Democrat idea that all too closely resembles a potential vote-buying tactic. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62764198:W5WVxdi2N:m:1:2610672541:6E4DC1CC3E71560630B1C9F6FD983A1C:r).

**Your bit of inspiration for the week ...**
Relax and enjoy the beauty of the Neskowin Beach, as photographed by former U.S. Rep. Rod Chandler. | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62764199:W5WVxdi2N:m:1:2610672541:6E4DC1CC3E71560630B1C9F6FD983A1C:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14412884&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oW5WVxdi2N).
---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Censure. Expel. Deport.
body:
Help Censure Ilhan Omar

| | | [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e60e31aa90c046f6b8abb4188915c1ee&_e=4AfREbq-VOdi6RE-jXqN8boQK1FpasjqN2ODLU-ZolxYj1f42xLhEtXPkPMCk8hxjoQAoaA13pxXnMjVkT-VkyRQ-CBZ0XehFnm2Y3Bo5A8IIMQvZpbO97VY7MMScIGFX9Mdxx1qNTvvnHnfIf6fv_lOJmW4Mc1kJE5KZFoVu1U2TMj_FUnGi49ph06JFsuq8F0mQCiHNrzGuzJONwkRW63_VC3FiWK5CH5uo1GXYb5fqhjmiqdBhFd8LnFxB9WKPdzQhEOk1KTMe-pMQtmX3T74B_ReOAHpb5oMPuo4bcV3G3bmMNHYfOBNVOKZOJlpZ2uwmlKgni5t8inYpg7K1A%3D%3D)
---
Friend, **I just introduced a censure resolution against Ilhan Omar.** She was caught on video acting as a foreign agent putting the interests of the country she fled – Somalia – ahead of America. **Her actions are treasonous and she must be held accountable.** I took an oath to defend America against all enemies and I will not stop until we rip out, root and stem, those destroying America from within. [**If you agree with me, add your name to the “Censure Ilhan Omar” petition right now.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e60e31aa90c046f6b8abb4188915c1ee&_e=4AfREbq-VOdi6RE-jXqN8boQK1FpasjqN2ODLU-ZolxYj1f42xLhEtXPkPMCk8hxjoQAoaA13pxXnMjVkT-VkyRQ-CBZ0XehFnm2Y3Bo5A8IIMQvZpbO97VY7MMScIGFX9Mdxx1qNTvvnHnfIf6fv_lOJmW4Mc1kJE5KZFoVu1U2TMj_FUnGi49ph06JFsuqyz4r0QzyTL019CHjlV1RiQdMyKMhN3ggzBY3gmi03V-TYg6Qki6wAXroJgItNAbd2uHYmNKnzl5nqTIq8MpV4FnHueGGTOtvaUxf_iWiyIbzq97Ct8uG4suWGgtxZno5JOWpIj9hGsaE9hr_qxxgFA%3D%3D) Ilhan Omar embodies the biggest threat America faces: Migrant hordes invading our country with no real desire to assimilate or embrace what it means to be an American. She has no allegiance to America. She hates America, hates our culture, and hates the values that made us the envy of the world. “Immigrants” like Ilhan Omar weaponize Americas’s generosity against us and spit in our faces. People who abuse our system like Ilhan put America Last because they remain more loyal to the violent, corrupt, war-torn countries they fled than to our nation that took them in. _These are not immigrants who love America and come here for a better life. They’re invaders attempting to overthrow our country!_ America deserves better leaders than Ilhan Omar and with your support I can hold her accountable. [**Will you add your name demanding the House of Representatives hold Ilhan Omar accountable?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e60e31aa90c046f6b8abb4188915c1ee&_e=4AfREbq-VOdi6RE-jXqN8boQK1FpasjqN2ODLU-ZolxYj1f42xLhEtXPkPMCk8hxjoQAoaA13pxXnMjVkT-VkyRQ-CBZ0XehFnm2Y3Bo5A8IIMQvZpbO97VY7MMScIGFX9Mdxx1qNTvvnHnfIf6fv_lOJmW4Mc1kJE5KZFoVu1U2TMj_FUnGi49ph06JFsuq65hYy5gFG-gsvEajnnT4bWBj4WoFpw9eitWwf4woMRuy43Hy5KAi6YnIK4mwoW8A61-8Ddc9E01siP4CJzBNZJPMjssR-G5o2eMMSPVLOItFGR3qNr24-I-8RQmd0pWodlL13KX-IWUz_xIlav2eyg%3D%3D)
| [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e60e31aa90c046f6b8abb4188915c1ee&_e=4AfREbq-VOdi6RE-jXqN8boQK1FpasjqN2ODLU-ZolxYj1f42xLhEtXPkPMCk8hxjoQAoaA13pxXnMjVkT-VkyRQ-CBZ0XehFnm2Y3Bo5A8IIMQvZpbO97VY7MMScIGFX9Mdxx1qNTvvnHnfIf6fv_lOJmW4Mc1kJE5KZFoVu1U2TMj_FUnGi49ph06JFsuq7j5VDrx2OQjy-FeyT6HM4Py95ICCYA0iFCkRUpAg7SNM24AwJjXGYtGvSdxv-kAdeutHuvbX26TBzAYllSRAXJ15Dxx3-rv1TZ58aPb3KozVMVhTbRhiTNC-SVG4ORsTqRWJdNRxMLXwqkKNQq1GSA%3D%3D)
---
| [ **CESURE ILHAN OMAR - SIGN NOW** ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e60e31aa90c046f6b8abb4188915c1ee&_e=4AfREbq-VOdi6RE-jXqN8boQK1FpasjqN2ODLU-ZolxYj1f42xLhEtXPkPMCk8hxjoQAoaA13pxXnMjVkT-VkyRQ-CBZ0XehFnm2Y3Bo5A8IIMQvZpbO97VY7MMScIGFX9Mdxx1qNTvvnHnfIf6fv_lOJmW4Mc1kJE5KZFoVu1U2TMj_FUnGi49ph06JFsuqfJ3FDxx44qJqKaC8DSUb2BgTXw2H6am0ED5No_ekTthhrzyvYrJno8zsALnsqMX5VK-XdrdP5NZzBWKNTI5JMPAX2w43cDGRNj6xvojDY4TMOF1I423s3uL1vbJGhQh0WQslG2NP80tQN5Ma5PfQlA%3D%3D)
---
Friend,**** it is people like Ilhan Omar whom George Washington was trying to warn us of in his farewell address, cautioning Americans to “guard against the imposters of pretended patriotism.” It’s an insult to our Founding Fathers and absolutely disgraceful that we have a foreign agent holding office in the United States. But here we are thanks to Democrats like Ilhan Omar. And I’m afraid that if patriots like you don’t step up and show your support, it will only incentivize other foreign agents like her to pursue a seat in Congress. **We can’t waste any time; our country needs leaders who will fight to make America better, not extort it for foreign interest.** I need you to immediately show your support to help me fight back and Censure Ilhan Omar. **Help me take back our country and Save America.** **[Sign Now >>>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e60e31aa90c046f6b8abb4188915c1ee&_e=4AfREbq-VOdi6RE-jXqN8boQK1FpasjqN2ODLU-ZolxYj1f42xLhEtXPkPMCk8hxjoQAoaA13pxXnMjVkT-VkyRQ-CBZ0XehFnm2Y3Bo5A8IIMQvZpbO97VY7MMScIGFX9Mdxx1qNTvvnHnfIf6fv_lOJmW4Mc1kJE5KZFoVu1U2TMj_FUnGi49ph06JFsuqwoQzh7hV3pk3xNi425NexhEhm7wdZVAAeqSs2FOexVZaVGN5PpRY7efsXQYYzLr_7IjkbeWLWF_VkLJhvUBGbO9mEddQkODaUvOPW4HcWDxiBSyMZbk-H4IisYn53qBIUlp1IvjXAZaWhqj5KZ8BzA%3D%3D)** _Talk Soon,_ Marjorie Taylor Greene
| [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e60e31aa90c046f6b8abb4188915c1ee&_e=4AfREbq-VOdi6RE-jXqN8boQK1FpasjqN2ODLU-ZolxYj1f42xLhEtXPkPMCk8hxjoQAoaA13pxXnMjVkT-VkyRQ-CBZ0XehFnm2Y3Bo5A8IIMQvZpbO97VY7MMScIGFX9Mdxx1qNTvvnHnfIf6fv_lOJmW4Mc1kJE5KZFoVu1U2TMj_FUnGi49ph06JFsuqrX87YTfoesyfqGlTj-06XU9Yr6G0hbzoDGQhTo3ZaEPDoIjulB7ED7jnkbNmjfDQpcqIuudONePWR5HfxfD3TW9YlcJBHXEUf1W3ip-EFzZrP01dxm40glGPTa-t4pHvFA0kRP6wKrebEh00kG6TxA%3D%3D)

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The battle for free speech is going to the Supreme Court
body:
One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court, and you probably haven’t heard about it.

| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QtQk7N7flhJ_wB-vCclmhA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnof3VP0RSaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVVTQ040NjEyNFcDc3BjQgplutV4v2WrLw-lUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
|
---
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QtQk7N7flhJ_wB-vCclmhA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnof3VP0RSaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVVTQ040NjEyNFcDc3BjQgplutV4v2WrLw-lUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
**One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court, and you probably haven’t heard about it.** Right now, both Texas and Florida are battling to uphold their common-sense bills that prohibit viewpoint discrimination on social media. These bills were passed for a reason — conservative voices are being suppressed. Disfavored opinions (and even jokes) that are out of step with the progressive narrative have resulted in countless violations and suspensions. And that’s not an exaggeration; we’ve experienced many cases of discriminatory censorship firsthand. In fact, we were locked out of Twitter for 8 months just because we told a joke that referred to a male person (“Admiral” Rachel Levine) as a man. It’s gotten completely out of hand. Thankfully, Texas and Florida decided to do something about it. They drafted and passed legislation that would make it unlawful for big social media companies to engage in viewpoint discrimination. But, as expected, the social media companies challenged these laws, leading to an upcoming showdown at the Supreme Court. What the highest Court decides here will have far-reaching implications not just for us, but for everyone who uses social media to share their views and defend their values. **_That’s why Babylon Bee has filed an amicus brief in support of the Florida and Texas laws._**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QtQk7N7flhJ_wB-vCclmhA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnof3VP0RSaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVVTQ040NjEyNFcDc3BjQgplutV4v2WrLw-lUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
This is nothing new for us. We’ve long been committed to defending free speech in the public square. Here are some of the free speech battles we’ve taken on over the years:
* We filed an amicus brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of a humorist who was actually jailed because of a parody Facebook page.
* We sued the Attorney General's Office in the state of California to block the enforcement of a law requiring social media companies to regularly report "misinformation, disinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech."
* We sued the New York Attorney General too, for the same censorship debauchery.
* We refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our Twitter account with over 1 million followers
* We told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks

Fighting on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn’t easy or inexpensive, but it’s the right thing to do. And it’s making a difference. But we can’t do it without you. **[**Will you become a paid subscriber to The Babylon Bee to help us stay in the fight?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QtQk7N7flhJ_wB-vCclmhA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnof3VP0RSaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVVTQ040NjEyNFcDc3BjQgplutV4v2WrLw-lUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QtQk7N7flhJ_wB-vCclmhA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnof3VP0RSaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVVTQ040NjEyNFcDc3BjQgplutV4v2WrLw-lUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
Seth Dillon

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zxfVnzG8psgEu5Q3r_b1mw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zxfVnzG8psgEu5Q3r_b1mw~~/AARclAA~~~) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zxfVnzG8psgEu5Q3r_b1mw~~/AARclAA~~~)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zxfVnzG8psgEu5Q3r_b1mw~~/AARclAA~~~)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

Peter,
**Imagine someone who brazenly stormed the Capitol, attempting to topple our democracy, now sitting on your child's school board.** It's happening. Kimberly Dragoo, a self-confessed participant in the January 6th insurrection, is not alone. Numerous insurrectionists are now eyeing roles in our children's schools.
Three years have passed since that dark day when our democracy faced an unprecedented assault. Alarmingly, the very individuals involved in that chaos are now quietly positioning themselves in educational roles, seeking to influence and control the future of our nation.
This year, tens of thousands of school board seats across the country are at stake. Right-wing extremists, flush with funding, are backing these insurrectionists' campaigns, aiming to infiltrate and reshape our schools.
Public education is not just a pillar of society; it's the bedrock of our democratic values. We cannot stand idly by and watch these extremists erode the principles we hold dear. We need you, Peter, to step up and join us in this crucial fight.
[_**Will you chip in $3, $20, or more as a testament to our collective strength and commitment to preserving our democratic ideals? clean_body: = Peter, Imagine someone who brazenly stormed the Capitol, attempting to topple our democracy, now sitting on your child's school board. It's happening. Kimberly Dragoo, a self-confessed participant in the January 6th insurrection, is not alone. Numerous insurrectionists are now eyeing roles in our children's schools. Three years have passed since that dark day when our democracy faced an unprecedented assault. Alarmingly, the very individuals involved in that chaos are now quietly positioning themselves in educational roles, seeking to influence and control the future of our nation. This year, tens of thousands of school board seats across the country are at stake. Right-wing extremists, flush with funding, are backing these insurrectionists' campaigns, aiming to infiltrate and reshape our schools. Public education is not just a pillar of society; it's the bedrock of our democratic values. We cannot stand idly by and watch these extremists erode the principles we hold dear. We need you, Peter, to step up and join us in this crucial fight. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = The battle for our democracy continues, and it's unfolding in our children's classrooms. subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c6bdce15f9904c1f936b7b62739fb916&_e=MI4xOIHGq7Msjx6qaCt54NsiSLlaatvEUBUWKW4cSRcUeUlLPgJpOoDlYzmePTfAMPRaQSInBYMpy9D_eIyBPAyLvOVjQGT4NKQpOusqVq7zdbkaRynmZjbGmuIp8DlD9rL74l_Z1QgXYoaOC5y9ufkRpM3UY7T8iKVfpFaAE1GejJ36RREo2p774jdSJ1wZ5XWHgVD_eYg41vGjBkKepSxC5dugGHINiTvd2n7M813JRRevkMkyY3zniJ97RgEmiGlZRS8b8p7x2vj9qRpVy0llDsma7K6uc-Yh9aulBbZmMD4H7JYzo-6S1riD-O4avSgR55qVcKp9IpO6VLnD2U2pbrWVkLYavCBX_rtfH_MN52j6O9ZP6ZsGAjcBqd-KmeVCllD10gA_Nret82lsP6K9KjMV1ciT9IjV1A585Sg%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c6bdce15f9904c1f936b7b62739fb916&_e=MI4xOIHGq7Msjx6qaCt54NsiSLlaatvEUBUWKW4cSRcUeUlLPgJpOoDlYzmePTfAMPRaQSInBYMpy9D_eIyBPAyLvOVjQGT4NKQpOusqVq7zdbkaRynmZjbGmuIp8DlD9rL74l_Z1QgXYoaOC5y9ufkRpM3UY7T8iKVfpFaAE1GejJ36RREo2p774jdSJ1wZ5XWHgVD_eYg41vGjBkKepSxC5dugGHINiTvd2n7M813JRRevkMkyY3zniJ97RgEmiGlZRS8b8p7x2vj9qRpVy-_VkFsPgJCZadt2ywFki5Qt-Gy8kTz6RQy_iG1sa3XE2IBL118Qm8Az0D-v_nUe2zL0rpWM1nrimeM8jP5LzijvAZYy0NxETi0q3_18vefqwAeqbcbkUbYQSsJFnam0mUlXRJlPXH6WHC05jQl2dSA%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c6bdce15f9904c1f936b7b62739fb916&_e=MI4xOIHGq7Msjx6qaCt54NsiSLlaatvEUBUWKW4cSRcUeUlLPgJpOoDlYzmePTfAMPRaQSInBYMpy9D_eIyBPAyLvOVjQGT4NKQpOusqVq7zdbkaRynmZjbGmuIp8DlD9rL74l_Z1QgXYoaOC5y9ufkRpM3UY7T8iKVfpFaAE1GejJ36RREo2p774jdSJ1wZ5XWHgVD_eYg41vGjBkKepSxC5dugGHINiTvd2n7M813JRRevkMkyY3zniJ97RgEmiGlZRS8b8p7x2vj9qRpVy-z31CPem0XF7YmtEU9P7Y2DUkmKQkPicSQNI2RyRkh6mAxna1BWHnaetEXzeZZqfs7FHZ0JTFt1kZ_w2I5yNNmYJ7Yk-KSaUsmd-X-1YTdbB_e7HLqpT-bKHyd8gGlDlhrrYzs3UuqZYgX3oS7Bivk%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c6bdce15f9904c1f936b7b62739fb916&_e=MI4xOIHGq7Msjx6qaCt54NsiSLlaatvEUBUWKW4cSRcUeUlLPgJpOoDlYzmePTfAMPRaQSInBYMpy9D_eIyBPAyLvOVjQGT4NKQpOusqVq7zdbkaRynmZjbGmuIp8DlD9rL74l_Z1QgXYoaOC5y9ufkRpM3UY7T8iKVfpFaAE1GejJ36RREo2p774jdSJ1wZ5XWHgVD_eYg41vGjBkKepSxC5dugGHINiTvd2n7M813JRRevkMkyY3zniJ97RgEmiGlZRS8b8p7x2vj9qRpVyxZEhLDzvUuYTZD_33HmXrilp8kjeNljEfCEDGheVWR_HiDJK8trnAPYwgbHshkNaF3t2Cf2kxacTvu-Cnep7FjdzNGQmbqR82tNAv1N1c3U8w4B4c4N12JSiA_KKjbO-iEYgqFdUQ3X8F9R78bAbdI%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2174e2908336496ca42b070331bad541&_e=cwcthhQAqkUUmZPxMEqtCbKgJfkLaFnUDRhykqh8opvFKLrSPJBFaybjAGG2HiugWtJ_ZpjebqUT1enUsVAhu1KswP9pRCMoL6g_NvG6JJ8r_LzHr7hGF6cm-7IYndWrFt4errRk6ZkvSqDWc8EUqCRE_lHXfTfoLIPzzj57aJ1b-ae_xeOxCVhuRBeVh4QtbhaBxeIfsWDzVT-OAhOpu_YNIhdIpooqJse0Y-qUUkOCBjUEYeOBRjFRF-ANI1XpjpBJxhraQzYjIOETKiw9-BXo5BQTBlVEMXuvIwfRMEMTJz74dTbXQBbb1mJW57A-RPK0d0ZHQx4n0Bc5KxlwdySvcYDakKP0lsoVhwdrPxtU548XD48C0bMtuulpf-6Fc4amgLdiY7HlPI5UMGFhI7s2hfw625oM9T_9B7qonzG4JL6ky723SNrT2o7kmNbdyS5dxCauPbIGTn096sOOKUyRQk1mshY0e8o0fHcYix8%3D)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2174e2908336496ca42b070331bad541&_e=cwcthhQAqkUUmZPxMEqtCQIBFqFz54rGUaA9ntExYTDGmoKljoMOrPpYy5AfbhSMzPtkzPmfJ3y3XRyq6ChqU-jLPbcepMx0oBzQg-WNoFLS6VHBJBjh3_J5xsStqVGTA5W3hc94yLWTQDlcK7iw1lqKlItQI8zn7_lV7n1ESX0GqGB1NYfTpeP-i4bfCRGKTvM3POJ3zVV23Exvtl_LgoMBvBeqRbAXQy5LpZNGl8JTqv1fKBoVPU27qwqETwFVUtXrrjOnRJqwahLUA8XPd296b7Zs-JjRRJUtYBjwIKaIyv0ZDwYoKJ0W1VdYoCqILPXqwHVN1Dvi2vXo5sVAQQYUSWzX25yNBwDj5K6EmD6zPw71oQ33Jei6MQTYVn4tjLS8Fset8dlSOxma6-P7cz_5QZSDHnC0Iebl5L6OvNsOgIwfCfBv7u8j0sFEnb61mYLraJCgyHgHp_QgRq5zQg%3D%3D) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2174e2908336496ca42b070331bad541&_e=cwcthhQAqkUUmZPxMEqtCbKgJfkLaFnUDRhykqh8opvFKLrSPJBFaybjAGG2HiugWtJ_ZpjebqUT1enUsVAhu1KswP9pRCMoL6g_NvG6JJ8r_LzHr7hGF6cm-7IYndWrFt4errRk6ZkvSqDWc8EUqCRE_lHXfTfoLIPzzj57aJ1b-ae_xeOxCVhuRBeVh4QtbhaBxeIfsWDzVT-OAhOpu_YNIhdIpooqJse0Y-qUUkOCBjUEYeOBRjFRF-ANI1XpjpBJxhraQzYjIOETKiw9-BXo5BQTBlVEMXuvIwfRMEMTJz74dTbXQBbb1mJW57A-RPK0d0ZHQx4n0Bc5Kxlwd7aSeHvg3T7Ywx3LKEZXIiaCpW6s1av2Zk3B2RPQqQSrVzGSXqW8jfdfk_5kJme-QQdT548wYs_LU5ylRHu7CV3GGkHOsmOjIfrLlfPL5YcZocp4ZiM_E4FqDtSVZJ8IjWuWd83S3RlFHFPWg9Xqb8I%3D)

Comedian Bill Maher said former Ambassador to the United Nations Nikki Haley has no shot of winning the Republican nomination to her top surrogate’s face during Friday’s “Real Time with Bill Maher.” Republican New Hampshire Gov. Chris Sununu said former President Donald Trump does not have the nomination locked up yet but Maher and panelist Jessica Tarlov both responded he does.

House Republicans put forward a $17.6 billion standalone Israel aid package on Saturday as a compromise Senate proposal faces increasingly long odds. The Senate bill includes funding for border security and Ukraine rather than just Israel aid, and negotiations were dragging on as well as facing Republican opposition.

President Joe Biden is projected to win the South Carolina Democratic primary on Saturday, according to The Associated Press. Biden is projected to beat challengers Democratic Minnesota Rep. Dean Phillips and author Marianne Williamson with more than 96% of the early vote, according to the AP.

subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81817682f90449028d2886e3b2124d22&_e=vhdlS3lFYT5h7sTNarMxBURhtlqz2hoTN45ED7wNY-_yZL8SwS-_jYKo4SuYTm8S8RG8K8mLgZykConud8Nkvgf-xntqgOIr0pvaG4ZekHOiAO6Ukdgfgj1G3inbLhVAkWxNn-DnfHDc4GAswNdDuoqzMYexb3Qs9bSlMiKlyttCfOzagzeFcbbTLLoDek7cN3f07Q8Q1RHQmGHz_OrC-nHSz3k4gzbvhfEX51MNSjkt8C5zpuyL39gnND_l5_UJUSTymZLAj9uzg3B7WNzX53TITIGgO7f1JK8OQsE7M8gFW-H0zaBi-E58niHerY4jq_c6m-YcIgrtzJ2tWkxgH35g6vbJjpoqUA76K0WnN4gBDO5rtPj09pCtyGThTifbvSWMA7N8XQgvIYth8XEysA%3D%3D)

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81817682f90449028d2886e3b2124d22&_e=vhdlS3lFYT5h7sTNarMxBURhtlqz2hoTN45ED7wNY-_yZL8SwS-_jYKo4SuYTm8S8RG8K8mLgZykConud8Nkvgf-xntqgOIr0pvaG4ZekHOiAO6Ukdgfgj1G3inbLhVAkWxNn-DnfHDc4GAswNdDuoqzMYexb3Qs9bSlMiKlyttCfOzagzeFcbbTLLoDek7cN3f07Q8Q1RHQmGHz_OrC-nHSz3k4gzbvhfEX51MNSjkt8C5zpuyL39gnND_l5_UJd2cXFlDc1E_HE0hJnRL5jWuTZVhwJ77_7HIUnyxCqkBoFlANoyqtdn3pYop6n0fLe7eNNbxU0QbOcV1vU5MiVbxpTETkaDP6PERDlNHjKMQ6Sbjznaf4qt-mUs_lVC7rSwlo-JsHPNkx1x8GqBKp7w%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Team Kennedy
subject: What Are They Hiding:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has promised to disclose what the government knows

|
---
| | | **Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has promised to disclose what the government knows
**
---

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ufo_2_03_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)
|

Dear Peter,
Non-human aircrafts.
Non-human life forms.
Reverse engineering by the Department of Defense and federal contractors.
Roswell.
In light of recent Congressional testimony from government whistleblowers, these topics, once reserved for late night sci-fi TV, are freely discussed publicly today.
The testimony of various Defense Department personnel was shocking. They went on the record saying that they are aware of and have knowledge of the existence of non-human life and non-human aircrafts—as well as of the government’s attempts to reverse-engineer the aircrafts they’ve recovered.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/ufo-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ufo_2_03_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
Whatever your views are on “unidentified aerial phenomenon” (formerly UFOs, or Unidentified Flying Objects), we believe the United States government should come clean with the American people about what they know, and what, if anything, they have been hiding.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has promised to disclose what the government knows, what they aren’t sharing, and most importantly, if we do have knowledge and possession of beings and aircrafts of non-human origin.
This is just one of the many issues that RFK Jr. has promised to handle with full transparency to the public. But we will never have the answers if he doesn’t [win the battle for the White House](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ufo_2_03_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=3) in November.

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: Many hats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here Peter, Whether you’ve been with me from the start or this is the first time you’re hearing about me, I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on board. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=5d2d0583e5ec9d755521681e761f937b92850addd0c400ddd71bc8627c90644644d178f2f58319b9c5a782607a3cc30a720d70f814ccd5e483d3764dbe870b0d Once you’re done reading this, please consider making a donation of any amount to keep my momentum STRONG as we begin 2024! I’ve never thought I would be in the world of politics. It was something I didn’t know much about. But what I did know was that I always wanted to serve my country. It began when I was commissioned as a Naval officer in 1993 and then had the privilege to serve for a decade. I was a helicopter pilot flying H-46 helicopters and completed two deployments to the Persian Gulf. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=5d2d0583e5ec9d755521681e761f937b92850addd0c400ddd71bc8627c90644644d178f2f58319b9c5a782607a3cc30a720d70f814ccd5e483d3764dbe870b0d After serving in the Navy, I used my GI Bill benefits to go back to school and become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner. Once again, serving our Greatest Generation by giving them the healthcare that they deserved. After years of watching the evening news, I got frustrated with the politicians in always saw on TV always talking about all the dysfunction and radical agendas in our government. Instead of continuing to get mad and yell at my TV, I did something about it….! I ran for office. I served three sessions in the Virginia State Senate, where I used my real-world experience to bring real solutions back to our Commonwealth. I championed legislation to promote election security, establish a Military Spouse Liaison, and advocate for patients, families, and caregivers in long-term care facilities. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=5d2d0583e5ec9d755521681e761f937b92850addd0c400ddd71bc8627c90644644d178f2f58319b9c5a782607a3cc30a720d70f814ccd5e483d3764dbe870b0d I found myself yelling at the TV again about the news in Washington. At that time we were represented by a Democrat in Congress who voted with Nancy Pelosi 99% of the time and not by someone who put our values and community first. So instead of complaining about it, I did something again. I ran for Congress! With the odds stacked against me, I never lost sight of why I was running. The National Democrats poured OVER $10 MILLION dollars into my opponent's race to defeat me, but that never stopped me. On Election Night, we won by about 10,000 votes in one of the closest races in the entire nation. Now, I am working hard to make a big impact on our country. We are standing up for veterans, parents, taxpayers, and hard-working Americans. We’re making good progress, but the work is just getting started. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=5d2d0583e5ec9d755521681e761f937b92850addd0c400ddd71bc8627c90644644d178f2f58319b9c5a782607a3cc30a720d70f814ccd5e483d3764dbe870b0d I’ve worn many hats throughout my life. I’m a Wife, Mom, Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Strong Conservative. Most importantly, I’m a proud American who is in the fight to bring our country back to what it once was. But the Democrats are out for revenge. They’ve recruited a far-Left candidate to defeat me, and she’s spending all her time lying about me and my record. It’s absolutely ridiculous. A Daily Caller News Foundation reporter warned “terror threats” have crossed the U.S. border during a Saturday morning appearance on Newsmax. A member of al-Shabaab, a radical Islamic terrorist group based out of Somalia, was captured in Minnesota in January after being released into the United States following an initial detention at the U.S.-Mexico border, according to a memo obtained by the DCNF.

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4ec23706d2b74ad0ae010b22fa608a40&_e=zi5QsOlb0iFfM5oRmLLfyO4os34al6LdeLr5HaGrT9xM1yCo8CQxj_4X6hCxF--gY_ryn6guZsrg0NH_Zu3UHkrog7zomF_5tzqV_kkblfy2DsNZ-CsPIkGL01YaAV0C-52t-NoQOYWobj7RD3SjVCzM70sSaCNGyzTZsQ1OUTQ9gx5lATOJtV7vFPLVUtsltIgb7mbJ_jpJYbzMAQAmUuq09A2orsidsfK_42GQxM4uuRkdksJ32vwzvBA7Bzj7Nfavkqav-UG8fnMQUQNvewckaa1EtDOWubD3LweYND98gmYgtopst1_vC5Ixlc9r6s2mu42gbEf76mUsFuc5P4czvXwvMMGXJr0Uk-x-NkuJNHaSCLTRpwhZdNVxEpSQBwKikFWsWwpBMugit6sCyA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4ec23706d2b74ad0ae010b22fa608a40&_e=zi5QsOlb0iFfM5oRmLLfyO4os34al6LdeLr5HaGrT9xM1yCo8CQxj_4X6hCxF--gY_ryn6guZsrg0NH_Zu3UHkrog7zomF_5tzqV_kkblfy2DsNZ-CsPIkGL01YaAV0C-52t-NoQOYWobj7RD3SjVCzM70sSaCNGyzTZsQ1OUTQ9gx5lATOJtV7vFPLVUtsltIgb7mbJ_jpJYbzMAQAmUuq09A2orsidsfK_42GQxM4uuRkdksJ32vwzvBA7Bzj7VHaw8SA57CTIMOwLbNxErsoRI2prsVzxXpa8ZZ-GL29fM2xEAQ3xZViOsgnNdoyayW9Q6cjiG5b3fCk-yHZslAv7WbZVk_cNOtZA0tbsz6ucQMJyg4dVvZ3L2N62rUn5W-NlBPtNH0IgjsIN5ebuxw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4ec23706d2b74ad0ae010b22fa608a40&_e=zi5QsOlb0iFfM5oRmLLfyO4os34al6LdeLr5HaGrT9xM1yCo8CQxj_4X6hCxF--gY_ryn6guZsrg0NH_Zu3UHkrog7zomF_5tzqV_kkblfy2DsNZ-CsPIkGL01YaAV0C-52t-NoQOYWobj7RD3SjVCzM70sSaCNGyzTZsQ1OUTQ9gx5lATOJtV7vFPLVUtsltIgb7mbJ_jpJYbzMAQAmUuq09A2orsidsfK_42GQxM4uuRkdksJ32vwzvBA7Bzj7fCRDZuXs0OZ34OlM9hPUhR84lbXi5G4sgD00pHnPeYXDro2YUrLfNCShiHfdc6DWVOtgCR7oFUks5PHwiMt9qw57vEo-8IUqcYCogEtFsdIxK3HFnW3SbediT9J7cU9-KwAMWT1H6BItSLSjbGt6Qg%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c62e3fa865c34326bda91c6afc06058e&_e=p9LZGDFyYhWbCyreC3k9nZQnNdx4_FZFecgK45b9R9bPpfTXeEiiVXhuP2S9b7OjFZGdLfFB7w-sOraD13huKOEiZPdVikilk4Jem_zicwmBA7sbF2p5TJl0pa4NyTS-DGEQHAldLnZdhBHvXXybjvNOAZvSG1haZlGuRaeqAZ482Ebq2bPxXYPOEV0PafzHZssTo184sG6-3E5VQsWjBtKYqoI4cI_FncJAqgn6c4BDpJIYcpZmsSW7tlqjPd4omFcrGZLw3wxkfZc2lrtQBkUUQOyvPlMpcbKq3IBNhwfeX6L-nDeOl_wFDG0DrfFQwYmRUerdQ8logS7MgqLgb5xtZrToyysL5pgfV_jDFirCQ6-jzLymmaaRBkVRreogxre-nue1E7ponbVuabqlzUj6jZJfXkKs8yiViIuHXbs%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c62e3fa865c34326bda91c6afc06058e&_e=p9LZGDFyYhWbCyreC3k9nZQnNdx4_FZFecgK45b9R9bPpfTXeEiiVXhuP2S9b7OjFZGdLfFB7w-sOraD13huKOEiZPdVikilk4Jem_zicwmBA7sbF2p5TJl0pa4NyTS-DGEQHAldLnZdhBHvXXybjvNOAZvSG1haZlGuRaeqAZ482Ebq2bPxXYPOEV0PafzHZssTo184sG6-3E5VQsWjBtKYqoI4cI_FncJAqgn6c4BDpJIYcpZmsSW7tlqjPd4omFcrGZLw3wxkfZc2lrtQBjs1Qbg6Ji9sqdlWLEgUYYf_A7m1t4nQCWxleytyyrWDqr5DfUzgoqVCKwPQa--NPdHb5lQPKz0SLwKrZSf0Ilppdp2WkMbXy28sZK24RZ3ftkVBG5MhabT1TCSD9bbZwYCkiyQ5iSnZBXRrmbu_Oyw%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c62e3fa865c34326bda91c6afc06058e&_e=p9LZGDFyYhWbCyreC3k9nZQnNdx4_FZFecgK45b9R9bPpfTXeEiiVXhuP2S9b7OjFZGdLfFB7w-sOraD13huKOEiZPdVikilk4Jem_zicwmBA7sbF2p5TJl0pa4NyTS-DGEQHAldLnZdhBHvXXybjvNOAZvSG1haZlGuRaeqAZ482Ebq2bPxXYPOEV0PafzHZssTo184sG6-3E5VQsWjBtKYqoI4cI_FncJAqgn6c4BDpJIYcpZmsSW7tlqjPd4omFcrGZLw3wxkfZc2lrtQBs44XsxMrn7wxDuoQyJpMsgCllScKayDXNGjS00P5Z1pELNHBA5x47VwVVWSKQMgSlKRZlOGYBgeVmLiT984_kixiatz0PlBUQdAFXE6nY-Aqi18Qc4HDt5Hw5N9ofY-8ge1oVyxJiGL5DKtMtCBYe8%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c62e3fa865c34326bda91c6afc06058e&_e=p9LZGDFyYhWbCyreC3k9nZQnNdx4_FZFecgK45b9R9bPpfTXeEiiVXhuP2S9b7OjFZGdLfFB7w-sOraD13huKOEiZPdVikilk4Jem_zicwmBA7sbF2p5TJl0pa4NyTS-DGEQHAldLnZdhBHvXXybjvNOAZvSG1haZlGuRaeqAZ482Ebq2bPxXYPOEV0PafzHZssTo184sG6-3E5VQsWjBtKYqoI4cI_FncJAqgn6c4BDpJIYcpZmsSW7tlqjPd4omFcrGZLw3wxkfZc2lrtQBio-485MCE1_ZOuqo7-crG_zMFpExXYshROOv_-Ttay5pMp6K25bXQJxmix0AalnUKCucGNDNozR4kh2Ebl3saUqazxifQiGHX0_aD75DRZENuw4PYg1dk4cDw98U0s4Ko12GCIx2g1hNDfb_sWYRbs%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Editors=20at=20Broad=20+=20Liberty?=
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Safety Measures are Failing in Delco's Prison | Women's Health Jeopardized by Abortion Regulation Repeals + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | |
### __Broad + Liberty's_ Weekly Reads:_
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ddfcc9ecdf&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| _**‘My son could still be alive, maybe.’**_
---
| **Todd Shepherd** writes this week about the death by suicide of **Andrew Little** at Delaware County’s George W. Hill Correctional Facility — one that might have been prevented. The victim’s mother described how medical privacy laws, however well-intentioned they are, made it impossible for her to keep up with her son’s mental health problems and help get him the treatment he needed. **Malfunctioning locks on the cell doors** may have also prevented guards from being able to get to Little in time to save his life. [Read more at _Broad + Liberty._](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d7bc52af3b&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### _Other Top Stories..._
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=189cf7be02&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Pennsylvania has some of the nation’s more permissive laws about abortion, but Democrats in the state legislature want to make them looser still. **Thomas Sheehan** wrote this week about the politicians who seek — at the behest of abortion clinics — to [remove existing health and safety regulations](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=82c30480a0&e=b7b3eddce2), showing that the support from **the abortion industry takes priority over women’s health** , despite rhetoric claiming otherwise.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=90c9c24703&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
**Guy Ciarrocchi** writes about how [fossil fuels are essential to modern life — and to Pennsylvania’s economy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fffbac32a2&e=b7b3eddce2). Environmentalists who rush to force us into **more expensive energy sources don’t save the planet** , they just force those jobs overseas and make life for the average American worse.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=025c3b1798&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
And finally, _Broad + Liberty_ ’s **Liv DeMarco** took a trip to [the Philadelphia Catstravaganza](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=05865e5994&e=b7b3eddce2) last weekend at the Greater Philadelphia Expo Center to see **cats from across the region** — and the people who love them.
---
|
---
| _**What We’re Reading...**_
---
| Can online conservatives be normal, just for a minute? It doesn’t seem possible, [Ross Douthat wrote this week in his _New York Times_ column](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ef3877994d&e=b7b3eddce2). The otherwise normal celebrity/sports story of **Taylor Swift** and her boyfriend **Travis Kelce** has spawned weirdo delusions on the online right about Pentagon psyops and rigged Super Bowls. It’s a football player dating a pretty singer. Relax!************
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded exclusively by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. As a new election cycle begins, please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject matter, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).
As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5c4a042324b845b5b702aab80e3e0dc1&_e=orlZrlu8-rKw_Ag-Vb3jRTLo64SJJc2g1socmHgd0Onan4h6D2w13MYUVsO0qvg-RLBKmgmQk6IjDZVgznbElqbvKEqi7hZmTuafb8c8AKzKIy2MlknPt1RW105kJoJ55wZxEhJMe6UkKmzY1OZ9nVvl4UHyIc6m7X1NOglDF34-Zr5icnn6cv1DRYlhqRXOBiKmcYHYb_xCQ0LmqsxVM0hNnClBXxIKmLnXyH3_jdqbrQLlejV9TSsuPzSnLMqLfijX_1qgwE6IknEuBjDudbRUneNTn9oz3G4ngfJ5prlweJWKw6V5r3WsR42PZkl06VcN6v7PNcqvw3PVrAIAlzPf4Nfo6dsY_7uvzP7i0-8jFY_L6c2kke3g8Ml1_B3mq1_Sp_WTP-wNe1cftzF0xQHUB2BMAzaQWRzdYwVOHuY%3D)

| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous Americans, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled ["](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5c4a042324b845b5b702aab80e3e0dc1&_e=orlZrlu8-rKw_Ag-Vb3jRTLo64SJJc2g1socmHgd0Onan4h6D2w13MYUVsO0qvg-RLBKmgmQk6IjDZVgznbElqbvKEqi7hZmTuafb8c8AKzKIy2MlknPt1RW105kJoJ55wZxEhJMe6UkKmzY1OZ9nVvl4UHyIc6m7X1NOglDF34-Zr5icnn6cv1DRYlhqRXOBiKmcYHYb_xCQ0LmqsxVM0hNnClBXxIKmLnXyH3_jdqbrQLlejV9TSsuPzSnLMqLfijX_1qgwE6IknEuBjDudeWkAm5Al-UFgThH_PdpaYD_PCO5ymwIMOB_NuARz3CBqAdXjwYUACvvbOxlMTWcKNeRlmywN-0kQbVLVGJTtlCLp-oK-P7xWgEJguHT0s9UKsV2zMmyohI8NCFves92J9Yrr7knpMaVN-jf1yQSbBY%3D)**[The Second World Wars."](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5c4a042324b845b5b702aab80e3e0dc1&_e=orlZrlu8-rKw_Ag-Vb3jRTLo64SJJc2g1socmHgd0Onan4h6D2w13MYUVsO0qvg-RLBKmgmQk6IjDZVgznbElqbvKEqi7hZmTuafb8c8AKzKIy2MlknPt1RW105kJoJ55wZxEhJMe6UkKmzY1OZ9nVvl4UHyIc6m7X1NOglDF34-Zr5icnn6cv1DRYlhqRXOBiKmcYHYb_xCQ0LmqsxVM0hNnClBXxIKmLnXyH3_jdqbrQLlejV9TSsuPzSnLMqLfijX_1qgwE6IknEuBjDudS_jN74olVtjd3HoHlzJErPtjJqDjfVjPGjh8owogH-VkxoIeW2MP4z0i5vWTDmBqQM9Z9MWHzXx_M3zQBe0hgZbmB3RSR_S5BsiqjIKl_NaF7GWShEO5E1DL0F4E7eTBtqm1B6P2AjS9ngOsMzHPX8%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: State Democrats block abortion bans while Republicans attack trans health care … and everything else you need to know in the states.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, February 4th, 2024 | | |
---
|
---
| [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdKfUol6ra6mgPDPO5Av17ebNaTeFBtFQTsC9TJbda1MXvIcYM-bTOhROOxj4eoTw2XqNQqpJA32sLPY3bZ11NKCrCSdQnOHv5zDj9Du8lxsnKeAwXXbeAJ8kdU52Y3rmNfypN5EjhUyPSF1GkEG3JR6hD1TLo17GQWNY8vNjnfKksVjZEJ7hvL-eyuReovyK4ataGOW0ubAVFXHrY8sEPTPH2kDqd1-DKHTzzdd8kYRodq5ATIuchhdmFQWE--EBB79ohVKJE7rWmLs6KSJZSpnK1b21XIvJZ7HvWMEOLNMQEi5qlWYX7oQ75AZNdLGVxOetSlx7HBgELYpa5JVuwSYOj5p8OcAqQwbVmiVL6oY6e9weyblRGh_KObF2vpSTUPgsZcL7yipbeUmg3GSkp1L7oxYbE_cr5m0A107j21iekuMeqkGpIZDr1GW30BOLWs/43k/9c-2YuR5RBWpSnEeQVYC4g/h0/a6ThfE8Yy_ZyPQBdV0hU4D8NAQ1UJptZf2hh_ENVoaY)
---
1️⃣ **_Michigan and Ohio:_ Republican legislators discuss a complete ban on trans health care**
In Michigan and Ohio, several Republican legislators gathered on social media to discuss what they are calling the ‘end-game’ of health care for the trans community. [They hope to ban all access to trans healthcare in the latest horrific attack on the LGBTQ+community → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jeW3EPvbh1Y535OPUYx-PaPqcgQl51YEco1i32ivFZHZKVyfB7dNQ1mmDRfwomK1JZiSIUSx4F7yvtUSH30QVknQwKhrjIl5kr8dddQqJL26WFuSzNzM2I3_KSEF6jE5kgDIBV24TgXlUcfVSC0W2DUE_JHV9Axo_5p3KYQVEgLEPNsNcs6ooSEIG5vOHnUwXUCehtVZ4nWGPTzJ0wg69d0c01vW_6nfC8Amow96rWwWHihQ6ZVXERdCZmE8n9TUayWxhfzyvuuVXMFxB2uBbJIsx7StfAsSMEVtVcvVGnRS9XHbzoovKqEAf1tCNAnKVGFZxeicMMIIVa210FMvg-mIgw_mQ5XytFu1C2pe83gv1-3-R4tsBRaxTs4ol0B_yQY92OUi1iWHn3Pcn0PdCb0nBKkNt0mUg1XWvfXhRJTMHKNrg_4rfXP1jSyH68s4f6eIXkSAgFR00k3vm8lkbUMQKa7NwDRFgiDLVlY3exzZwpHO_JuvKQdsFlX1AaoUoZ2l0PGJIZ5kSUSZ4Wd8TfNYfSuLGmu1V5iF_uVNRa-wagoE27ztfJPSBDFGQkzM8yivcXSt8nYwP84Q2Zj-z2E2OwxfJ6j7TDAOV_K_cNQOTqrjS1elunAkqd_gLoqBVZ4NRdGtIV2KuZjN33TjYzuZNyIQ2MaMpWiDE5Du1vMD/43k/9c-2YuR5RBWpSnEeQVYC4g/h1/CxybHrYAnqI8idLlOnPOz4IwmkPQbcKx1PXckyTCeDU)

2️⃣ **_New Hampshire:_ Democrats block two extreme abortion bans **
In New Hampshire, Democrats came together to defend abortion rights after Republicans introduced two bills that would have effectively banned abortion in the state. name: Pat Harrigan
subject: This wouldn’t fly on the battlefield
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, as a Green Beret, it’s not enough to simply be “competent.” You have to excel in everything you do because the country you love is on the line. _And even though I’m retired from the battlefield, I still take the Green Beret mentality of excellence into everything I do._ It’s a shame our Commander in Chief won’t do the same. The incompetence we’re witnessing from the Biden Administration isn’t just disappointing; it’s downright dangerous. From our open borders to out of control crime, Joe Biden is putting American lives in danger. I was trained to confront challenges head-on, not to retreat or make excuses. That’s the approach I’ll bring to Congress. We need less career politicians and more battle-tested leaders who will prioritize America’s safety and freedom.**I’m running to be that leader.** **[**Will you join my mission today to hold the inept Biden administration accountable and take back our country?**](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=a962a4e9ac3f4f4fbfeb489b4cb67c7e&_e=3kzJOT3c-1SKlvMF1QJJLig2A51x-HvKEVIxA4iD3lt5VLTyHhxugFMK75jcI8EAigJtpUWK4NyJQFFC_TZ3b_EuVvWNGvu5gxyV8q2ymIlMczaxcgBokX1o_L8BUjbzvGTGhRDXEAE4uZnttESizG3Y06DwsOCOnJM6hu5buj9MxwHrtMkxA6BOAHmjEL7ZSY53QT8Oycob-Dqc03mxnYGyQiTbFar4V5Qqe45aMDZAJfmq5qhZPYV9sCoFr4hIQTzKokDzsr43xjPdo3dhlZwP176ygGDJ2kZ_A76Qi3zFoMt8Zs46yUtYOfdOkexL8cwBCwvSNBHrGytiIa3NiMZnoujRL07g0cTmGIqD07yWzPKf4jJeBq-XJI17MdG-AlorhPXTZuqH8WrkunhmaSyJQ1nLVT3IBzVfsom8Jxc%3D)**

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b9948270563147cda3e4141a1ef02ae9&_e=Qw8R-36hjnPtiSvu2DUH4TzKhj4YfDj1oJ6Ih2xLOE9L6IT341Z3quJmfqLjm_5336UCe9nkjX-uKxZLGw4ST-tAXyWCe2QCRArNX6Gjr1HQp0FXf6F65CMgnIr0s6weu5vv5j_jwcxhHdbj4tL4txlXOCV4Mc5dmHsPay7r25sNF1eGT1B7QvE4pXSkzEWGa7HbboEg3jlz6rHYHMur87BBjygICXJeHGpiAPUijb9NVpSvBK6eoVIJWQFrzQGBAIGcvyvb3yFDOTvJjsbDA4ZMtYp_L3fFe0ByeC6AxXMKPpuxQonZgrvC7ZYA9ECWtf8wPwa5D7Qzhw92_OUj_5Rl_bL0av-NJ3nMqw6Y6nVLJEPogjG7i_YzI-cEda3u9x52huUUdr8BqavQcR_RL-1duZQVE-5fZ7ILip5-Rfs%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b9948270563147cda3e4141a1ef02ae9&_e=Qw8R-36hjnPtiSvu2DUH4TzKhj4YfDj1oJ6Ih2xLOE9L6IT341Z3quJmfqLjm_5336UCe9nkjX-uKxZLGw4ST-tAXyWCe2QCRArNX6Gjr1HQp0FXf6F65CMgnIr0s6weu5vv5j_jwcxhHdbj4tL4txlXOCV4Mc5dmHsPay7r25sNF1eGT1B7QvE4pXSkzEWGa7HbboEg3jlz6rHYHMur87BBjygICXJeHGpiAPUijb9NVpSvBK6eoVIJWQFrzQGBAIGcvyvb3yFDOTvJjsbDA2EWzqd3zWeaFShCnhRNoUxHVjDC1Fz15jeQ4YvxbyQQtODeIMKo6rr3aUt3o-kLosNw2CUuIsFY-xDFCYqxcLoOsQRrzeOcmC2mMr56tD50xF3NERQjhlC04LHbYvS8_VSXXTSUZG2c67xqEAr2dzI%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

Peter -- Four years ago, we won the South Carolina Democratic Primary. A number of grassroots supporters donated to my campaign shortly after, and that support laid the foundation for our campaign’s eventual victory against Donald Trump. Last night, we won the South Carolina Democratic Primary once again. And if we want to win again this November, I am going to need your help _today_. clean_body: "It's the lucky person who gets up in the morning, puts both feet on the floor, knows what they are about to do, and thinks it still matters.” | | | Peter -- Four years ago, we won the South Carolina Democratic Primary. A number of grassroots supporters donated to my campaign shortly after, and that support laid the foundation for our campaign’s eventual victory against Donald Trump. Last night, we won the South Carolina Democratic Primary once again. And if we want to win again this November, I am going to need your help today. My dad used to have an expression -- "It's the lucky person who gets up in the morning, puts both feet on the floor, knows what they are about to do, and thinks it still matters.” Your support matters. Your donation matters. Because I cannot win this race alone against Donald Trump, Peter. I need you with me. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I am going to guess you didn't spring out of bed this morning and shout out loud, "Today is the day I am going to make my first contribution to Joe Biden's reelection!" subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=13cade1d8b844186802beefbd77955fb&_e=EOzI9MUfQ7I8foBbJDX-cZipIvyfSa_oZ5uLQtZvsy4PvuEnwHdcaK5BwnEHHi6u3sCrGIxjFmHGtt84yTijWDJBYFCnHZkeSQeUfFgRVaeBMyXJftcVqkyaCOXkONbjDTtzCUwfZJc0OGTRAE6LJVpgzXS6bO8V9SrzgbQWEDpIIPQge6u6sgov_L2Le3_5c9K93SEttFFYDMULjO4wg4IG8M9stIwVZBCkpM-E9DgaHbq9TW3nGEntic4kVMrxOJci8lSfe2aQHO2HYdLv3Z8NjlBf3oIhzGQcxEDegscu1swhr-ep18oKguWlj8Vs4fKoLRm_fk6z7gVSsgtDHWXFGaAEvLjbxqkhInxidNK1KRSG-ymeEoFWpZV9fDMrgSAGGXcvcWZODiKfRK0Mgg%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=13cade1d8b844186802beefbd77955fb&_e=EOzI9MUfQ7I8foBbJDX-cZipIvyfSa_oZ5uLQtZvsy4PvuEnwHdcaK5BwnEHHi6u3sCrGIxjFmHGtt84yTijWDJBYFCnHZkeSQeUfFgRVaeBMyXJftcVqkyaCOXkONbjDTtzCUwfZJc0OGTRAE6LJVpgzXS6bO8V9SrzgbQWEDpIIPQge6u6sgov_L2Le3_5c9K93SEttFFYDMULjO4wg4IG8M9stIwVZBCkpM-E9DgaHbq9TW3nGEntic4kVMrxKjiNprw8P0NBJfpNTCeNS-ufZcBl3fxZv61sivw6gN6vN4tPLIXxsqhLNDRvnnphbLiihztQubh9hti_3tDh5Ud0WJShqKZNxfJIH5b-dpEt7d92nX-uwLfK1ev1_114q-euD4dh1OJTYBWiMY8iFQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=13cade1d8b844186802beefbd77955fb&_e=EOzI9MUfQ7I8foBbJDX-cZipIvyfSa_oZ5uLQtZvsy4PvuEnwHdcaK5BwnEHHi6u3sCrGIxjFmHGtt84yTijWDJBYFCnHZkeSQeUfFgRVaeBMyXJftcVqkyaCOXkONbjDTtzCUwfZJc0OGTRAE6LJVpgzXS6bO8V9SrzgbQWEDpIIPQge6u6sgov_L2Le3_5c9K93SEttFFYDMULjO4wg4IG8M9stIwVZBCkpM-E9DgaHbq9TW3nGEntic4kVMrxk0G58wwfh45jD5dNiIJaDIQr0K1OQ4dNAMmIxKATS4u_zVtu3FFV5D-dkT4DdEKoOWRDT4zpuueAd1VXVvlQ6arnZ2kwmdhCT3iEJ8xSv02mfX4utOkh1ELf3tjS0GXGYaDOIyYQ8Ih9M6sKMbz8ZA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Emergency Message (Border Crisis)
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWgEzOdiNe

Emergency Message (Border Crisis)

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWgEzOdiNe

Fellow Patriot,
This is Stephen Miller with an
emergency message. Today, we are witnessing complete chaos at
Eagle Pass, Texas, as our border is being completely overwhelmed
with an illegal invasion.
This invasion is destruction by
design. The scale of this monstrous scheme by Joe Biden and the
radical left is so astounding as to truly defy description. The
left is doing everything in its power to ensure this resettlement
operation continues apace with devastating and deadly
consequences for our Nation.
Of course, this is why we proudly
partnered with Texas and 20 other states to stop one of the most
prominent of Biden's extreme open borders schemes, the
resettlement of hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants
through "parole." And we have other active lawsuits to stop other
lawless programs. But we must do even more.
Biden and the left have
orchestrated a mass criminal invasion. Our borders are
effectively nonexistent, our cities are flooded, and our families
are afraid. As a Nation, we are humiliated, weakened, and are now
facing long-term societal collapse if this continues…
And just today, we learned that
the Biden Administration is even closing the railway bridges at
El Paso and Eagle Pass, Texas, so that the CBP officers working
there can help transit the massive wave of illegal immigrants
into our country faster. That's right; they're rushing as fast as
they can to obliterate our country from the inside, as the media
can barely continue to keep a lid on this surreal nightmare
exploding onto every single American doorstep.
This is an illegal, nihilistic
rush to transform America into a Marxist cesspool and to end
Western Civilization as we know it. Nothing could be more urgent
for every American tonight than to demand a stop to this madness
right now!
Help Me & America First Legal
Fight Back Right Now >>
We must light a fire of urgency
to save our country tonight. We must recommit our nation to
stopping this madness and saving America, or nothing else will
matter. Please donate now to help us stop the illegal immigration
disaster - thank you >>

DONATE NOW >>

Stephen Miller
President, America First Legal

America First Legal Foundation is
an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation
to America First Legal Foundation is tax-deductible to the extent
allowed by law.

America First Legal Foundation
611 Pennsylvania Avenue, SE |
#231

Washington, DC 20003

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWgEzOdiNe

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.
