name: James Carville
subject: GAME OVER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61295?t=6&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N) James Carville here, folks, and I’m personally reaching out tonight because I’M F&$%ING TERRIFIED.

[**I need to ask you to split an urgent donation between Jon Tester’s campaign and the Voter Protection Project NOW and stop that no-good Mitch McConnell from buying Montana’s Senate seat.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61295?t=7&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N)

Mitch and his super PAC buddies have raised BONKERS amounts of money in the past year to stop Jon by any means necessary. And if they’re successful, Democrats can kiss their majority goodbye. **BOOM: national abortion ban, lower wages, your health care gutted.**

Jon needs your help like, yesterday. Hell, even if you already gave yesterday, he needs you to give again.

Because here’s the deal about this MASSIVE fundraising deadline, folks— _we ain’t there yet._ **And guess what?! ALL donations will help protect the Dem majority. Isn’t that worthwhile?**

[**We need an extra push to get us across that finish line, and I know we can do it together. Split an urgent contribution of $10 (or more if you’re feeling spicy!) between Jon’s campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help reelect Jon and double your impact:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61295?t=8&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61296?t=9&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61297?t=10&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61298?t=11&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61299?t=12&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61300?t=13&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N)
Here’s the deal. If we lose Montana, it’s GAME OVER. Mitch McConnell and his far-right cronies would snatch back Senate control and wreck our country with their extremist agenda. That’s why he’s so focused on beating Jon, and why Sunday’s deadline means EVERYTHING for the campaign.

**Jon Tester is Democrats' only chance to hold this seat and protect our Senate majority. But ONLY with your support.**

[**So click that donate button, put the pedal to the metal, and let’s win this thing for our future, our families, and our country.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61295?t=14&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N)
Thanks, y’all.

—James Carville
[DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61295?t=15&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12796%2E878179%2EzgkN6N) to request fewer emails. body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78374248/453206086/2128632416?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDdlZjU0Ny02YmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7AKKyimB1r8qqz5DJ465We0vaZF7QcIcT5PyXMTLbo=)
Hey friend – it's Stew (Jacky Rosen's campaign manager).
In 90 minutes, I have a budget meeting with Jacky – and just between us, I'm not looking forward to it. Based on our latest fundraising numbers, I have to tell Jacky that we need to make some tough calls on what to cut from our budget plan.
I'm not sounding the alarm just yet. I did the math – and if we can raise $5,169 in the next 90 minutes, we won't have to make any budget cuts. **It's ambitious, but if this grassroots team bands together, I know we can make it happen. **
**[So please, will you chip in $5, $25, or $50 to get us back on track so we can win in Nevada and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78374249/453206087/2128632416?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDdlZjU0Ny02YmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7AKKyimB1r8qqz5DJ465We0vaZF7QcIcT5PyXMTLbo=)**
Thanks so much,

Stew

name: Team Pascrell
subject: "Good trouble"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PASCRELL FOR CONGRESS, Inc
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_email?refcode=wrapper_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_email?refcode=wrapper_hdr]
Friend,

It's Black History Month, and Bill Pascrell has been fighting for racial justice, equality, and progress not just one month out of the year, but his entire career.

For over 20 years, Bill was blessed to serve with one of his personal heroes, Georgia Congressman and civil rights hero John Lewis. Congressman Lewis taught him that growing as a people takes unceasing self-reflection, and that blossoming as a nation is a constant act of regeneration. And it also requires what he calls “good trouble.”

Each day, Black Americans find their lives under threat by the very people and institutions meant to protect them. Millions of Black Americans are rightly angry, frustrated, and tired because of the injustices they face. Racism rears its ugly head in every aspect of our country — health care outcomes, voting rights, pollution exposure, even taxes — Black Americans are three to five times more likely to be audited by the IRS. And our country has seen devastating acts of racially motivated violence. Systematic change is badly needed.

Bill Pascrell knows that ending racial inequality must come from the top. In his lifetime of service, Bill has led his colleagues to urge support for embracing change that will benefit all of us — especially Black Americans. The time for action is now.

As we celebrate the achievements and history of Black Americans this February, will you support Bill's reelection campaign to continue fighting for progress, racial justice, and equality? He's not slowing down in this fight, friend. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_email?refcode=240204_bp_bhm_l1]

SHOW YOUR SUPPORT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_email?refcode=240204_bp_bhm_b1]

Thanks for being part of the fight to end racial inequality, protect voting rights and ensure justice for all.

— Team Pascrell
The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. And Bill Pascrell is our strongest advocate for tax fairness and restoring the state and local tax deduction for our middle-class families.
Will you have Bill's back and chip in today?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_email?refcode=wrpr_footer&refcode2=dd1d129a-70c3-ee11-b660-002248223197]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_email?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=dd1d129a-70c3-ee11-b660-002248223197]

name: Andrew Horne
subject: Horne for Arizona February Update!
body:
Dear Friends,

The campaign to remove David Schweikert continues to be a successful one. The last few months have been a whirlwind of activity as I continue to attend every event possible, connecting with as many members of our community as I can. From canvassing for Dr. Laura Metcalfe, Tim Stringham, Richard Corles, Laura Terech, Christine Marsh, Judy Schwiebert, and Stephanie Simacek to attending other events that are non political in nature. Each event continues to be incredibly valuable.

We're proud to announce that our petition has garnered 4,100 signatures as of today. The Arizona Secretary of State says we need 1,496 signatures to meet the requirement. Thanks to your immense support we are doing fantastic and have a current goal of 5,000 by the end of March.

One highlight from the past week was our presence at Scottsdale's Parada Del Sol. We set up a booth and I spent six hours meeting with residents. Discussing our vision for the community and listening to their concerns. Despite getting a little sunburned, the experience was rewarding as we met an incredible number of supportive families who share our passion for positive change. Also being out in my Hometown means randomly running into friends from high school and even my former teachers!

One initiative that has garnered significant traction is our postcard campaign. Thanks to the support of dedicated volunteers like you, we've seen tremendous success. Yesterday at the Parade many people came up to introduce themselves to me, they had received a postcard and wanted to meet me in person. Over 38 individuals have graciously offered to send postcards on our behalf, resulting in hundreds of heartfelt messages reaching our fellow community members. The impact of these postcards cannot be overstated; they serve as a tangible expression of our shared values and aspirations, fostering meaningful connections within our community.

On a personal note, I'm incredibly proud to share that today marks the final performance of "Seussical the Musical" in Cave Creek, featuring Eleanor. The Desert Desert Foothills Theater production did 6 shows over the last 4 days. It was amazing, at the same time exhausting for Eleanor to add onto her normal School activities and her mother and I with rehearsals the final week ending at 7:30pm.

As we continue the campaign journey together, it's essential to continue addressing the core issues that matter most to our community. Education, Gun safety, and women's rights are not just talking points; they are deeply ingrained values that drive my dedication to enacting positive change.

In the spirit of collective action, I invite you to join us in furthering our campaign efforts through various volunteer opportunities:

**Postcard Campaign:** Join us for a postcard party! Together, we can craft personalized messages to friends and neighbors, amplifying our campaign's message in a meaningful and impactful way.

**Social Media Engagement** : Are you passionate about social media? Your support in sharing our campaign's message online can help us reach a broader audience and foster community engagement.

**Door-to-Door Canvassing:** For those who prefer face-to-face interactions, door-to-door canvassing provides an excellent opportunity to directly engage with voters in our district.

**Phone Banking:** Join our phone banking team to connect with voters and address any concerns they may have, one conversation at a time.

**Neighborhood Meet and Greet:** Host a neighborhood meet and greet to create a space for community members to come together, share their thoughts, and learn more about our campaign.

Your involvement is pivotal to the success of our campaign, and I encourage you to choose the opportunity that resonates most with your interests and comfort level. If you have other ideas or suggestions, please don't hesitate to reach out – your input is invaluable.

As we embark on another busy month, let's remember that **together** , we can create meaningful change that uplifts every resident of our district.

I am here for you. Call, email, or let's meet up in person. Your thoughts and ideas are always welcome and deeply appreciated.

Thank you,

Andrew Horne
480-256-9332[](http://voice.google.com/calls?a=nc,%2B14802569332 "Call +1 480-256-9332 via Google Voice")[](http://voice.google.com/calls?a=nc,%2B14802569332 "Call +1 480-256-9332 via Google Voice")
[www.HorneForArizona.com](http://www.HorneForArizona.com)

PS: Here are Dan Lampman and I out in Old Town after canvassing

1st Day of the 2024 Session at the State Capitol

Thank you,

Andrew Horne
480-256-9332[](http://voice.google.com/calls?a=nc,%2B14802569332 "Call +1 480-256-9332 via Google Voice")
[www.HorneForArizona.com](http://www.HorneForArizona.com)

name: Tammy Murphy
subject: Let me tell you the story of a soda fountain in the segregated South.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate**
body:
Systemic racism lives on, and we all have a role to play in fighting back against it. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78380312/453218812/1354111473?refcode=AU_TMNJ_CL_GEN_GEN_NO_20240204_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTc4MmQ4OTQtNzFjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bQi5j3Y2oLA4mlNAhrMiO8pV-DyBi7sqkbS7vR1ROfg=)
---
Hi everyone, As we celebrate Black History Month, I want to tell you the story of a soda fountain in the segregated South before 1964. **At that time, barely fifty years ago, Black customers weren’t even allowed to sit in the same seats as white customers.** Thanks to heroes like Dr. King and Fannie Lou Hamer, change was slowly spreading across America. But change hadn’t yet come to many small southern towns. Even the seats at the soda fountain were still segregated — until one worker decided he was tired of waiting for that to change. He thought that if his Black customers weren’t allowed to sit, then nobody should be, and he removed every single seat in that shop. **Until everyone could sit as equals, they’d all just have to stand.** The man who removed those seats was my Dad, and I think about what he did often. Dad believed we all have a role to play in making change for the benefit of all, and by removing those seats, he found a common-sense solution to address an injustice. Fifty years later, we’ve come a long way from the days of segregation, but we have a long way to go still. **Systemic racism lives on, and we all have a role to play in fighting back against it.** It’s why I made combating racial disparities in maternal and infant health the key issue of my time as First Lady, and it’s driving my campaign for the U.S. Senate today. This month, let’s celebrate men and women like Dr. King, Fannie Lou Hamer, John Lewis, and so many more, who have helped us come so far. But let’s not stop there. **Let’s ask ourselves what small things we can do to make our communities fairer and safer for everyone.** For my Dad, it was removing the seats at the segregated soda fountain. What will it be for you? Together,
Tammy Murphy
* * *
Tammy Murphy for Senate
PO Box 378
Maplewood, NJ 07040
United States **[info@tammymurphyforsenate.com](mailto:info@tammymurphyforsenate.com) ** | **Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate**
---
**This email was sent to**dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/y_454ezNwkiBGueG09CeTA2?unsubscribedata=60hrxXRfwUxgujjWo7tr48y084UX08eaD4pY9uYc9QwohKddtbXsKcNcOHJjZZSDwHMGJ%2BV1unLdDuNBx3YBov7%2Bwc97FlLJrWGvmBZ8xkKFYK%2BBP7AcRj%2BWT6v4GMvM7rXv18tqlqbHBNPEZf2QfkQ9IaLj6mPNo01Apr%2B23twhOXy9HhpCoe%2Fcqj%2F61s%2BImVNa4whrm3PHNCiV0KFnxdFlnIRJTi3rHNs6UBc4sZ8khTb5YT5TnQy0kvfDSU9vP99M62wf%2BrDxIVIdIGzGqienvG%2Bxc4mOPGn4Rjaf%2F9PRWYM3wSkMawUoz9ryw0MxXKm%2BanYp0giX6Cvau4oGnaSa%2BZm3ZwqFjLEWFXt83iyomalCPkG4ko01HhnmRoOpWVcdd%2FWOKmOskX4ttcXe3nlXuB7A%2F480yhzWVEo2B1683hOkHV%2FHoLyXEVeLAPsF)**

name: Victor at United We Dream Action
subject: Catch us on twitch 👾
body:
How we’re combating disinformation online → | | | Peter, It’s no secret that the Latinx community has been the target of online disinformation campaigns for years. From misleading ads on Facebook to conspiracy theory threads circulating on WhatsApp, dangerous anti-immigrant narratives have been inflamed by exploitative actors targeting our community — all for political gain. As Latinx voters have become a demographic that can sway elections, we see the weaponization of disinformation to prevent Latinx communities from exercising their right to vote or learning the truth about anti-immigrant candidates. **We’re intervening by better engaging Latinx audiences and showing up in the spaces where they already are — like Twitch! Our Digital Director, Rodrigo, even joined a stream last week to talk about the work UWDA is doing to combat disinformation online and target key audiences ahead of November’s elections!** But it’s going to take a team effort to root out harmful disinformation and overcome the bad actors who seek to spread false, divisive narratives about immigrants and tear our communities apart. **Will you make a donation to power United We Dream Action’s work to combat disinformation?** ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8CA2pY4uncE7zfQhClcdvc8j3n76NhVe2KXBWn58KObnFHwziqf8AtYPaNI0PNQPNXWXRWZPXSFBf_dvcdt9sSfIlDO_2lRo7wC0gh3wPGemEsliPNDwRQP4NYQy0TPgVWjSXtpycaKxlzQKn8R2D0i7RiknzxZyKWPZ1Km9FLuSxCJP9LkhEbLbtH5V8C3a7X7pdMdAh2AiGlD5q202V0o518tZGAizKxjTcxThjWvDJ8Rx4Mfs3EJY-whocH5uSy1gUGVUh6GbKUB0pHrwlyHpT_LmONgskdWBWV3NuWrrympCbDQIgcGG-5mIrbJCHw5bfggtXT5pVBsASn5Tht_yFD352ie4Wwvo4fAUsHUkHfXOjXW30P_Lw9wog4ITEsMfkLDl9mMO7u7v55xPERw/43k/_pp8Ud00TEG2J8ppiJhuvQ/h0/gLV9ednZzTR9DjVS7lI66rOX9LL4Lx49DM-AYTnHWMI)

clean_body: How we’re combating disinformation online → | | | Peter, It’s no secret that the Latinx community has been the target of online disinformation campaigns for years. From misleading ads on Facebook to conspiracy theory threads circulating on WhatsApp, dangerous anti-immigrant narratives have been inflamed by exploitative actors targeting our community — all for political gain. As Latinx voters have become a demographic that can sway elections, we see the weaponization of disinformation to prevent Latinx communities from exercising their right to vote or learning the truth about anti-immigrant candidates. We’re intervening by better engaging Latinx audiences and showing up in the spaces where they already are — like Twitch! Our Digital Director, Rodrigo, even joined a stream last week to talk about the work UWDA is doing to combat disinformation online and target key audiences ahead of November’s elections! But it’s going to take a team effort to root out harmful disinformation and overcome the bad actors who seek to spread false, divisive narratives about immigrants and tear our communities apart. Will you make a donation to power United We Dream Action’s work to combat disinformation? ****If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for supporting our work, Victor, United We Dream Action

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: The orange guy turned red.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Trump’s pretty mad that we called him out for disparaging Americans who gave the ultimate sacrifice.
#
Derek,
Trump’s pretty mad that we called him out for disparaging Americans who gave the ultimate sacrifice.
He could’ve avoided all this though. Good start would have been to avoid calling them “suckers” and “losers.”
Trump and his campaign don’t want you to know he said that.
He’d be absolutely furious if more people knew that he was so confused by the idea that Americans would volunteer to serve their country that he asked, “What was in it for them?”
He’d absolutely hate it if more people found out that he said that appearing alongside wounded American soldiers “doesn't look good” for him.
But that’s absolutely what we’re going to do. He’s scared because it’s absolutely terrible for him. But the American people deserve to know what he thinks of the men and women who serve in uniform.
That’s why we made our latest video: Red.
**[WATCH IT HERE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-feb24-red.vFIzUD&refcode=em240204-1-NOR&t=1&akid=24875%2E3013755%2EWu_XOd)**

We’ll cut right to the chase, Peter: A recent poll shows this race tightening.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240204-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240204-1&refcode2=1893_552475_H8GfGT&akid=1893%2E552475%2EH8GfGT)

This worries us for a few reasons.
First, national Republicans are going to see this poll and zero in on Pennsylvania. Bob Casey’s mega-millionaire opponent already has the backing of the entire GOP war chest, and this news will invite even more dark money into this race.
Second, political experts predict that Pennsylvania could decide control of the Senate and the White House. With everything from the fate of our democracy to reproductive rights at risk, we can’t afford to fall behind.

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

subject: What protein does to osteoarthritis in seniors

name: Letitia James
subject: Taking a look back this Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
I wanted to take stock of how far our fight for equality has come – and the obstacles we still face.
| | |
---
| | _Peter, I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black woman elected to statewide office in New York. Now, in honor of Black History Month, I’m asking you to make a donation so I can continue my fight for the voiceless and the vulnerable through the critical election year ahead._
---
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78388631/453238060/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1327-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzFjYjA1OC03YmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WeQHK-B2gPGYlV1PpojQqIJ-pYrHcUkCnghTUgZVRFU=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78388635/453238062/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1327-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzFjYjA1OC03YmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WeQHK-B2gPGYlV1PpojQqIJ-pYrHcUkCnghTUgZVRFU=)
Peter, this Black History Month, I wanted to take stock of how far our fight for equality has come – and the obstacles we still face.

For generations, New York was controlled by politicians who were overwhelmingly white, male, and wealthy. These politicians remained loyal to their special interests and ignored families that looked like mine and neighborhoods as diverse as my own. And, like so many other Black Americans before me, I grew up feeling voiceless and powerless.
**When I made history and became the first Black lawmaker ___ever_ elected to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to fight every day to ensure that _no_ one would feel as voiceless and powerless as I once did.** And in the years since, I'm proud to say that we've made _real_ progress toward this goal.

But our work for equality is far from over. Because still, in 2024, Black Americans are _14 times more likely_ to be wounded by gun violence than white Americans, Black trans women are **_killed at disproportionately high rates_** , Black women are almost three times **_more likely to die_** in pregnancy or postpartum, and with Election Day just a few months away, Black Americans are still facing **_Jim Crow-esque barriers to voting._**
Peter, you have my word that I will keep fighting for racial equality and justice for as long as it takes – but I truly hope you'll stand by my side.

Right now, I’m up against some of the most powerful and corrupt forces in our nation that want to block our progress, so please: [**Will you chip in $5 or more today so I can continue to fight for justice, equality, and hope?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78388641/453238073/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk1327-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzFjYjA1OC03YmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WeQHK-B2gPGYlV1PpojQqIJ-pYrHcUkCnghTUgZVRFU=)** **
Thank you for taking a moment to mark this critical month with me.

Letitia
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78388643/453238102/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1327-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzFjYjA1OC03YmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WeQHK-B2gPGYlV1PpojQqIJ-pYrHcUkCnghTUgZVRFU=)
---

name: Katie Porter
subject: What do you get for $4.2 billion?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37283%2E3422442%2EKdvBps)
Derek,
When I say big corporations and their lobbyists have too much power in Washington, this is what I mean:
* Interest groups spent a record **$4.2 billion** lobbying federal lawmakers in 2023 alone.
* Health companies outspent every other sector in 2023 with federal lobbying spending reaching**$739 million** for the year.
* The oil company Chevron—just one company—spent more than**$6 million** on federal lobbying in 2023.

I’m the only candidate in this race who doesn’t take federal lobbyist money, and just one of eleven Members of Congress who has taken that pledge. Washington is too beholden to corporate cash, and it’s time to ban federal lobbyist money once and for all.
[**If you’re with us, can you pitch in today to help send me to the U.S. Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240204-1?refcode=em20240204-37283&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37283_3422442_KdvBps&akid=37283%2E3422442%2EKdvBps)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240204-1?refcode=em20240204-37283&refcode2=37283_3422442_KdvBps&akid=37283%2E3422442%2EKdvBps)
Appreciate you being part of our fight.
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240204-37283&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37283_3422442_KdvBps&akid=37283%2E3422442%2EKdvBps)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=37283%2E3422442%2EKdvBps)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=37283%2E3422442%2EKdvBps)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

name: Jon Hamm
subject: Josh Hawley abandoned my home state.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Will you join me in supporting my friend Lucas Kunce today?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43306?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs)
Hey Peter, it’s Jon Hamm, born-and-raised Missourian.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $10 or whatever you can afford toward my friend Lucas Kunce’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Missouri.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43306?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs) But first, please give me a moment to explain what my home state is up against in this election and why I’m supporting Lucas.**
**[CHIP IN TO SUPPORT LUCAS KUNCE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43306?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs)**
Most of my family is from a town called Ste. Genevieve. I’ve watched their community go downhill for years.
While corrupt politicians shipped jobs overseas and voted to give handouts to Wall Street and their corporate allies, everyday people just trying to survive in the place they call home ran out of money and opportunities.
**Our leaders abandoned them — and Josh Hawley is the perfect example.**
Instead of fighting for what would make the communities in my home state stronger, Josh Hawley has been busy engaging in out-of-touch culture wars and selling us his book all about “manhood” — telling the whole world that the only way to be a man is to be exactly like him.
Well... when I think about manhood, I think about courage. And that’s not something you can give speeches or write a book about.
Missouri is the Show Me State. Courage is something you have to show us.
**That’s why I’m supporting Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.** As a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marines to serve the community that took care of him growing up, Lucas has already shown us that he knows the true meaning of courage.
Lucas knows courage is about standing up to the powerful and working to rebuild our state. And he knows real leaders fight to empower everyday people and secure our future for generations to come — not for their own power or profit.
**So Peter, if you want to be told about manhood, some guy wrote a book about it.[But if you want someone to show you real courage, please join me in supporting Lucas Kunce’s campaign for U.S. Senate by chipping in $10 or whatever you can afford today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43306?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43307?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43307?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43307?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43307?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43307?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43307?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43306?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs)
---
**Lucas has been working hard to put Missouri’s Senate race on the map in 2024.** From calling out Josh Hawley’s blatant corruption to building a coalition of working people, national organizations, and local leaders — he is Democrats’ best chance to defeat a GOP incumbent and flip a U.S. Senate seat this election cycle.
He’s building a truly grassroots campaign, without a cent from corporate PACs, to defeat Hawley and take back power for everyday working Missourians — just like my friends and family members all across the state.
**It has never been more important to elect a warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate.[So Peter, will you join me in supporting Lucas’ campaign by chipping in $10 or whatever you can afford today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43306?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs)**
**[CHIP IN TO SUPPORT LUCAS KUNCE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43306?refcode=em20240204-4741&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs)**
Thanks for standing with me,
Jon Hamm

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240204-4741-footer&t=14&refcode2=4741_614464_giBkNs&akid=4741%2E614464%2EgiBkNs)**

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Trump's Anti-Abortion Plan for His Next Term
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1103%2E135344%2Eh8ic8w)

Friends,
With everything in the news, we wanted to be sure you didn’t miss this important article from this week:
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240204-1-600&t=2&akid=1103%2E135344%2Eh8ic8w)
We’ve said all along that this election will have massive stakes for abortion access, but it’s hard to sort out what the GOP plan is. Long story short, Trump and his allies have built out a 887-page plan to commandeer the federal government to conservative ends, with a heavy emphasis on limiting abortion access—including in states like Michigan.
This is the point: Even though Michigan voted overwhelmingly to protect abortion access in 2022, a second Trump administration is working on ways to overrule the voters and limit our access to abortion, even for victims of rape or incest.
This blueprint, which you can read [**HERE,**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/2171?t=3&akid=1103%2E135344%2Eh8ic8w) includes preventing clinics that receive federal funds from telling patients about their abortion options, making it more difficult for military members to travel across state lines to access care, and using the Federal Trade Commission to prosecute online clinics who dispense abortion pills.
Trump has always told us very openly what he plans to do before he does it. This plan to further clamp down on abortion access is a cornerstone of his campaign — and there’s not a Republican candidate we’ve seen who has the guts to contradict him on pretty much anything, including on abortion.
This makes holding the Senate even more important. We’ve also said all along that the road to the White House runs through Michigan, and public polling finds incredibly tight elections in our race and in the presidential race. We’re building out an infrastructure to talk—and listen—to voters all across the state, as soon as possible and as frequently as possible.
[**Will you chip in $3 today to help us protect abortion access in Michigan and across the country?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240204-1-600&t=4&akid=1103%2E135344%2Eh8ic8w)**

Republicans are turning up the heat with MILLIONS to attack Jon Tester.

**Unacceptable news from the MAGA army: Donald Trump is making Jon Tester's Montana Senate seat a prime target to flip RED! 😯**
**The Republican machine has already put a staggering $50 million into TV ads to support their chosen candidate in Montana.** This is a massive push, and it clearly shows that they're aiming to tip the scales in their favor. We cannot let this happen.
Montana's race is not just about one seat; it's about the future of our Senate majority and the values we stand for. Think about what's at stake here: our rights, our progress, our very democracy. We cannot afford to let Trump and his allies gain more ground.
[_**That's why we're reaching out to you today. Every contribution, no matter how small, can make a huge difference. clean_body: Why this matters. | = | = Hey friends, it’s Democrat Josh Harder. This year I’m running in one of California’s most competitive seats in the Central Valley, and our March 5th primary is coming up quickly. Because of our “top 2” primary system, I’ll be on the ballot head-to-head against my GOP opponent for the first time. Ballots are dropping in the mail tomorrow — and that means we have to talk with voters ASAP. = = = = = = I can’t stress enough how important California is this year to helping Democrats take back the majority in Congress. With seven competitive seats up for grabs in California, we have the opportunity to take back the House from MAGA extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene by winning back enough seats in California alone! But none of this can happen if we lose my competitive seat. That’s why Republicans are already spending more than five figures on attacks against me. They know my seat is crucial to flipping the House blue in 2024. On March 5th, I’ll be on the ballot head-to-head against my GOP opponent for the first time. I need your help to make sure we have the resources to get out the vote and win this competitive race. So, please split the biggest amount you can right now between my campaign and the California Democratic Party. It will put us one step closer to protecting this seat and winning back the House in 2024. Here is a link: = Thank you, friends. \- Josh Harder | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. body:

# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5345%2E5257348%2EiCaeYV)
Hi Derek,
With early voting kicking off soon in the California primary, the race for the U.S. Senate is ramping up:
**_Here’s the situation_ :** After scanning through all the available voting data, our organizing team pinpointed 1,780,042 texts to send and 180,056 phones to call — and reaching these voters is crucial to Adam advancing to the general election.
**_Here’s the solution_ :** We're launching an additional push to invest more where these voters are across California. This includes training more volunteers, ordering last-minute supplies like yard signs and clipboards, running targeted persuasion ads, and reaching out to undecided voters before Republicans do.
California is the most populous state in the country, which means we’ll need more donations to meet our ambitious get-out-the-vote drive and make sure folks cast their ballot for Adam.
**[If everyone reading this email pitched in just $10 today, we would hit our pre-early vote fundraising goal and have enough resources to send Adam to the U.S. Senate >>](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240204_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=5345%2E5257348%2EiCaeYV)**

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Speaker Mike Johnson: SPECIAL ELECTION MEMO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi for Congress
body:
This is everything you need to know right now

| |
---
| | | **FROM THE DESK _OF_ SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON**
Friend,

This is Speaker Mike Johnson, and I apologize if I'm catching you at a bad time, but I wanted to quickly connect with you on the NY-03 Special Election happening in a matter of days.

As you may already know, our GOP candidate is Mazi Pilip.

She was born in Ethiopia during a time of intense antisemitism, and was then evacuated to Israel. She went on to become a soldier in the IDF before coming to America the right and legal way.

Mazi is pro-family, pro-law enforcement, and pro-border security -- she has my complete and total endorsement.

But what she doesn't have is a rolodex filled with Hollywood billionaires and Wall Street bigwigs cutting big checks like her left-wing opponent does.

And that's why I'm reaching out to you today.

I'm doing everything I can to support Mazi and keep this seat red. I have to -- _**our House Majority depends on it.**_

I've contributed to her, I've asked Republican members of Congress to contribute to her, and now I'm asking you.

So if you can, and only if you can, please join me in supporting Mazi today.

---
| | [SUPPORT MAZI PILIP](http://links.libertysociety.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1070287941354e4281ee50330c122b74&_e=iPafnsuKnIVEob-9lq1CId3Lk-kzqoqGTql7KuWqZGbojq5Q1f4fxbHVtlkDn27siDCKt29DP-VmP7How24ngd7CicEnTDKYxCoV-ZOStGXQ_IRMgg2HxCtgRUfwx9-MpaHa-dNf2PzUJjruLfJHafPXmPy9XOcJ-jrMl2YiaPKZCPvcr4ZV0Olj0oeBXeuI1uBEyJuDSu5BgFxQvg9bDUm5EQRalp9ZlKisVwR7OWK_jtNa64qBzDpVMhk5V2UnN6fnf4-2RFP1MREhhX_zYiPNH1E-TUQr9XmElLH6wmbPUGqiSFkNT3M94t7An7ydh9qVg5v9Sn2dvpCqiuPlXuni65mGvFX598_gs8kSriHFe4PjqMDe1IkoRrDiD5WXVzMxcRKuRdaFwtOO1AYaC6lQvWX0eo-Mc6w-AqHQ_9TRPsITdV3fUupMTVWpE39G)

I hope I can count on you to step up and help today.

Thanks again,
Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

Just last month, the Texas Supreme Court told a pregnant Dallas mother of two that she wasn’t close enough to death or infertility to qualify for the state’s medical exception. Really? _**Because her DOCTOR thought she was.**_
This November, three extremist justices on the TX Supreme Court – Jimmy Blacklock, John Devine, and Jane Bland – are up for reelection. name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: Impeachment NEXT WEEK? 🔥
body:
This vote could be happening in a matter of days. |
---
| | Peter, this past week Republicans voted to send articles of impeachment against Biden's Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas to the floor of Congress.

**_This news came the same day that a group of illegal immigrants assaulted two New York police officers and were released without bail!_**

We have good, legitimate people patiently waiting in line to come into our country LEGALLY while Mayorkas, Biden and Democrats hand a free pass to these thugs??
---
|
---
| I called on Congress to impeach Mayorkas months ago and I want to be clear:****_**I would absolutely vote for these impeachment articles without hesitation.**_

Anyone who so flagrantly prioritizes the Far Left's Open Borders agenda over our country's security _**can't be allowed to stay in office.**_** **

We have to put America First.
---
| [ENDORSE MAX](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=a0c1b76132&e=86e91e802d "ENDORSE MAX")
---
| **Here's what scares me though: Washington Democrats - including our own radical liberal Congresswoman Katie Porter - will vote to protect Mayorkas!!**

They are content to sit around and do nothing while Joe Biden lets millions of illegal immigrants break our laws and enter our country!

It's truly twisted and sickening that our leaders would allow this to happen.

**That's why we absolutely have to win this Election.**

[**> >> If you're with me on this, please ADD YOUR NAME and endorse my campaign for Congress today. **](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=c8b46925a6&e=86e91e802d)

Securing our border is my top priority. I even visited the border myself to learn how we can fix it. If we don't have a border, we don't have a country.

**I will be more than a Republican vote for border security in Congress. I will be a FIGHTER for it. **I will work with anyone in Washington who believes, like I do, that we have to secure our border by any means necessary.

We have to start putting America First. That requires bold leadership.

I hope I can earn your support and your vote,

\- Max Ukropina
---
| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=55b602b7c9&e=86e91e802d)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: End U.S. complicity in genocide:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Palestinians deserve to live. Palestinian children deserve to grow old. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvV-a1KRcVn5bVy5JarE1VCZ3jytJSNlu1WNeIFc1UbNU1R8WI75L3FWzvPzykC1Q-cXE3FF1AVNY4zjjgaGvuM9DBSZpyggOXef7dTQ6E6TTYBtxYgqeh4WKKRJUPfOESE7hmKW98k2v-I8JIiaGsqYAN3cZd1GWY1Mn086FYCto/43k/o81wcRj5QcaNiwOAQidh0Q/h0/K7OEbvvlep8xVcyIoZZB16y8xj2DkoqRetYbqD9G7bM)
---
Friend, The UN’s International Court of Justice just ruled that Israel’s government is plausibly committing genocide against Palestinians in Gaza. In announcing their ruling, judges quoted statements from Israel’s own political leaders indicating clear genocidal intent to “eliminate” and “erase” Palestinians. The Court ordered Israel’s government to immediately prevent genocide and stop the killing. As signers of the Genocide Convention, the U.S. is also legally obligated to prevent genocide, so this ruling puts U.S. leaders on notice. [**Sign now to President Biden: Comply with the International Court of Justice’s ruling by facilitating an immediate ceasefire and suspending military assistance to the Israeli government.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk9RGLvDE6XLiOF4lGDQyeW-M-cokx4997b645Kxkgd8ZzP7BJcQaWtbq2xUSOalPTVfsBgiQ40tzAmOC91pcwCqXiccTON0WisCSyMqFPBSJND4Dd78gThlKWPO5rVpdUSpMm-AAHzCDZ3aCQbawrz24w6qnqPv7Jslei1yQjRdPMifJsX7M5DSycVcbwe7zXDYwzPlgvOg9-sOqou47aNuVvYxG-tUOCUPsGzO3rXzFki8PIERzDwxxMJYkqQqNCwxrko7gBJzk5oHSIBayBYO3a-xFctdD6rndcVnW8I1IS21uO6YjWRrft5mXZFc_wticqjwE8gvr37UV_CivgZKktF1wSSvi1cpkN5-7ElTMYGvGxuukKePmRFARzj_6wsM2u8eY0xq1sfR_2e5kIIWXj_fb2pEDhkEyFJY3jZf-mT3Sgw8ixlTaAphmbVtXCH7qeOGXb7cVqGwK8kWklLk409HtnXd01JVfuSnLkW9z_H3uzXZvuJ5y7butFCrukfxiK74ofJ6srRwqdHmZ9H/43k/o81wcRj5QcaNiwOAQidh0Q/h1/laaQ0-XKu6CwDwr33za5IF1e6gyXPV0qNenwDsbnFvs) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk9RGLvDE6XLiOF4lGDQyeW-M-cokx4997b645Kxkgd8ZzP7BJcQaWtbq2xUSOalPTVfsBgiQ40tzAmOC91pcwCqXiccTON0WisCSyMqFPBSJND4Dd78gThlKWPO5rVpdUSpMm-AAHzCDZ3aCQbawrz24w6qnqPv7Jslei1yQjRdPMifJsX7M5DSycVcbwe7zXDYwzPlgvOg9-sOqou47aNuVvYxG-tUOCUPsGzO3rXzFki8PIERzDwxxMJYkqQqNCwxrko7gBJzk5oHSIBayBYO3a-xFctdD6rndcVnW8I1IS21uO6YjWRrft5mXZFc_x2AzNoQkhPxRTt_sUxG94IUSAgzzYhMsRVKAxW-jN-xtMPh2tzmPDmaCrVGvZ0NgNAPnQkX_27W7qvAnDS2SZuAObEh-2TyVga3QLyaC8PXk4hRtBhtBhlYmy-G9FcKESQrdD9_3rkuxTigL5o_ztBAsnnGq6OjKBI8xgRi6NmQaTT29L7DDA2FHrm4tbqZmHCCa-MGkeBX3dKxFFFJrNh/43k/o81wcRj5QcaNiwOAQidh0Q/h2/eBfTMuToY3UnYtDL3ScoSNpbyVMM2i77NVplo9Kr9mA)

With U.S. diplomatic and financial support, as well as U.S. weapons, Israel’s government has displaced 2 million Palestinians and killed more than 27,000, including at least 10,000 children.
**We must keep demanding an end to this destruction. We must keep affirming that Palestinians deserve to live and that Palestinian children deserve to grow old.**
Last month, Israeli forces killed 17-year-old U.S. citizen Tawfiq in the West Bank. At his New Orleans funeral, his father spoke out against U.S. tax dollars going to the Israeli military, crying out: “How many fathers and mothers have to say goodbye to their children? How many more?”
U.S. leaders have leverage to stop this now, as primary funders of Israel’s military. Millions of lives still hang in the balance.
[**Add your name to tell President Biden: End U.S. complicity in this genocide. Stop funding and arming Israel’s military, and facilitate an immediate and lasting ceasefire.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk9RGLvDE6XLiOF4lGDQyeW-M-cokx4997b645Kxkgd8ZzP7BJcQaWtbq2xUSOalPTVfsBgiQ40tzAmOC91pcwCqXiccTON0WisCSyMqFPBSJND4Dd78gThlKWPO5rVpdUSpMm-AAHzCDZ3aCQbawrz24w6qnqPv7Jslei1yQjRdPMifJsX7M5DSycVcbwe7zXDYwzPlgvOg9-sOqou47aNuVvYxG-tUOCUPsGzO3rXzFki8PIERzDwxxMJYkqQqNCwxrko7gBJzk5oHSIBayBYO3a-xFctdD6rndcVnW8I1IS21uO6YjWRrft5mXZFc_w3CVOoSQUgn4RXSxvdGA7sr7HxgDzS1AKrRYdJSGfHBcFNP4GnJro29DA8AEmnGaip19WaLIjagad1wP7RTzRjtT2tKMg7mzSGpLmPTZvOIbNSJZ2GBOloYLY-TD6ke9P-6xfd206ATVobCttEX3BMWHYUT1eJkQdxZLCGEtVOwVmVY5UJmLqCwkm8HjcNsf5x4y6_iSK1VtQN04atUrsK/43k/o81wcRj5QcaNiwOAQidh0Q/h3/-YBiOs7aOev4peAh3GLTwCRl-wS1QrvP5KGthD6hYls)
Thank you for demanding action today.
In solidarity,
Rashida

In announcing their ruling, judges quoted statements from Israel’s own political leaders indicating clear genocidal intent to “eliminate” and “erase” Palestinians. The Court ordered Israel’s government to immediately prevent genocide and stop the killing. We must keep demanding an end to this destruction. We must keep affirming that Palestinians deserve to live and that Palestinian children deserve to grow old. Last month, Israeli forces killed 17-year-old U.S. citizen Tawfiq in the West Bank. At his New Orleans funeral, his father spoke out against U.S. tax dollars going to the Israeli military, crying out: “How many fathers and mothers have to say goodbye to their children? subject: 40 FBI Informants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e3dbe96ff1a240b7b1bcb08b49c47810&_e=RiEXkGrXCwLkCcjTmuoEf_5-kJG-0kY0J_vlGXqG0zs2jZamKWOKtaFhTkEdLvbm4cNbaNrcVnnMS3mkaVw5WX3fbdjknUXt8u9E_8YZyXGOVnkxb8yaiLfbVyQ_WO_kRf08_udcoUxCPlYI1g3jsYZQHVQbg2rb9lsLG--XP0YkXj_4xJ5XIFVIjMcxn2B62Q6fqEgmA-Y_qmUSlals9VGMCGCCYItQsjDL0sWPSsyBucxWXJyOApxhQDovBZVlD1CivrDOtkjQE_YmccEpX05FZdh3-4OSt3NWA1Ubeaqwpg_rWgLBCPnB6Tj_L0fJBdwNtrHAhp-eZVVsl-bJyscJOzUznH_BQQyKf7kw1Qnj40VeQMyvTRmbYVEKJCLl)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e3dbe96ff1a240b7b1bcb08b49c47810&_e=RiEXkGrXCwLkCcjTmuoEf_5-kJG-0kY0J_vlGXqG0zs2jZamKWOKtaFhTkEdLvbm4cNbaNrcVnnMS3mkaVw5WX3fbdjknUXt8u9E_8YZyXGOVnkxb8yaiLfbVyQ_WO_kRf08_udcoUxCPlYI1g3jsYZQHVQbg2rb9lsLG--XP0YkXj_4xJ5XIFVIjMcxn2B62Q6fqEgmA-Y_qmUSlals9VGMCGCCYItQsjDL0sWPSsx0QWct7ZUB2osDHqoSH2BXpe3rqHYUg1VtaRaTtqzI-g3DOK0bE5XdzAHao6_J_fFnQg_B8y0gTriMD-TYO0UE1zGPKnXTkfoKsbvxTg2QZmFna5RlwarpeUxUPKLRtyKISL2lMYoHB-kHmYzUTTMe)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e3dbe96ff1a240b7b1bcb08b49c47810&_e=RiEXkGrXCwLkCcjTmuoEf_5-kJG-0kY0J_vlGXqG0zs2jZamKWOKtaFhTkEdLvbm4cNbaNrcVnnMS3mkaVw5WX3fbdjknUXt8u9E_8YZyXGOVnkxb8yaiLfbVyQ_WO_kRf08_udcoUxCPlYI1g3jsYZQHVQbg2rb9lsLG--XP0YkXj_4xJ5XIFVIjMcxn2B62Q6fqEgmA-Y_qmUSlals9VGMCGCCYItQsjDL0sWPSswdMH9Z9l4eOBsh7nw2IBg1Kzdsk5Z0VhRyxAsg3wl6-4rTYZjXjOp1KEV4U9xTaEHT1wX0EnYH0OP3jGCPLmO2qd2Y3erUcO0P39T2m-T7PyTXkLyhYJSIvN_d5pn9dOvYQIGCw7G7U5SnqAeUkuTg)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e3dbe96ff1a240b7b1bcb08b49c47810&_e=RiEXkGrXCwLkCcjTmuoEf_5-kJG-0kY0J_vlGXqG0zs2jZamKWOKtaFhTkEdLvbm4cNbaNrcVnnMS3mkaVw5WX3fbdjknUXt8u9E_8YZyXGOVnkxb8yaiLfbVyQ_WO_kRf08_udcoUxCPlYI1g3jsYZQHVQbg2rb9lsLG--XP0YkXj_4xJ5XIFVIjMcxn2B62Q6fqEgmA-Y_qmUSlals9VGMCGCCYItQsjDL0sWPSswgmJevt9D2UqmwEfFVnjXmVY2CGol7pVRl3uzSVxdgTmA9RwkWLVUteQt0Tw4ihd00t-WqO2Wd6Te4iuVMgLeIaY5yNw0wdpRfCDyOExdRd0TG4flWqOozGsnCH_NlmXbbcnZAlyPwN84OxbhFNoWY)
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e3dbe96ff1a240b7b1bcb08b49c47810&_e=RiEXkGrXCwLkCcjTmuoEf_5-kJG-0kY0J_vlGXqG0zs2jZamKWOKtaFhTkEdLvbm4cNbaNrcVnnMS3mkaVw5WX3fbdjknUXt8u9E_8YZyXGOVnkxb8yaiLfbVyQ_WO_kRf08_udcoUxCPlYI1g3jsYZQHVQbg2rb9lsLG--XP0YkXj_4xJ5XIFVIjMcxn2B62Q6fqEgmA-Y_qmUSlals9VGMCGCCYItQsjDL0sWPSsx5gWjk7H30gzzkGqmtprv3YNzWVPJsqZmscmjbDsDeSuIRzQPqt82Fav_wbxBfyZXtdx5eYOu8yBg3fybrfxgyG-YSOkGHttp7OBFh6EECXvA43DNkPjcNgcc8lEQd8h16i6pv4eYsebLkMHWP56Bg)

name: INDems Election Alert
subject: This Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, This Friday at noon is the deadline to file to be a candidate for office in the 2024 Democratic Primary Election or to run to be a delegate to the 2024 Indiana Democratic Party State Convention. Democrats won 55% of the races where we had a candidate in 2023. We know we can win when Democrats step up and run – and that’s why we’re hoping you’ll consider running for office in your area. **[Sign up here today to signify your interest in running for office. We’re here to connect you with the materials you need to make the ballot.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78397601/453258670/-338127702?refcode=240204Run&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDUzNDBmYi04YmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-JUK2QS37kCnR5QPqwKaSCEokHwWCt7rZV2il6T3rr4=&emci=86f74bce-13c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c05340fb-8bc3-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4925535)** Becoming a candidate is the first step toward being the voice for your community. Together, we can build a better Indiana with more everyday Hoosiers in leadership – and that can include you. **Whether or not you’re considering making a run for office this year, please consider becoming a delegate to our 2024 State Convention. Delegates select our candidates for attorney general and lieutenant governor this year, and approve our platform – which signifies where we stand and how we can make Indiana better. ** **[Bring this form to your county election office to sign up to be a delegate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78397602/453258671/1601583050?id=9789&refcode=240204Run&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDUzNDBmYi04YmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-JUK2QS37kCnR5QPqwKaSCEokHwWCt7rZV2il6T3rr4=&emci=86f74bce-13c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c05340fb-8bc3-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4925535)** Thanks,

body:
Sen. Steven Roberts discusses 2024 legislative priorities | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
February 4, 2024
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=743a672a29&e=a088917f89)
---
Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis discusses legislative priorities for the 2024 session.
|
---
| **Contact Senator Roberts** 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329
Jefferson City, MO 65101
(573) 751-4415
Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov
---
| | | | | | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=25cbb7b71a&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=3e8d8c0be1&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5730e5b4c1&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| **House narrowly passes public school open enrollment**
The House of Representatives on Jan. 31 voted 86-73 in favor of legislation that would allow Missouri students to attend any public school willing to take them, without regard to where a student lives. The bill, which passed with just four more “yes” votes than the minimum required for a House majority, now advances to the Senate.

Missouri students typically must attend the public school district in which they reside. House Bill 1989 would authorize so-called “open enrollment” that would allow K-12 students to transfer to other districts. As currently written, however, it would be up to each of Missouri’s 518 school districts to decide whether to accept kids from other districts and wouldn’t force districts to take more outside students than they have capacity for. Districts would have no authority to stop students from leaving for other districts.
Open enrollment supporters say it would give students and their families more educational options within the public school context. Opponents are concerned it would force local school districts, particularly smaller ones in rural areas, to consolidate if students leave for districts with greater resources.

Most majority Republicans, but only one Democrat, voted for HB 1989, while 26 Republicans broke with their party to join Democrats in opposing it.
---
|
---
| **Senate panel advances new hurdles to changing constitution**
The Senate Local Government and Elections Committee on Jan. 30 approved legislation seeking to eliminate the doctrine of “one-person, one-vote” when ratifying amendments to the Missouri Constitution and essentially create a minority veto of many proposals that receive majority support statewide. The full Senate is expected to debate the measure in the coming days.

Since the adoption of the first Missouri Constitution in 1820, ratification of constitutional amendments has always required just a simple majority of votes cast statewide. Senate Joint Resolution 74 would require future constitutional amendments to win both a statewide majority and also majorities in at least 82 of Missouri’s 163 state House districts. This could create situations in which an amendment passes statewide by a wide margin on the strength of urban and suburban voters but nonetheless fails due to rural opposition. SJR 74’s concurrent majority requirement would apply to both amendments placed on the ballot by the legislature and those proposed by initiative petition.

Republican lawmakers for years have sought to make amending the Missouri Constitution harder after voters passed several high-profile ballot initiatives on issues the GOP majority had blocked in the legislature, including Medicaid expansion, bolstering legislative ethics requirements and authorizing both medical and recreational marijuana use. The issue has taken on added urgency for Republicans this year with an initiative petition currently being circulated to put a constitutional amendment on the November ballot to restore abortion rights in the state.

If both legislative chambers approve it, SJR 74 automatically would go before Missouri voters in November. However, the governor could exercise his authority to move the election to August. Ratification would require approval from just a simple majority of voters statewide.

Although new constitutional amendments take effect 30 days after ratification, whether a concurrent majority requirement approved in August would apply to the abortion measure and any other proposed amendments on the November ballot likely would be subject to litigation. Since initiative petitions must be turned in months before the August vote, adding a concurrent majority requirement at that late point would amount to changing the rules as the game is underway, and it is questionable whether the Missouri Supreme Court would approve.
---
|
---
| **Court says part of challenge to police rights law can advance**
The Missouri Supreme Court on Jan. 30 ruled St. Louis city’s legal claim that a 2021 state law creating a so-called “law enforcement officers’ bill of rights” imposes an unconstitutional unfunded state mandate on local governments can proceed. However, the court rejected the city’s various other constitutional challenges to the law, which sets tight restrictions on investigations of police misconduct and grants special legal protections to officers accused of wrongdoing.

Missouri was one of several Republican-controlled states that moved to further shield police from facing consequences for questionable or unlawful actions as part of a conservative backlash to nationwide protests calling for law enforcement reform after the 2020 murder of George Floyd by Minneapolis police. Missouri’s protections for officers were enacted as part of Senate Bill 26.

St. Louis city challenged SB 26 on a variety of fronts, including that it interferes with the city’s authority as a charter city to determine personnel matters and violated constitutional procedures for the passage of bills. The Supreme Court unanimously ruled against all of the city’s points except the claim that the new police protections impose an unfunded state mandate on the city in violation of a provision of the state constitution’s Hancock Amendment.
However, the court did not rule that SB 26 actually imposes an unfunded mandate. Instead the judges said the city sufficiently pleaded its Hancock claim and that the trial judge incorrectly ruled against the city on that point at that stage of the litigation. The high court remanded the case to the circuit court for additional proceedings on the unfunded mandate claim.

Once the trial judge makes a determination on whether SB 26 imposes an unfunded mandate, another appeal to the Supreme Court is expected. The case is _City of St. Louis v. State of Missouri_.
---
|
---

[**SB 790**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=7d8ec8aa49&e=a088917f89) \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession of a firearm by a minor

[**SB 791**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=585dcbf000&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to homelessness

[**SB 792**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=adb6572aea&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes the Revitalizing Missouri Downtowns and Main Streets Act

[**SB 883**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=2226110c67&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions

[**SB 884**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=bd528fbeeb&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to facilities of historic significance

[**SB 885**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=7ca6997178&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to school board elections in urban and metropolitan school districts

[**SB 965**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=3f38a00641&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes a sales tax for special educational services

[**SB 966**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=d3a615198b&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes a property tax for special educational services

[**SB 967**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=d71abb3213&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the calculation of weighted average daily attendance used to calculate state aid for school districts

[**SB 1039**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=f92daef907&e=a088917f89) \- Creates the Missouri Geospatial Advisory Council

[**SB 1040**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=8500036a25&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to legal representation for certain court proceedings involving children

[**SB 1041**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=810262c589&e=a088917f89)\- Modifies provisions relating to benevolent tax credits

[**SB 1096**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=863389803a&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution

[**SB 1097**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=44615e3d21&e=a088917f89) \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts

[**SB 1098**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=93e23ee42e&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to inmate phone call fees

[**SB 1147**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=f0df93e5cc&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility

[**SB 1148**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=61a504e1df&e=a088917f89) \- Repeals provisions relating to the caseload of public defenders

[**SB 1149**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b9228df3ec&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to delinquent property taxes

[**SB 1191**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=769325b760&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons

[**SB 1192**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=fd3485a076&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to grants for nonprofit organizations at risk for terrorist attacks

[**SB 1193**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=f3198bc2f6&e=a088917f89) \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees

[**SB 1215**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b827073a0b&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=8e2e28b83f&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.
---
|
---
| **SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES** Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a6a0512a52&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

You can also contact [ALIVE](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=ead247feba&e=a088917f89) at _314-993-2777_.

If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call _866-211-9966_. [Beyond Housing](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=7c42e95fef&e=a088917f89):

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=21b0f9f0ea&e=a088917f89).

Although new constitutional amendments take effect 30 days after ratification, whether a concurrent majority requirement approved in August would apply to the abortion measure and any other proposed amendments on the November ballot likely would be subject to litigation. However, the court rejected the city’s various other constitutional challenges to the law, which sets tight restrictions on investigations of police misconduct and grants special legal protections to officers accused of wrongdoing. Missouri was one of several Republican-controlled states that moved to further shield police from facing consequences for questionable or unlawful actions as part of a conservative backlash to nationwide protests calling for law enforcement reform after the 2020 murder of George Floyd by Minneapolis police. Missouri’s protections for officers were enacted as part of Senate Bill 26. St. Louis city challenged SB 26 on a variety of fronts, including that it interferes with the city’s authority as a charter city to determine personnel matters and violated constitutional procedures for the passage of bills. The Supreme Court unanimously ruled against all of the city’s points except the claim that the new police protections impose an unfunded state mandate on the city in violation of a provision of the state constitution’s Hancock Amendment. However, the court did not rule that SB 26 actually imposes an unfunded mandate. Instead the judges said the city sufficiently pleaded its Hancock claim and that the trial judge incorrectly ruled against the city on that point at that stage of the litigation. The high court remanded the case to the circuit court for additional proceedings on the unfunded mandate claim. Once the trial judge makes a determination on whether SB 26 imposes an unfunded mandate, another appeal to the Supreme Court is expected. The case is City of St. Louis v. State of Missouri. | | 2024 SENATE BILLS \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession of a firearm by a minor \- Modifies provisions relating to homelessness \- Establishes the Revitalizing Missouri Downtowns and Main Streets Act \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions \- Modifies provisions relating to facilities of historic significance \- Modifies provisions relating to school board elections in urban and metropolitan school districts \- Authorizes a sales tax for special educational services \- Authorizes a property tax for special educational services \- Modifies the calculation of weighted average daily attendance used to calculate state aid for school districts \- Creates the Missouri Geospatial Advisory Council \- Modifies provisions relating to legal representation for certain court proceedings involving children \- Modifies provisions relating to benevolent tax credits \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts \- Creates provisions relating to inmate phone call fees \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Repeals provisions relating to the caseload of public defenders \- Modifies provisions relating to delinquent property taxes \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Creates provisions relating to grants for nonprofit organizations at risk for terrorist attacks \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Modifies eligibility for appropriations from the Waterways and Ports Trust Fund | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov for more information on SBA disaster assistance. | | SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit or call 314-531-2003. You can also contact at 314-993-2777. | | COMMUNITY RESOURCE LIST The has a COVID-19 Community Economic Relief Fund. If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call 866-211-9966. : : | | | | | | MEDICAL RESOURCES The Department of Health COVID-19 hotline is open from 8 a.m. - 10 p.m. Call 314-657-1499 with questions or concerns. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services hotline can be reached at tel:%20\(877\%20435-8411). | | | | | | RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit: As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy. Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program. Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free. | | LOW-COST INSULIN Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the . | | Check the Status of your Missouri State Tax refund | | | CITIZENS SERVICE BUREAU If you are having issues with street lights, dumpsters, trees, graffiti, potholes or other such items, please report them to the Citizens' Service Bureau. You can call 314-622-4800 or report online at | | | | | | Keep In Touch Phone: Email: mailto:Steven.Roberts@house.mo.gov Office Address: Room 329 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Roberts for St. Louis, All rights reserved. |LIST:DESCRIPTION| Paid for by Roberts for St. Louis, James D.
