It’s former Navy SEAL and current Republican Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. I've been trying to reach you for a while now, but so far, **I haven't had any luck.**

**[I have a few things I need to talk about to engaged voters like you.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b4962253c04f4abb858d31d66d905bcd&_e=zd3sUp9wYtfG0_LaiU_T7Bgxeb7eE1MuflU8yQcSGhiyOlfzzWz908z0AAdyDCAYhEvHBqPEANv5jIq2YizHVOMU2AYXnX0qPXk7Ao9avy3IqMLn5yUwirszZZkUC0pagys5p2E7WWGLx95gq77gzojuEA1lR-USFOr0WURokKgPmjVVQyVsXdfjMo9IqyRQo2K9kih-dIBIFD-GJ-o3hqt9bMA9GEOLDSqHGkf01b-Dsh3uOM3PFu1y98bThD1WRlA9Qamc0A9a1Diu_V-hkXQxrzKNvNIl7Gn2dwF331QHIfFm9_CZkP_7vOg6lHZ4ixbnBAbbq4Y77pVyNk9-CrJDIJvQthoodchCwsAmJ0S0e3XjQyOe86Z70vj0YRbZSzbYrjK704zc56XplqC4Xp6su_ePKWMh98LpcQeDHL0%3D)**

[**Let's Talk ->** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b4962253c04f4abb858d31d66d905bcd&_e=zd3sUp9wYtfG0_LaiU_T7Bgxeb7eE1MuflU8yQcSGhiyOlfzzWz908z0AAdyDCAYhEvHBqPEANv5jIq2YizHVOMU2AYXnX0qPXk7Ao9avy3IqMLn5yUwirszZZkUC0pagys5p2E7WWGLx95gq77gzojuEA1lR-USFOr0WURokKgPmjVVQyVsXdfjMo9IqyRQo2K9kih-dIBIFD-GJ-o3hqt9bMA9GEOLDSqHGkf01b-Dsh3uOM3PFu1y98bThD1WrHOIeYIktOoNn8mwJqpqCaz_Nl5TNd04XVzjLzv7W7_kFYbPA62HFuH4s3ZrYZwEgQbnKcSZbwMxjAeGvwSTOGvXvJ6DYhimHJZrAgMshR69pER3NBmssyH6Oe-9IgBPufu9oys7hVq2limuRqfpAPMJXKg4zl7jAHm4FXj1HWQ%3D)

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Join Our Sunday Prayer Circle for RFK, Jr.!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Please join us on Zoom for our Sunday Prayer Circle for RFK, Jr.

|
---
| | | **We believe that Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is anointed and appointed to take on the mantle of President.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/grand-rapids-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sunday_prayer_circle_2_3_nd1&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
We wanted to share an opportunity for you to participate in the Sunday Prayer Circle for RFK, Jr. on Zoom. Led by Reverend Wendy Silvers, this circle will create a powerful field of prayer that surrounds RFK, Jr., Cheryl Hines, their family, Team Kennedy 24, and the citizens of the world.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is a man who embodies a deep sense of faith and spirituality in his life. He leads with authenticity, honesty, integrity, courage, commitment, and high consciousness. Prayer, in his view, is a potent and regenerative force that establishes a high energetic frequency, opening hearts and minds.
Event Details:

| When:
---
Sundays, beginning February 4th, 2024
Time:
12:00 - 12:20 PM PT
Led by:
Reverend Wendy Silvers
Platform:
[Zoom](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJkyuRr47qbYosydsmTF9BBc3SK5ZqgiRonZvkOooMrRnISs45TsjezKB-rlF7B_EQ_VoXrO-7hzQh_C149S5Z26npA9104DN9NqbaLC-4LZpUvC464JcYwSG4axtEuVR0dSpvFECDC5uJaGceHI23_pg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sunday_prayer_circle_2_3_nd1&n=2)
Format:
>> Welcome
>> Inspirational Reading
>> Vision
>> Spoken Word
>> Announcements
>> Close
We believe that Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is anointed and appointed to take on the mantle of President. Just as his campaign and future legislation aim to heal the divide in our society, we also seek a healing of hearts through prayer. By joining together in prayer, we invite divine intervention and show our support for his campaign as he travels across the United States.
The Sunday Prayer Circle for RFK, Jr. will take place on Zoom from 12:00 pm - 12:20 pm PT. All denominations are welcome, and your presence would be greatly appreciated. Together, let us renounce the lies and tear down the walls that separate us, with our hands, with our feet, and with our votes.
If you are interested in participating, please let us know, and we will provide you with the necessary details to join the Zoom call.
[https://us02web.zoom.us/j/5411192341?omn=81758897727](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJkyuRr47qbYosydsmTF9BBc3SK5ZqgiRonZvkOooMrRnIsaNU-k44KvcjUv3p4PJquQ&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sunday_prayer_circle_2_3_nd1&n=3)
Thank you for considering this invitation, and we hope to see you there.
[JOIN ZOOM CALL](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJkyuRr47qbYosydsmTF9BBc3SK5ZqgiRonZvkOooMrRnIsaNU-k44KvcjUv3p4PJquQ&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sunday_prayer_circle_2_3_nd1&n=4)
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sunday_prayer_circle_2_3_nd1&n=5)
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sunday_prayer_circle_2_3_nd1&n=6) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZdMp9-e17RgxqtIk69rUIjeOqT1-oa6z7jeUAIaHEF2m&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sunday_prayer_circle_2_3_nd1&n=7) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sunday_prayer_circle_2_3_nd1&n=8) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sunday_prayer_circle_2_3_nd1&n=9) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWSHecUzjTC_26r6_PMq84pDYNHmKWp713umpU1ZYCPsJg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sunday_prayer_circle_2_3_nd1&n=10)

Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arizona Democrats**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400012/453266659/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUwYWM1OTMtOTNjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7jKBeCyl3yDmAg4ejFc3gYS1ESAMml1qMZLPDpej9c=)
---
Heyy'all, our team is neck deep in our voter registration efforts ahead of the March 19th election, [**so I’ll cut straight to the point: do you have $4 to pitch in today to help us register more voters in Maricopa county?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400016/453266663/-427486611?amount=4&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUwYWM1OTMtOTNjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7jKBeCyl3yDmAg4ejFc3gYS1ESAMml1qMZLPDpej9c=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $4](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400020/453266667/-427486611?express_lane=true&amount=4&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUwYWM1OTMtOTNjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7jKBeCyl3yDmAg4ejFc3gYS1ESAMml1qMZLPDpej9c=)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400024/453266671/-427486611?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUwYWM1OTMtOTNjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7jKBeCyl3yDmAg4ejFc3gYS1ESAMml1qMZLPDpej9c=)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400027/453266675/-427486611?express_lane=true&amount=24&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUwYWM1OTMtOTNjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7jKBeCyl3yDmAg4ejFc3gYS1ESAMml1qMZLPDpej9c=)
---
Voter registration looks different in different parts of the state. And our organizers need different tools and resources to make sure voters are registered and have all the information they need to cast their ballot on Election Day.
On college campuses, we have to engage young folks who are worried about their climate and financial futures. Voting on college campuses can be confusing, so making sure students know exactly where and when to cast their vote is crucial to making sure they have a seat at the table.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400031/453266677/-427486611?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUwYWM1OTMtOTNjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7jKBeCyl3yDmAg4ejFc3gYS1ESAMml1qMZLPDpej9c=)
In Yuma, our team engages with the community at events like the recent Tamale Festival in Somerton, registering first-time voters and making sure folks’ information is up to date.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400035/453266682/-427486611?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUwYWM1OTMtOTNjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7jKBeCyl3yDmAg4ejFc3gYS1ESAMml1qMZLPDpej9c=)
In places like Tuba City, organizers engage rural communities and register voters through high traffic canvasses, setting up at highly traveled intersections and junctions to meet voters directly where they’re at.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400039/453266686/-427486611?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUwYWM1OTMtOTNjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7jKBeCyl3yDmAg4ejFc3gYS1ESAMml1qMZLPDpej9c=)
[**And if everyone reading this far pitched in just $4, we’d be able to register even more voters in Maricopa county? So what do you say**********,** can I personally count on your contribution today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400042/453266690/-427486611?amount=4&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUwYWM1OTMtOTNjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7jKBeCyl3yDmAg4ejFc3gYS1ESAMml1qMZLPDpej9c=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[EXPRESS DONATE $4](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400045/453266694/-427486611?express_lane=true&amount=4&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUwYWM1OTMtOTNjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7jKBeCyl3yDmAg4ejFc3gYS1ESAMml1qMZLPDpej9c=)

[EXPRESS DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400047/453266698/-427486611?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUwYWM1OTMtOTNjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7jKBeCyl3yDmAg4ejFc3gYS1ESAMml1qMZLPDpej9c=)

clean_body: | = Heyy'all, our team is neck deep in our voter registration efforts ahead of the March 19th election, = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Voter registration looks different in different parts of the state. And our organizers need different tools and resources to make sure voters are registered and have all the information they need to cast their ballot on Election Day. On college campuses, we have to engage young folks who are worried about their climate and financial futures. Voting on college campuses can be confusing, so making sure students know exactly where and when to cast their vote is crucial to making sure they have a seat at the table. = In Yuma, our team engages with the community at events like the recent Tamale Festival in Somerton, registering first-time voters and making sure folks’ information is up to date. = In places like Tuba City, organizers engage rural communities and register voters through high traffic canvasses, setting up at highly traveled intersections and junctions to meet voters directly where they’re at. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you in advance for pitching in today! — Morgan Dick Executive Director, Arizona Democratic Party = Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | Paid for by Arizona Democrats

body:
| [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/SONx6161-CHO9xDpDo0xfQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnomzPP0TOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIwNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9vcmdhbml6ZXJzLWRlc2FudGlzX2VuLXJzJmNkbWM9MmJvc3ZPMFJ0UG9sd0lzWWZJOXdyUzRtbGR0JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJib3N2TzBSdFBvbHdJc1lmSTl3clM0bWxkdCZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yYm9zdk8wUnRQb2x3SXNZZkk5d3JTNG1sZHRXA3NwY0IKZbrP579lom8Yh1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) [**Salon: _“Florida GOP election bill makes it harder for Gen Z to vote”_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/80SXUSg5E0E291v6Cir4PA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnomzPP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIwNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9vcmdhbml6ZXJzLWRlc2FudGlzX2VuLXJzJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJib3N2TzBSdFBvbHdJc1lmSTl3clM0bWxkdCZyZWZjb2RlMj0yYm9zdk8wUnRQb2x3SXNZZkk5d3JTNG1sZHQmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmJvc3ZPMFJ0UG9sd0lzWWZJOXdyUzRtbGR0VwNzcGNCCmW6z-e_ZaJvGIdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) Over and over again, Ron DeSantis has stood in the way of our rights and forced his fascist agenda on Floridians. And Florida youth are bearing the brunt of his attacks - but we’re determined to make Ron feel the consequences of his actions.

**I started a student organizing team that will hold him accountable year-round.** Together, we’ve been on the ground with youth organizers on their college campuses, empowering other eligible students to register to vote.

**_We’ve even brought on paid fellows – all high school and college students – to join our team and fuel our youth-powered movement!_**

Powering our team means you’ll have a direct impact on how many students on college campuses are reached, register to vote, and change the course of action in Florida politics. We’ll have a real chance at change, but we can’t do it alone. [**_If we want to keep our organizing teams going across Florida, we need YOU to help power this movement before my end-of-week deadline tomorrow. Chip in $27 to fuel my campaign’s efforts to mobilize more youth than ever before to defeat DeSantis’ fascist agenda >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/80SXUSg5E0E291v6Cir4PA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnomzPP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIwNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9vcmdhbml6ZXJzLWRlc2FudGlzX2VuLXJzJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJib3N2TzBSdFBvbHdJc1lmSTl3clM0bWxkdCZyZWZjb2RlMj0yYm9zdk8wUnRQb2x3SXNZZkk5d3JTNG1sZHQmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmJvc3ZPMFJ0UG9sd0lzWWZJOXdyUzRtbGR0VwNzcGNCCmW6z-e_ZaJvGIdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) Over the past two years, Florida youth have had to endure DeSantis banning books in schools, directly attacking LGBTQ+ youth, and signing a permitless-carry law that will endanger thousands.

But young people have demonstrated that we are ready to fight back against these violations. We won’t stand on the sidelines and watch our Sunshine State go up in flames at the hands of a far-right extremist.

That’s why we are organizing across college campuses, right here in Florida, to give more young people a say in their future. But your support is critical in keeping up our work. **College campuses are just the start. We’re ready to help Florida youth build a bold movement and fight back against fascist attacks.** [**_But I need you, Peter! So stand with us: donate $27 NOW to fuel our organizing efforts before our end-of-week fundraising deadline. >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/80SXUSg5E0E291v6Cir4PA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnomzPP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIwNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9vcmdhbml6ZXJzLWRlc2FudGlzX2VuLXJzJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJib3N2TzBSdFBvbHdJc1lmSTl3clM0bWxkdCZyZWZjb2RlMj0yYm9zdk8wUnRQb2x3SXNZZkk5d3JTNG1sZHQmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmJvc3ZPMFJ0UG9sd0lzWWZJOXdyUzRtbGR0VwNzcGNCCmW6z-e_ZaJvGIdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/EAKGaLbIgSDgMsC0jB4xWA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnomzPP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIwNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9vcmdhbml6ZXJzLWRlc2FudGlzX2VuLXJzJmFtb3VudD0xMCZjZG1jPTJib3N2TzBSdFBvbHdJc1lmSTl3clM0bWxkdCZyZWZjb2RlMj0yYm9zdk8wUnRQb2x3SXNZZkk5d3JTNG1sZHQmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmJvc3ZPMFJ0UG9sd0lzWWZJOXdyUzRtbGR0VwNzcGNCCmW6z-e_ZaJvGIdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)

clean_body: | ~ Over and over again, Ron DeSantis has stood in the way of our rights and forced his fascist agenda on Floridians. And Florida youth are bearing the brunt of his attacks - but we’re determined to make Ron feel the consequences of his actions. I started a student organizing team that will hold him accountable year-round. Together, we’ve been on the ground with youth organizers on their college campuses, empowering other eligible students to register to vote. We’ve even brought on paid fellows – all high school and college students – to join our team and fuel our youth-powered movement! Powering our team means you’ll have a direct impact on how many students on college campuses are reached, register to vote, and change the course of action in Florida politics. We’ll have a real chance at change, but we can’t do it alone. Over the past two years, Florida youth have had to endure DeSantis banning books in schools, directly attacking LGBTQ+ youth, and signing a permitless-carry law that will endanger thousands. But young people have demonstrated that we are ready to fight back against these violations. We won’t stand on the sidelines and watch our Sunshine State go up in flames at the hands of a far-right extremist. That’s why we are organizing across college campuses, right here in Florida, to give more young people a say in their future. But your support is critical in keeping up our work. College campuses are just the start. We’re ready to help Florida youth build a bold movement and fight back against fascist attacks. | | | | ~~ | ~~ ~ Thank you, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. name: Robert Garcia
subject: Alligators, bombing Mexico, electric fences, and shooting migrants.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400514/453267874/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM1NTg2Zi05NmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJ8JOi2XeeAVhs45Na_HHwoHX6RRGJ119Nq44POaG-0=)
Friends,
Here are Donald Trump’s ideas for the border: alligators, bombing Mexico, electric fences, and shooting migrants.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400515/453267875/764803318?refcode2=6635586f-96c3-ee11-b660-002248223197&noskip=true&refcode=em240204-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM1NTg2Zi05NmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJ8JOi2XeeAVhs45Na_HHwoHX6RRGJ119Nq44POaG-0=)
Seriously. These are all ideas that Trump has offered to “solve” this crisis. It’s inhumane and absurd.
But his allies are all on board. Here was Marjorie Taylor Greene’s response:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400516/453267876/764803318?refcode2=6635586f-96c3-ee11-b660-002248223197&noskip=true&refcode=em240204-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM1NTg2Zi05NmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJ8JOi2XeeAVhs45Na_HHwoHX6RRGJ119Nq44POaG-0=)
And Lauren Boebert? She said, “Sign me up! I will co-sponsor that legislation. I’m happy to!”
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400517/453267877/764803318?refcode2=6635586f-96c3-ee11-b660-002248223197&noskip=true&refcode=em240204-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM1NTg2Zi05NmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJ8JOi2XeeAVhs45Na_HHwoHX6RRGJ119Nq44POaG-0=)
These extremists have no regard for human life, and if given the opportunity they will create extreme border policies like these — no matter if those migrants are fleeing from dangerous living conditions or seeking refuge.
We cannot afford to let MAGA extremists dictate immigration policy in America.
As an immigrant myself, it pains me to see elected officials speaking about migrants this way. I would not be serving in office and fighting for Americans if it weren't for my mother bringing me to this country. Immigrants built this country, and we’re stronger for it.
We cannot let them succeed and continue to have power in this country.
**[Friends, if you agree, please contribute $3 to my movement so we can take back the House majority from these extremists this November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400518/453267878/764803318?refcode2=6635586f-96c3-ee11-b660-002248223197&refcode=em240204-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM1NTg2Zi05NmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJ8JOi2XeeAVhs45Na_HHwoHX6RRGJ119Nq44POaG-0=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78400519/453267879/764803318?refcode2=6635586f-96c3-ee11-b660-002248223197&refcode=em240204-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM1NTg2Zi05NmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJ8JOi2XeeAVhs45Na_HHwoHX6RRGJ119Nq44POaG-0=)**
These people are embarrassments to Congress and our nation’s strong history of immigration.
Onwards,
Robert Garcia

* * *
Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress

clean_body: | | | Peter, think back to where you were just a few years ago, as Joe and Kamala were sworn in on the steps of the Capitol. Remember how proud you felt to help send them to the White House --and how relieved you were that Donald Trump was nowhere near 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue. Remember how you didn’t have to worry about Trump signing another trillion-dollar tax cut bill for the rich and corporations or his endless threats to Social Security and Medicare -- or his dismissal of the hundreds of thousands of lives lost to COVID-19. And remember that your contribution to the Biden-Harris campaign is more than just a donation. Every contribution is a statement. A statement that you stand against Donald Trump and his MAGA extremism that seeks to undo all of the progress our country has made. A statement that you stand for democracy. Grassroots supporters like you are the reason Joe Biden won in 2020. And supporters like you will be the reason we win again in 2024. So, if you believe in standing up for our democracy and rejecting MAGA extremism... Thanks for all that you do, Team Biden-Harris

---
| | [8am Senate Courts of Justice Docket ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdWgQANF6ZCQzRNA6JTz7or0JIU_-vQUFrAxZHKCWQEmH4WFbWKwsH_qty2nMIroY67_p6RijrxE9Dq6pBtqklBoYArv1pkGvBuJG-129fV6-AFCV6RISUFR-PmP52UPBLLHURguHdV22cL7VHZouWLw=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==)
---
| [S.B. 642](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdUpV9UOPfgQ2Kgj1TniRLfEIsR9kFsvkGABNsxw-dRgEOFJHD4VjjglpuLRxFtMOa6kpf2kvrGBVTTa2sFYSfSaSA3GclZAj8mg6KDpD9tV9V-k_uYmMm-fpZTau2S50jSES1-mb-AzENUFSELvE8BQ=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==) Patron: Perry Purchase, possession, or transportation of firearm following an assault and battery against a person in a dating relationship with the alleged offender, penalty. Provides that any person who knowingly and intentionally purchases, possesses, or transports any firearm following a misdemeanor conviction for an offense that occurred on or after July 1, 2024, for the offense of assault and battery against a person in a dating relationship, as defined in the bill, with the alleged offender or an offense substantially similar under the laws of any other state or of the United States is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor.
[S.B. 693](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdV9Uz4FNcAXN7ZF4RdHj_HLfuV7DqF2Rwhl6sCywOuooP8b_90HD-OqTF0hnSVKvX40r_bcYVkmJrZ9SyDAxnpImbZEYHeF1IiiR5shdr9US-wD8f3eEiR5kwHDQyttLx-HjtcRI3IBQ_kwSiugJUF0=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==) Patron: Sturtevant Prohibited acquisition of residential land; restrictions; civil penalty. Restricts any partnership, corporation, or real estate investment trust that manages funds pooled from investors, is a fiduciary to such investors, and has $50 million or more in net value or assets under management on any day during a taxable year from acquiring any interest in residential land, as defined in the bill, in the Commonwealth and requires registration with the Secretary of the Commonwealth on or after July 1, 2024. The bill requires the Secretary to report annually by December 1 on the registrations and any penalties assessed for failure to register and to submit such report to the Governor and the General Assembly. The bill also requires all real property tax bills to contain notice of such prohibited business ownership restrictions and registration requirements.

---
| | [8:30am Senate Health & Education Subcommittee on Higher Education Docket](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdTXztlpyl_McmdLDFc6QSQ9vV1Ws8TPT9au-qsa-rqqKWLjy8OHlKeBqvLe-iC8JjazpKDjF3exnoOs_E20HNdxPGa0G_6nBCCl6UMtrrVLhCaUqU9XByztTY6iZsiVeqp_i1Fs845JR6FURd-PgS64=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==)
---
| no bills on the docket
---
| | [10am Senate Local Government Docket](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdWgQANF6ZCQz883KtwVvhmqKnwM2Plwv6RrRCBU3_I10L66FdG1az-CGYD9hYL8U95NquCs9ax-kUz8WkmQ5ENx6FnKDODfglXxzVmo3DDUBgtgRhktEKs37Mp7kDYM_RB6O0qfg4vSGPKP11KGmMZQ=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==)
---
| [S.B. 305](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdV9Uz4FNcAXNi1L1wPZD2iH4WgV7xdsOtYVvcMjbEnkrKJe-OweuUnn0K6bjXnBbl7TMWyRYOrsoUQrsUGFIeZ-U4GNBWUp0NR_KS-slwlKOrISTW0K5ObwTCOXVokMafDAfU3Lnue-rWONyZIEPsSQ=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==) Patron: Salim Local prohibition or regulation of gas-powered leaf blowers; civil penalty. Provides that any locality may by ordinance prohibit or regulate the use of gas-powered leaf blowers. The bill provides that the ordinance may include provisions for a civil penalty and that the funds from such civil penalties may be used by the locality to assist with the purchase of nonprohibited leaf blowers by residents and local businesses.
[S.B. 409](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdT6dob3CmXr5bBape4UTSy2cEkJ2ZsNR8jOSmPCJ825WEP4v7N4n5tK5UUpRYGRmigRY0UaGXskWwHL8yo6EO2aW2rZbJJsR8RV0eQhf1nju0wxAKkq_zmy9C3_VdWpBF0FE1-xEVdZ_SELJCpH0zH4=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==) Patron: Boysko Energy efficiency and climate standards; more stringent energy efficiency and climate requirements. Allows a locality by ordinance to adopt and require compliance with stretch codes, as defined in the bill, for the construction or rehabilitation of buildings within the locality that are in addition to or more stringent than those in the Uniform Statewide Building Code, and use them as an alternative means of compliance with a locality's building requirements. The bill requires periodic review of the codes and allows the locality to make amendments.
[S.B. 715](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdV9Uz4FNcAXNQaVel3PW_dnbp-O2qDLMkoLYiP6ogxbLWWzagvv6cXcpuW1N8_aOjk7Wc9SptdgGDWb8OgPdKpKJf9pzDV-r8_1H_3rR9hC379qxMPSvbDqBOWThN9yNYlyFhk4e5jPPIEgi4anc-UQ=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==) Patron: Sturtevant Local review of zoning decisions. Clarifies that a locality may schedule regular reviews of previous zoning decisions in order to determine whether provisions of the zoning ordinance (i) continue to meet the general purpose of promoting the health, safety, or general welfare of the public and (ii) are compatible with changes in land use patterns.

| [S.B. 256](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdV9Uz4FNcAXN4wyBKjCx1Arh5sHqa2dcsNWoG2ehmwu-Lnhuf36iVyox-o7uvx4PGlQ-lg7eFWJi7O4vzjpKe0LrlFsFouMiGY3f99oG0qQQJi_X3p7v2tf8kKJQXgj5nHnlQLW8xTbTjykdZIM3NMo=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==) Patron: Surovell Motor vehicle insurance claims; bad faith. Provides that if an insurance company denies, refuses, or fails to pay its insured, or refuses a reasonable settlement demand within the policy's coverage limits, for a claim for uninsured or underinsured motorist benefits within a reasonable time after being presented with a demand for such benefits and it is subsequently found that such denial, refusal, or failure was not in good faith, then the insurance company is liable to the insured in an amount double the amount of the judgment, together with reasonable attorney fees, expenses, and interest.
[S.B. 274](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdWgQANF6ZCQzpgsnYgKQB7WbdXNp4hyViX5yj06DaRo7QzD0x9R0jb01O9kZ7SypmzvQw5OH7YXwjaniX7Xe-kjAM9qFDV-LoOHuvdwb4DA4JjQTIOU-YVrQZYOogGA10ELc_UQnRz_vLEipJn5wEtU=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==) Patron: Deeds Prescription Drug Affordability Board established; drug cost affordability review. Establishes the Prescription Drug Affordability Board for the purpose of protecting the citizens of the Commonwealth and other stakeholders within the health care system from the high costs of prescription drug products.
[S.B. 485](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdV9Uz4FNcAXNSk5ZnFkxfVkibfHbiRWkY-gKvqrAo_KId2iD0F12zOekPvREUlRYWwnCkYE9dUzi4IwfyfMif8U24F5y1v9nrB37D8ko84Ioj2RcMik0sT-XGYqmz8-3Qw2ifmsAgcCzWs0m4mH60CQ=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==) Patron: Carroll Foy Employee protections; employer-sponsored meetings on political matters; civil action. Prohibits an employer from retaliating against an employee (i) because such employee declines to attend or participate in an employer-sponsored meeting or receive an employer's communications conveying an opinion about political matters, as defined in the bill; (ii) as a means of inducing an employee's attendance at such meeting or receipt of such communications; or (iii) because the employee reports a suspected violation of the bill's provisions. The bill permits an employee alleging a violation of the bill's provisions to bring an action in civil court within 90 days after such violation occurs for appropriate relief, including injunctive relief, reinstatement, compensation for lost wages, benefits, and other remuneration, interest, and reasonable attorney fees and costs.
[S.B. 685](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdV9Uz4FNcAXN8yynR7Mk0AyAiIOHJKxvJ59XebaHTu5HB951FbFN3ci062PTyTbU3g33weT15ZzkjfggNXUlZAfXZsQ1ArpK52TCHg1kTkKBMQk58MwFd2ltAErYrmZw3Id0wY7t8E_Cn7BlYaG9I9Q=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==) Patron: Carroll Foy Minimum wage and overtime pay; warehouse distribution center employees and employers; civil action; civil penalty. Provides that (i) an employer that violates requirements in existing law relating to the minimum wage, payment of wages and salaries, or overtime pay or (ii) a warehouse employer, as defined in the bill, that violates the bill's provisions shall be liable to an impacted employee for certain remedies, damages, and other relief as specified in the bill. The bill requires a warehouse employer to provide each warehouse employee, as defined in the bill, a written description of each performance standard to which such employee is subject and of any potential adverse employment action that may result from such employee's failure to meet such performance standard. The bill prohibits a warehouse employer from taking adverse action against a warehouse employee for such employee's use of a bathroom facility. The bill provides that a warehouse employer that violates the bill's provisions relating to warehouse employers is subject to a civil penalty not to exceed $5,000 for each violation.
[S.B. 729](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdT6dob3CmXr50cDhy5nDmb8gt8urm3MIXway5s72QkoAROcsH2WCsSOVVq6PVGEwp3bVKAdEYEJpI7aJDUyKqXd5SsK3YSo5DPnS2w-t5Yf0icOmioJYNtiDIJO-UyyuPO37RThZZFpLuiRp7ZhxhH8=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==) Patron: Surovell Virginia Climate Innovation Authority; established; report. Creates the Virginia Climate Innovation Authority to finance clean energy projects, greenhouse gas emissions reduction projects, and other qualified projects through the strategic deployment of public funds in the form of grants, loans, credit enhancements, and other financing mechanisms.
[S.B. 735](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdV9Uz4FNcAXNKF__jwheq58PHCh5s39MN61PlOB_6lLi1ygtTor78ZPm_cVrdTA_BgaIzxizHFRNVf9AHEc8Z8JPJ_9UKqM1-LD9123VJO0qMoNMBx2TYfr-klY1KYNNJo6138nSdUUCsnroxuiT21o=&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==) Patron: Sturtevant Health insurance; denial of referral by direct primary care provider prohibited. Prohibits a health insurance carrier from (i) denying payment for any health care service covered under an enrollee's health benefit plan based solely on the basis that such enrollee's referral was made by a direct primary care provider or (ii) imposing a cost-sharing requirement greater than the applicable cost-sharing requirement that would apply to the same health care service if the service was referred by a participating provider. The bill provides that a health insurance carrier may require a direct primary care provider to provide information demonstrating that such provider has entered into a direct primary care agreement with the enrollee.
---
| | [4:30pm Senate Finance: Economic Development & Natural Resources Docket](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015EONgnpGSCDvQGQud3ujxkWcnWcrhy1eHIFdbJ4bAIE2-GEi-NHAdV9Uz4FNcAXNveVVKpXEW9XHBHdtPijwGTOjlpil_jm1Kc8fVWQwRc_hGU13t7BYlLXd0A5L1YSFrwWJu9c5-CnmytzQY5YB6US-fmwKXg-Vj0UeSAKDw16TnqPsbNb5HgKFx5irntzs&c=-wE5-_RwedO7xrhHwZtImuaGeP6Zpy8Eyq9eaZWen5SJzfsZC5-7wQ==&ch=XNuzCwrBL3LtA9jZlvvbkN6_fcJSsDWLJqDjhYT2sC0e85AFwYX_rw==)

The bill requires the Secretary to report annually by December 1 on the registrations and any penalties assessed for failure to register and to submit such report to the Governor and the General Assembly. body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3ab5aa278c&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

One month down at the State Capitol.

Last week, the Club for Growth Foundation Fellowship program sent out a press release announcing the current year's class. Since 2020, people have asked me to apply, so I finally said yes, and was accepted. They included me in their [press release](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6eea4819fb&e=a7ab36849c) discussing this year’s class.

This week I wrapped up my first month as your State Senator of the current legislative session. The Senate’s bill deadline was on Monday, so I filed all [legislation](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0d86bc4d9e&e=a7ab36849c) I will be sponsoring this year. There might be tweaks and amendments along the way, but I cannot file any more bills for the current term.

On Monday, I filed [SCR 1042](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=34bb95c597&e=a7ab36849c) in support of Texas against the Biden Administration, calling on Governor Hobbs to do the same, and demanding the Feds to fight back against the invasion on our southern Border. In our joint press release by the State Senate, I said, “Our law enforcement resources are outnumbered, and our communities are in peril from the millions of people who entered our country illegally since Biden took office. These are not just innocent families looking for a better life. We’re experiencing numerous horrific crimes daily, like child sex trafficking, human smuggling, rapes, murders, and deadly fentanyl destroying our communities. We can’t sit idly by. I commend Governor Abbott for acting. Governor Hobbs needs to do the same.”

On Tuesday, I stood with several members of my Republican caucus and Superintendent Horne in favor of ESAs in the Rose Garden, and to discuss their latest [report](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=52dd87f8da&e=a7ab36849c) showing ESAs **aren’t **bankrupting our state like Hobbs and the Left continue to spread lies.

On Wednesday, during the Senate Committee on Education hearing I was able to discuss a little bit about my involvement on the State Board of Education re: [curriculum](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3af9204c60&e=a7ab36849c); and also, the need for transparency in third party vendors at the school district level involved in the design, development, production, or distribution of any school curriculum or teaching materials.

On Thursday morning, I filmed a brief statement in support of a [November 2024 ballot initiative](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=76cbc5f93d&e=a7ab36849c). As you know, I am sponsoring [SCR 1021](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6436202520&e=a7ab36849c) in the State Senate so all Arizona voters will have a chance to weigh in to put child sex traffickers who buy and/or sell children behind bars for natural life. We received some media coverage, including this article on [The Blaze](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8beb51f8bd&e=a7ab36849c).

On Thursday afternoon, I was honored to stand with Chloe Cole in support of [legislation](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b36cd2ee58&e=a7ab36849c) that would help guarantee care and coverage of care for individuals wishing to detransition. Ms. Cole is a de-transitioned 19-year-old. Chloe has been traveling the country to use her strong voice to oppose gender-affirming care for minors and supports bands on such care following her own detransition. If you don’t know who Chloe is, please [watch](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a117fe6940&e=a7ab36849c) her opening statement during her Congressional testimony from last summer.

On Friday afternoon, I attended an event honoring Congresswoman Debbie Lesko sponsored by the [Dodie Londen Excellence in Public Service Series](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e4536b739e&e=a7ab36849c). As a 2010 graduate of this class, it’s great to see the more than two hundred women across Arizona step up and take leadership roles all over our awesome state from school boards to county recorders to heading up the Arizona Republican Party.

Yesterday, I met up with a few volunteers who are helping this campaign collect signatures, talk with voters, and write postcards in support of my candidacy, and some new supporters on their doorsteps. If you would like to help us, please reply to this email and let us know how you can help us maintain the Republican majority. Last night, my husband took me out to celebrate my birthday with an early present to a favorite restaurant since I’ll likely be in the Senate Committee on Finance and Commerce (FICO) most of Monday afternoon into the early evening.

Today, I have a full afternoon ahead of me meeting with voters and then, finish reading and absorbing all the legislation on FICO’s calendar when I return home.

This coming week quite a few of my bills will be heard in Senate FICO, Elections, Government, and Judiciary committees, including [banning foreign donations](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6092dc10b0&e=a7ab36849c) in our state’s election administration, allowing [youth entrepreneurs](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=dd5fc82806&e=a7ab36849c) to thrive without government interference (aka the modern day lemonade stands), some criminal justice reform, the Senate’s bill to stop child sex trafficking, and a [few fixes](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b106fc6375&e=a7ab36849c) to Kayleigh’s Law.

Have a great week ahead!

Take care,
Shawnna

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Freedom Fighters, One month down at the State Capitol. Last week, the Club for Growth Foundation Fellowship program sent out a press release announcing the current year's class. Since 2020, people have asked me to apply, so I finally said yes, and was accepted. They included me in their discussing this year’s class. This week I wrapped up my first month as your State Senator of the current legislative session. The Senate’s bill deadline was on Monday, so I filed all I will be sponsoring this year. There might be tweaks and amendments along the way, but I cannot file any more bills for the current term. On Monday, I filed in support of Texas against the Biden Administration, calling on Governor Hobbs to do the same, and demanding the Feds to fight back against the invasion on our southern Border. In our joint press release by the State Senate, I said, “Our law enforcement resources are outnumbered, and our communities are in peril from the millions of people who entered our country illegally since Biden took office. These are not just innocent families looking for a better life. We’re experiencing numerous horrific crimes daily, like child sex trafficking, human smuggling, rapes, murders, and deadly fentanyl destroying our communities. We can’t sit idly by. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: What the Michigan Dream means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78401618/453271474/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWJjYmMwZS05YmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QTqZzbPCc5rt_tfse8ZVvbMSJRomT03dqusrJSIbm9M=) [_**I’m Kristen McDonald Rivet and I’m running for Congress here in toss-up MI-08 because it is time we restore what I call the Michigan Dream. You are going to hear me talk about that a lot over the next several months. So I wanted to take a moment to explain what that means to me, and then I hope you’ll chip in to help me win this toss-up race for Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78401619/453271475/1532741920?refcode=email_020424_Michigan-dream&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWJjYmMwZS05YmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QTqZzbPCc5rt_tfse8ZVvbMSJRomT03dqusrJSIbm9M=) I’m a proud mom of six (yes, six!) wonderful children, and I’ve spent my career fighting to make things just a little easier for hard-working Michigan families like mine. I grew up in Portland, Michigan. My dad worked construction, often clocking in 70 to 80 hours a week. When the construction season slowed down and it got cold, he worked snow removal to make ends meet. Like many people in this district, Dad wasn’t afraid to get calluses on his hands through a tough day’s work. **Through grit and hard work, my family was able to achieve the Michigan Dream: to own a home, pay the bills, put a little away for retirement, and, every once in a while, have the chance to drive to Disney World.** Thanks to my mom and dad, my sisters and I were the first in our family to go to college, and I have been working to uplift families ever since. I was elected to the Michigan State Senate, where I fight every day to support Michigan families and combat extremism. I led the charge to pass the largest tax cut for working families in Michigan’s history. I introduced a plan to address the growing childcare crisis in our state. I’ve fought to protect our abortion rights, and, in one of my first acts in the State Senate, passed a commonsense gun violence prevention bill. **The Michigan Dream allowed me to get to where I am today. But that dream is falling out of reach for too many families, and we need Congress to pass solutions that will help level the playing field.** I will make sure we invest in our workers and create good-paying jobs right here in Michigan, protect abortion rights, and work to keep our kids safe from the epidemic of gun violence. [_**But I can’t do it without you. This race is a “pure toss-up” and the national GOP is already attacking me. So today I’m coming to you with a humble request: if you believe we need more common-sense leaders in Congress, will you chip in to help me win this race?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78401620/453271476/1532741920?refcode=email_020424_Michigan-dream&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWJjYmMwZS05YmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QTqZzbPCc5rt_tfse8ZVvbMSJRomT03dqusrJSIbm9M=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78401621/453271477/1433120897?refcode=email_020424_Michigan-dream&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWJjYmMwZS05YmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QTqZzbPCc5rt_tfse8ZVvbMSJRomT03dqusrJSIbm9M=)

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f09347d446e94eec9952040532d37557&_e=C6mRHAd-mZ5YTEqCUlRSR2Ljjx0Acn-0a4miPL87Mx983vW9e1zjTDjBtjLnjphBLICiTamTy755ZBAnBC0OIOqUDpJ4e0NTMvQK20D7rGct8pGutHfc84Tf9xVmWdT9be3d_WnaVEXacK9W_H6AAPeL98DlYn2VAD8kpFCKMkS0lc865JE7AH02vM1YdSFwbzyuTigfiXZ301D95k-Rlw13HwIeiCo4tgiy5DiwVr5E0ShA5ukiVL6kMy1lnz26_l2aHDGleylax945V2m2C54rEiTYRPTlDhco_-96hO83QMICyO55pHNKvvpex0F8) Hey there.....

**This could seriously be one of the last emails I ever send you, Friend.**

I'll be honest with you, no matter how much it pains me to lay it out.

Things are not looking good for Trump-supporting conservatives like us in 2024, and I need to know how you'll react to this message to know how to move forward. My next move depends on your response.

My name is JD Vance. If you haven't heard of me, I'm a Husband, Father, Marine Corps Veteran, Businessman, Author, and Trump Conservative Senator from the great state of Ohio.

I've worked hard to serve the people of Ohio in Washington, and I'm never going to be dishonest with you.

**Joe Biden and his Hard-Left Liberal cronies are sending millions and millions of dollars across the country in an attempt to sweep the most important races and eradicate the conservative movement. We can 't let them win. **

**[That's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f09347d446e94eec9952040532d37557&_e=C6mRHAd-mZ5YTEqCUlRSR2Ljjx0Acn-0a4miPL87Mx983vW9e1zjTDjBtjLnjphBLICiTamTy755ZBAnBC0OIOqUDpJ4e0NTMvQK20D7rGct8pGutHfc84Tf9xVmWdT9be3d_WnaVEXacK9W_H6AACKfOvsgvCNWzeViZvzUiPLl5vyCAaJuR37qJS8zAzXoT9WkC7vTMidwz7L9kxoFMtVooHBZN9uLD77ERpmKw3_B_wvNIrmhR2QeBz-suErSFGmBcCd69buAuTbjXbCM3bA8aBFANx5GHpCVTfLWaGYddyB5J0h-6lnC3E0YqoZ-)**

The Democrats think that the American People are stupid. They're wrong. I know how tuned in you are to the politics of our country, what needs to be done to turn it around, and how we can get there together.

I hate asking others for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. **[So please help me out this one time, friend:](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f09347d446e94eec9952040532d37557&_e=C6mRHAd-mZ5YTEqCUlRSR2Ljjx0Acn-0a4miPL87Mx983vW9e1zjTDjBtjLnjphBLICiTamTy755ZBAnBC0OIOqUDpJ4e0NTMvQK20D7rGct8pGutHfc84Tf9xVmWdT9be3d_WnaVEXacK9W_H6AACKfOvsgvCNWzeViZvzUiPJx16OdIxf9DgC2LAN0nFXSesKvxr_9UYWe-LoPhNfnPFRnhh8rY7VrXOOr-EjnmFRdpLhZSDCo8QM_6oEwEB25IuQCoqJ8MNJ21vNfcdnkdEU8yD4tZt52jM3wu4PiOkvCTjqnbzF1r6q_NbagA1V2)** | [**RUSH A $25 DONATION**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f09347d446e94eec9952040532d37557&_e=C6mRHAd-mZ5YTEqCUlRSR2Ljjx0Acn-0a4miPL87Mx983vW9e1zjTDjBtjLnjphBLICiTamTy755ZBAnBC0OIOqUDpJ4e0NTMvQK20D7rGct8pGutHfc84Tf9xVmWdT9be3d_WnaVEXacK9W_H6AACKfOvsgvCNWzeViZvzUiPKwkzuLMkf4qCGKAWC49WMSgrD10OjarDt3-_xbIIPfhFMZP5riU-D2eAFan7dW0hPcrvBZuGxFGHkHtqVsIGr65Dg1AvOTx9-davdo2ENgCbEQyux4ay8vUlt3eYhyqXrlr0cyItMDTYwJwm68QSpa)

clean_body: | Hey there..... This could seriously be one of the last emails I ever send you, Friend. I'll be honest with you, no matter how much it pains me to lay it out. Things are not looking good for Trump-supporting conservatives like us in 2024, and I need to know how you'll react to this message to know how to move forward. My next move depends on your response. My name is JD Vance. If you haven't heard of me, I'm a Husband, Father, Marine Corps Veteran, Businessman, Author, and Trump Conservative Senator from the great state of Ohio. I've worked hard to serve the people of Ohio in Washington, and I'm never going to be dishonest with you. Joe Biden and his Hard-Left Liberal cronies are sending millions and millions of dollars across the country in an attempt to sweep the most important races and eradicate the conservative movement. We can 't let them win. - The Democrats think that the American People are stupid. They're wrong. I know how tuned in you are to the politics of our country, what needs to be done to turn it around, and how we can get there together. I hate asking others for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. | I'll always tell it to you like it is, and I'm not going to allow the Left to walk all over everything we've worked hard for. God Bless, JD Vance Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., 1391 W 5th Avenue, Suite 314, Columbus, OH 43212 Copyright (C) 2023 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
He just DESTROYED the GOP over their impeachment plot:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61499?t=6&akid=12821%2E878179%2Ea8OxsA) Jamie Raskin is a HERO! He’s one of the TOP Democrats fighting to end the MAGA mob’s impeachment scheme — and he’s not backing down.

[**The GOP is hell-bent on SILENCING Raskin, so we need a SURGE of support from folks like you to show we have his back! HURRY: ADD YOUR NAME BY MIDNIGHT to thank Rep. Jamie Raskin »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61500?t=7&akid=12821%2E878179%2Ea8OxsA) | [YOUR ONLY CHANCE TO SIGN: CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61500?t=8&akid=12821%2E878179%2Ea8OxsA)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

We owe _so much_ of our Democratic success this year to you.

You were a crucial figure in averting the disastrous government shutdown (twice!). You called out the GOP for electing extremist Speaker Mike Johnson.

**And now, you’re fighting tooth and nail to save President Biden from a baseless impeachment — even in the face of vile MAGA attacks.**

[**I know Republicans are using every dirty trick in the book to SILENCE you — So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect more amazing Democrats like you who will flip the House and save our democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61500?t=9&akid=12821%2E878179%2Ea8OxsA) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61499?t=10&akid=12821%2E878179%2Ea8OxsA)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12821%2E878179%2Ea8OxsA). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12821%2E878179%2Ea8OxsA).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12821%2E878179%2Ea8OxsA) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=12821%2E878179%2Ea8OxsA). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12821%2E878179%2Ea8OxsA)

name: Jane Fonda (via JanePAC)
subject: $24 for a night of laughter, action, and purpose. Join me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
This is more than a reunion.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78402377/453273169/1328794144?refcode=ea.1d619b60-a0c3-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.1d619b60-a0c3-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNjE5YjYwLWEwYzMtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uuxk40KUuBiOoZVFdKq9NJWoS1aA9ev04wCYwst_af4=&emci=ad3c9898-19c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=1d619b60-a0c3-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4823105)
---
Hey climate champions, In just over a week, our Grace and Frankie Galentine's Day Virtual Cast Reunion will light up screens across the country, and I couldn't be more thrilled. But this reunion isn’t just about nostalgia — **it’s about action.** We’re facing a crisis that affects every one of us, no matter where we live. The climate emergency isn't a distant threat. It's here, and it demands our attention, our passion, and our activism. This special Grace and Frankie event is a rallying point for all of us who care deeply about the future of our planet. **Each ticket sold helps the Jane Fonda Climate PAC elect courageous climate candidates up and down the ballot in critical races.** **_[With your help, we can make major progress in combatting the climate crisis, all while having a little fun. Will you join the Grace and Frankie family for a night of community action? Tickets start at just $24.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78402378/453273170/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.1d619b60-a0c3-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.1d619b60-a0c3-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNjE5YjYwLWEwYzMtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uuxk40KUuBiOoZVFdKq9NJWoS1aA9ev04wCYwst_af4=)_** The Jane Fonda Climate PAC only supports leaders who are bold enough to take action for our environment and stand up to Big Oil. And I’m so proud of the victories we’ve had so far. **Since we first launched in March 2022, we’ve helped elect over 70 climate champions at every level of government from Congresspeople to City Council members to School Board members. And I truly believe we’re just getting started!** But we can’t get complacent. In 2024, we need to support even more leaders who are ready to take immediate, strategic action to combat the climate emergency. _What would Grace and Frankie do?_ They wouldn't stay on the sidelines. They'd take a stand, speak up, fight for change. So that's exactly what we’re doing. **_[So if you haven’t had the opportunity to purchase a ticket and reserve your virtual spot in this special event, what are you waiting for? clean_body: This is more than a reunion. | Hey climate champions, In just over a week, our Grace and Frankie Galentine's Day Virtual Cast Reunion will light up screens across the country, and I couldn't be more thrilled. But this reunion isn’t just about nostalgia — it’s about action. We’re facing a crisis that affects every one of us, no matter where we live. The climate emergency isn't a distant threat. It's here, and it demands our attention, our passion, and our activism. This special Grace and Frankie event is a rallying point for all of us who care deeply about the future of our planet. Each ticket sold helps the Jane Fonda Climate PAC elect courageous climate candidates up and down the ballot in critical races. = The Jane Fonda Climate PAC only supports leaders who are bold enough to take action for our environment and stand up to Big Oil. And I’m so proud of the victories we’ve had so far. Since we first launched in March 2022, we’ve helped elect over 70 climate champions at every level of government from Congresspeople to City Council members to School Board members. And I truly believe we’re just getting started! But we can’t get complacent. In 2024, we need to support even more leaders who are ready to take immediate, strategic action to combat the climate emergency. What would Grace and Frankie do? They wouldn't stay on the sidelines. They'd take a stand, speak up, fight for change. So that's exactly what we’re doing. = | = Let's turn our love for a show that brought so many people together into a powerful force for good. See you soon, and thank you for standing with me in the fight of our lifetimes. With love and solidarity, Jane Fonda Founder of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC P.S. Did you buy your ticket already? Thank you! It may take a few days for our system to update, but we have your contribution recorded. See you on the 13th! | = | = Follow the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: American Update
subject: Department Of Education Rule To Enshrine Protections For ‘Gender Identity’ Heads To White House
body:
And Student Grades Get Even Worse After California School Drops $250,000 On ‘Woke Kindergarten’ Program

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683767%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s4NNMCc4qFTdRB%2ffpprbEQ&sysid=1 Department Of Education Rule To Enshrine Protections For ‘Gender Identity’ Heads To White House

A policy that will codify protections for “transgender” students and change how schools respond to sexual misconduct on campus was sent to the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) for review Friday, according to a government website.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683767%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s4NNMCc4qFTdRB%2ffpprbEQ&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683768%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L8mqSh6hSY%2fj7xywLBsptw&sysid=1 Student Grades Get Even Worse After California School Drops $250,000 On ‘Woke Kindergarten’ Program

An elementary school in California paid an organization called “Woke Kindergarten” $250,000 to train teachers to confront “white supremacy” and “racism” in the classroom, according to the San Francisco Chronicle. Woke Kindergarten has been giving teachers at Glassbrook Elementary School in Hayward training sessions for two years and is funded through a federal program for []

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683768%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L8mqSh6hSY%2fj7xywLBsptw&sysid=1

Campaigning for president in 2020, Joseph Biden said of President Trump, “I’m worried he’s going to get us into war with Iran.” Biden slammed Trump’s “Maximum Pressure Campaign” against Iran, the world’s leading state sponsor of terrorism, as “dangerously incompetent.” He claimed withdrawing from the 2015 nuclear deal with Iran was a “gigantic mistake.”

name: Mazi Pilip
subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress
body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I’m the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkUGP2yAQhX8NvhENgxebgw9RV75UqaqqUo-IwMRBwRhhnGT766tE3e6hl_Y6897TN29-HMzBhhjS9MXONFxcMWU19WpyiCHzRLe3pVwMArYckENrROMHr52yqqFBdNBBj72E5jyAVtqegFrda9AvRxC6P2rsNfW-933XhOGRAwgtCiGE3EmPnbbkX5Q79U4Ca8FGKnV3IcpuSVOhdS2Ut2MMzqadW-YmDuda88rknuHIcFzJbYV2t5AK-YeC4Tjbn4GflsLfM_gRJKBQiuF4ppj5U3ELicmR7qGGVClVJl9r2YihKo_QEtL0MbLzsj0lEhiqrc7G2TnbMCUmX3_fJczXPf_86dv3w34nRIuqM1W0LSoFXIJ6GOluavD_ZZmXRG8mR_ITffA8CZY_3Fd-cYW_98tQ3bd0_XvRlMHnW4gxrKpjLUyzDfHZa_2n5_8KAAD__6IcrOA)

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkUGP2yAQhX8NvhENgxebgw9RV75UqaqqUo-IwMRBwRhhnGT766tE3e6hl_Y6897TN29-HMzBhhjS9MXONFxcMWU19WpyiCHzRLe3pVwMArYckENrROMHr52yqqFBdNBBj72E5jyAVtqegFrda9AvRxC6P2rsNfW-933XhOGRAwgtCiGE3EmPnbbkX5Q79U4Ca8FGKnV3IcpuSVOhdS2Ut2MMzqadW-YmDuda88rknuHIcFzJbYV2t5AK-YeC4Tjbn4GflsLfM_gRJKBQiuF4ppj5U3ELicmR7qGGVClVJl9r2YihKo_QEtL0MbLzsj0lEhiqrc7G2TnbMCUmX3_fJczXPf_86dv3w34nRIuqM1W0LSoFXIJ6GOluavD_ZZmXRG8mR_ITffA8CZY_3Fd-cYW_98tQ3bd0_XvRlMHnW4gxrKpjLUyzDfHZa_2n5_8KAAD__6IcrOA)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkUGP2yAQhX8NvhENgxebgw9RV75UqaqqUo-IwMRBwRhhnGT766tE3e6hl_Y6897TN29-HMzBhhjS9MXONFxcMWU19WpyiCHzRLe3pVwMArYckENrROMHr52yqqFBdNBBj72E5jyAVtqegFrda9AvRxC6P2rsNfW-933XhOGRAwgtCiGE3EmPnbbkX5Q79U4Ca8FGKnV3IcpuSVOhdS2Ut2MMzqadW-YmDuda88rknuHIcFzJbYV2t5AK-YeC4Tjbn4GflsLfM_gRJKBQiuF4ppj5U3ELicmR7qGGVClVJl9r2YihKo_QEtL0MbLzsj0lEhiqrc7G2TnbMCUmX3_fJczXPf_86dv3w34nRIuqM1W0LSoFXIJ6GOluavD_ZZmXRG8mR_ITffA8CZY_3Fd-cYW_98tQ3bd0_XvRlMHnW4gxrKpjLUyzDfHZa_2n5_8KAAD__6IcrOA)
---

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkUGP2yAQhX8NvhENgxebgw9RV75UqaqqUo-IwMRBwRhhnGT766tE3e6hl_Y6897TN29-HMzBhhjS9MXONFxcMWU19WpyiCHzRLe3pVwMArYckENrROMHr52yqqFBdNBBj72E5jyAVtqegFrda9AvRxC6P2rsNfW-933XhOGRAwgtCiGE3EmPnbbkX5Q79U4Ca8FGKnV3IcpuSVOhdS2Ut2MMzqadW-YmDuda88rknuHIcFzJbYV2t5AK-YeC4Tjbn4GflsLfM_gRJKBQiuF4ppj5U3ELicmR7qGGVClVJl9r2YihKo_QEtL0MbLzsj0lEhiqrc7G2TnbMCUmX3_fJczXPf_86dv3w34nRIuqM1W0LSoFXIJ6GOluavD_ZZmXRG8mR_ITffA8CZY_3Fd-cYW_98tQ3bd0_XvRlMHnW4gxrKpjLUyzDfHZa_2n5_8KAAD__6IcrOA)

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
Special Election NY-03

Hello there, it's former United States Senator Barbara Boxer.

I know a thing or two about delivering results for communities across our
great state. And taking on the big fights. And that is why I'm proud to
endorse the candidate I trust to get the job done — Adam Schiff.

Here's why I'm with Adam.

Adam has been one of the most courageous fighters for our democracy as it
weathers fierce attacks by the MAGA wing of the Republican Party.

You and I have watched him taking on those tough fights. We've seen the
results he's delivered.

But the truth is, I had remained neutral in this race because of my warm
friendships with Adam Schiff and Barbara Lee. I told all three Democrats
that if I saw a Democrat attack another Democrat, I would reconsider an
endorsement.

Unfortunately, we just witnessed that happen. Adam faced an unwarranted
attack from another Democrat.

We are in a fight for our democracy against MAGA Republicans, and the
recent unwarranted attack on Adam has led me to carry out my promise.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=5338%2E5257348%2E6sYktk ]I'm with Adam Schiff, and it's more important than ever that we stand
with him today. Will you please join me in supporting his campaign with a
small $10
contribution?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: Scott Parkinson
subject: Stop the Schumer Illegal Immigration Invasion!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Fellow Patriot- **Stop the Schumer Illegal Immigration Invasion!**** Last night Chuck Schumer announced a border deal that also provides tens of billions of dollars in U.S. taxpayers dollars to other countries. This is not an America First bill. It is America Last! And the DC Uniparty just might go along with it. We’ve got to stop them. The Schumer Illegal Immigration Invasion has all sorts of problems – but most egregious is that the bill DOES NOT STOP THE ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION INVASION! [The bill still allows 1.8 million](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/96d383709b95262f3947229f28c3afba/040d409852e6a736c3d6b838967d376c/42903) illegals to pour across the border every year. And it even makes the 5,000 per day illegal immigrant *fake* limitation [expire after three years.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/96d383709b95262f3947229f28c3afba/100205d6ea04b7e2c3d6b838967d376c/42903) What a joke! I’m running for the U.S. Senate to enhance public safety. But if we do not secure American sovereignty by securing the border, we know our communities are LESS SAFE. You read the stories every day. Fentanyl. Trafficking. Murder. It’s time for the People to stand up and say NO to Washington DC Uniparty career politicians that vote for America Last policies. No Democrats have come out against this bill. And my opponent – TIM KAINE (D-ishonest-VA) – is so out-of-touch, he will certainly vote for this bill. You see, the radical Left is willing to walk the plank in order to advance their agenda to change the fabric of America. The vote on this bill is expected to be on Wednesday, February 7. It’s not too late to stop the Senate from passing this bill. But Senators need to hear from you NOW. Activate your voice. Call. Email. Post on social media. I [warned about this deal coming together on January 12th](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/96d383709b95262f3947229f28c3afba/cb817402f8b5a4d6c3d6b838967d376c/42903), when the first details showed it was just another Biden Open Borders bill. Make your voice heard. Join me in opposing this terrible illegal immigration invasion!
---

clean_body: She’s showing us who she is... | It seems that Marsha Blackburn’s not too popular right now, Peter... and we can only guess why... 🚩 She takes money from pharmaceutical companies... 🚩 and the gun lobby... 🚩 AND the oil industry... 🚩 then votes in their favor in the Senate. 🚩 She threatens women’s reproductive rights... 🚩 and grants tax breaks to the wealthy while the rest of us make up the difference... 🚩 and refuses to hear from her constituents at town halls. What kind of person wouldn’t want a Senator like Marsha Blackburn??? Marsha Blackburn is a radical extremist whose loyalty only extends to her special-interest donors — NOT her constituents. She’s abandoned Tennesseans for far too long. It’s time to give her a one-way ticket out of Washington and elect a representative we can count on to fight for us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this, Team Gloria | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey Hey – Harry Dunn here.
3 years ago, I was defending the Capitol, the Constitution, the Members of Congress who you and I both may not agree with, and my own life from MAGA insurrectionists. Now, I’m announcing my campaign to serve as the next Congressman Maryland’s 3rd District.
On January 6, 2021, we were inches from watching democracy crumble right before our eyes.
It’s not an exaggeration to say that democracy is on the brink of extinction. We’re one administration from it. And if we lose it, we’ll never get it back.
I refuse to stand by and watch. I’m prepared to fight to protect our rights, our fragile democracy – and to be honest, I’m prepared to win.
In Congress, I’ll be one of the loudest voices defending democracy – but I need your help to get there. I’m humbly asking you to make a donation -- split with Seth Moulton -- to my campaign to be the next Congressman from Maryland’s District 3. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]Here’s the cold hard truth:
All across our great nation, rights are being stripped-back one-by-one by Trump’s MAGA army who would rather oppress folks than treat them as human beings. They cry “freedom,” fight tooth-and-nail to dismantle our democracy to protect their power, and dictate the choices people are allowed to make.
That’s where everyday Americans like you come in:
$5 will help me have a vote to protect and expand voting and reproductive rights.
$5 will be able to conduct investigations and hold folks accountable.
$5 will help me fight for democracy through legislation.
If you’re ready to get in Good Trouble and redeem the soul of America, as my hero, John Lewis, urged us all to do, I need you to join this movement today.
I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $500,000 within the first week and I need your help to reach it. Please, will you make a donation -- split with Seth Moulton -- to my campaign right now to send me to Congress and flip the House blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]Thank you,
Harry 💙
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/r_WYy1BSbkmUjvconTI5TQ2?unsubscribedata=6a61qI6%2Bfnmf%2F2OSMlHfxoYHBSjbVGWhoBS%2BMPN65Zxw5PpCKgs7zAQGy5aB3AnKtE9JolQi%2BSnWRw1o3JSNbXQXmWfiKTxSVxQkh0Js5728MBs1NlEjUWXJaxqFqvK4UmE2qcjVeI0LgU87awwA8x3FJxVKje4JzBjvPol5mbQfKVv7NgTgZbYFCDHeKJlhk6N5P7ifjwCOjb3cm%2FhoiKb2ewWlbrY43odX50GBr7lIemUMOAUL9cscNkd3R4e0xwG5D9GQ4BaLwl8bisPTHauBHBHzaLYiqgK4NH5mAoPX7zva55icO5FLpnCtumpAI2V7zI85rWZbRgycxM0dO2FH7jOYhx4CMFzczRmx2u3pgmEOXdteShFxElf%2BksJU7TWSwNUvBnRkpwCOBywSpuAIj7AOwPKTYgwarZqDgzI%3D .

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Are you still with me, Fellow American?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I need to know | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0e322eb4468844dea6ef0790c5511f21&_e=ce9mZMqxTzIO-jLBzZ6jgRy2D3limkT-WepbCV_iwcU1-aOy1HgOXNk0YyR9SmKZTz5sQdz3y6S7AmRm-elXhtTUmkfUeWHQtWjTVOfuDB_47WQ4n96-nTV1GXlbdfNQHUqy09C2p4XSW3k1OFRGHe2sZbRo4PjWMX-5ixaTejjPoTRey8JRgjzvN4Z_CrQCzgIKJrilecbNo4S_zWGFBSBK_76vUviRCy6JuUduc9i5nL_13p-D_6QhRdiYSEOfn_4yvEvZH0UR1r9HI9MFsXmms7iuWKgZSAQeh_GgW5PltW6xa84siEDNu5wvYewqQlq9-uobwBSDqHVUq-qQI46xPoaE7zfZdMBjrDtfxdMMxthddFZZyDmdYsMSwJ-znPEaY3-zlinyAnX-OjFRpqiDtehPq0ogz4UT1Gg9dFmCMooBYcZ3VboCD-oyKNBC)
Fellow American,

I’ve got three words for the far-Leftists trying to take my seat and flip Texas blue: [**_Bring. It. On._**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0e322eb4468844dea6ef0790c5511f21&_e=ce9mZMqxTzIO-jLBzZ6jgRy2D3limkT-WepbCV_iwcU1-aOy1HgOXNk0YyR9SmKZTz5sQdz3y6S7AmRm-elXhtTUmkfUeWHQtWjTVOfuDB_47WQ4n96-nTV1GXlbdfNQHUqy09C2p4XSW3k1OFRGHe2sZbRo4PjWMX-5ixaTejjPoTRey8JRgjzvN4Z_CrQCzgIKJrilecbNo4S_zWGFBSBK_76vUviRCy6JuUduc9i5nL_13p-D_6QhRdiYSEOfn_4yvEvZH0UR1r9HI9MFsXmms7iuWKgZSAQeh_GgW5Np5BqCv1YZNXj3W7-tUOsSBXw_ritJh3YTbL2TUDI-H8_N4-D8Zxr3cYAgwZtuOL0IwrtVCWuF5h1v7H86fb9azYhZEqna8NCx69HB9usKsmt4Er6NpBC0UiA0_5OlOhjC7DDzlT1Do_joESuojGvo)

subject: Black History Month: Help us empower Black women in politics

body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78403972/453277266/-1986725772?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1417-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0MjkzNDc1LWE5YzMtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pXh4139NFVIjpclrXXHTUiQIzpqbnEah2YM0GoFA2NE=)
