Peter,

Melissa Watson Ward here, Deputy Affiliate Director at Emerge, reaching out to you during a critical moment for our democracy.

As we celebrate Black History Month, we are excited to share with you the impactful strides we're making through our Seated Together program. This initiative empowers trailblazing Black women in politics, providing them with the support and resources needed to rise to higher office.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78403973/453277267/-1657939537?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1417-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0MjkzNDc1LWE5YzMtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pXh4139NFVIjpclrXXHTUiQIzpqbnEah2YM0GoFA2NE=)
We're more committed than ever to empowering bold Democratic women to lead and to defeat the GOP's dangerous agenda in 2024 and beyond. **But we urgently need your support to help fuel this movement toward a more inclusive political landscape.**

Do you believe everyone deserves a seat at the table? **[Then make your commitment known with a gift of $25 or more right now so we can continue to empower Black women to deepen their impact and move up the political pipeline!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78403974/453277268/-1986725772?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1417-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0MjkzNDc1LWE5YzMtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pXh4139NFVIjpclrXXHTUiQIzpqbnEah2YM0GoFA2NE=)**

Thank you for considering this opportunity to be a part of a more equitable and representative democracy this Black History Month.

Melissa Watson Ward
Deputy Affiliate Director
Emerge
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78403975/453277269/-1657939537?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1417-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0MjkzNDc1LWE5YzMtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pXh4139NFVIjpclrXXHTUiQIzpqbnEah2YM0GoFA2NE=)

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: This Black History Month, we are excited to highlight the several Black candidates we are supporting for their critical elections this November.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends,
Happy Black History Month!
This Black History Month, we are excited to highlight the several Black candidates we are supporting for their critical elections this November.
The current 118th Congress is the most racially diverse in history, yet only 11% of Congress is made up of Black Representatives — only 3 Black members serve in the Senate.
Black Americans are significantly underrepresented in our federal government — particularly Black women. As we approach the 2024 election, our government must represent the diverse voices that make our country strong.
Here are some of the Black candidates we are supporting this November:
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240204-1-tt&t=1&akid=5186%2E196590%2EiJvg9X)**Colin Allred for United States Senate**
Congressman Colin Allred is running to defeat Ted Cruz and give Texas a Senator they can count on.

[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240204-1-tt&t=2&akid=5186%2E196590%2EiJvg9X)**Angela Alsobrooks for United States Senate**
Angela is a lifelong Marylander, mom, former prosecutor, and Prince George’s County Executive. And now, she's running for the Senate to be a voice for families like the ones she grew up with and has spent her career fighting for.
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240204-1-tt&t=3&akid=5186%2E196590%2EiJvg9X)**Lisa Blunt Rochester for United States Senate**
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is in the race to become the first Black woman to represent Delaware in the U.S. Senate.

[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240204-1-tt&t=4&akid=5186%2E196590%2EiJvg9X)**Mondaire Jones, NY-17**
Mondaire is running to return to Congress to finish the work he started to lower costs for Lower Hudson Valley residents, defend our democracy, raise wages, and stop Republicans from banning abortion.

[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240204-1-tt&t=5&akid=5186%2E196590%2EiJvg9X)**Congresswoman Emilia Sykes, OH-13**
Representative Sykes is running for reelection to continue her work in the fight to lower costs for working families, make healthcare more affordable, protect reproductive freedom, and implement climate solutions.

[**If you would like to support our movement to elect diverse changemaking candidates up and down the ballot across the country, please contribute $3 to The Long Run today. Every donation will help us support these candidates as we approach November.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240204-1-tt&t=6&akid=5186%2E196590%2EiJvg9X)

clean_body: Friends, Happy Black History Month! This Black History Month, we are excited to highlight the several Black candidates we are supporting for their critical elections this November. The current 118th Congress is the most racially diverse in history, yet only 11% of Congress is made up of Black Representatives — only 3 Black members serve in the Senate. Black Americans are significantly underrepresented in our federal government — particularly Black women. As we approach the 2024 election, our government must represent the diverse voices that make our country strong. Here are some of the Black candidates we are supporting this November: Allred for United States Senate Congressman Colin Allred is running to defeat Ted Cruz and give Texas a Senator they can count on. Alsobrooks for United States Senate Angela is a lifelong Marylander, mom, former prosecutor, and Prince George’s County Executive. And now, she's running for the Senate to be a voice for families like the ones she grew up with and has spent her career fighting for. Blunt Rochester for United States Senate Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is in the race to become the first Black woman to represent Delaware in the U.S. Senate. Jones, NY-17 Mondaire is running to return to Congress to finish the work he started to lower costs for Lower Hudson Valley residents, defend our democracy, raise wages, and stop Republicans from banning abortion. Emilia Sykes, OH-13 Representative Sykes is running for reelection to continue her work in the fight to lower costs for working families, make healthcare more affordable, protect reproductive freedom, and implement climate solutions. If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for joining us in our fight to create a better and more diverse government. The Team at the Long Run

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Why this campaign means so much to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friend, this is a longer email about why I’m running for Congress. It means the world to get to share my story with you and tell you why this campaign means so much to me, so I hope you’ll give it a read.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78404084/453277621/476240478?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.04_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTdkZTk0ZmUtYWFjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eRrLcGxOGvtE4r6a_JWyN8e1S7vSeMvVvJueiN65hhs=)

Friend: **This is a longer email about why I’m running for Congress**. It means the world to get to share my story with you and tell you why this campaign means so much to me, so I hope you’ll give it a read. **[If you already know you’re with me in our fight for Oregon, can you chip in to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78404085/453277622/476240478?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.04_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTdkZTk0ZmUtYWFjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eRrLcGxOGvtE4r6a_JWyN8e1S7vSeMvVvJueiN65hhs=) ** I wouldn’t be where I am without my family. As the daughter of two teachers, my parents taught me that education is the cornerstone of a better and safer world. That’s why I turned this idea into action by working to earn scholarships and put myself through school. While in school, my grandparents, a police officer and a hotel maid, always reminded me that you don’t stop working hard until the job is done. **That’s why my work has always been about reaching out and helping people get ahead.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78404086/453277623/476240478?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.04_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTdkZTk0ZmUtYWFjMy1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eRrLcGxOGvtE4r6a_JWyN8e1S7vSeMvVvJueiN65hhs=) In the State Legislature, I’ve fought to reduce the burden of rising costs, safeguard reproductive rights, expand affordable housing, address homelessness in our community, and tackle the climate crisis. **This is my story, friend. As the mother of four children and a small business owner, I work hard every day to deliver for my community, and I’ll never back down. ** It’s what my family taught me to do and I’m proud to continue their legacy every day. I’ve always tackled challenges head-on to secure a better future for Oregon families. **That’s why when Lori Chavez-Deremer turned her back on our community to pursue a dangerous, extremist agenda, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sideline.** Oregonians deserve a Congresswoman who will stand up for us, protect reproductive rights, strengthen our local economy, and deliver results for our families in Congress. **[That’s exactly why I’m in this race, friend. It means the world to get to share my story with you and tell you why this campaign means so much to me, so I hope you’ll give it a read. = Friend: This is a longer email about why I’m running for Congress. It means the world to get to share my story with you and tell you why this campaign means so much to me, so I hope you’ll give it a read. = I wouldn’t be where I am without my family. As the daughter of two teachers, my parents taught me that education is the cornerstone of a better and safer world. That’s why I turned this idea into action by working to earn scholarships and put myself through school. While in school, my grandparents, a police officer and a hotel maid, always reminded me that you don’t stop working hard until the job is done. That’s why my work has always been about reaching out and helping people get ahead. = In the State Legislature, I’ve fought to reduce the burden of rising costs, safeguard reproductive rights, expand affordable housing, address homelessness in our community, and tackle the climate crisis. This is my story, friend. As the mother of four children and a small business owner, I work hard every day to deliver for my community, and I’ll never back down. It’s what my family taught me to do and I’m proud to continue their legacy every day. I’ve always tackled challenges head-on to secure a better future for Oregon families. That’s why when Lori Chavez-Deremer turned her back on our community to pursue a dangerous, extremist agenda, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sideline. Oregonians deserve a Congresswoman who will stand up for us, protect reproductive rights, strengthen our local economy, and deliver results for our families in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for being in this with me. Friend, I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $100,000 weekly goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about doughnuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority.
here
**[**( If you're short on time and ready to retire Rick Scott this fall, you can help me make up this fundraising gap and flip Florida blue by clicking here to split a gift between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign.)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78404121/453277801/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk4786-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDdiZTU0MS1hY2MzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Po11ZbUHzvhn6bP-q6ywCm-nM1fdVbUAPUt2CVjTD7Q=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78404122/453277802/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4786-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDdiZTU0MS1hY2MzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Po11ZbUHzvhn6bP-q6ywCm-nM1fdVbUAPUt2CVjTD7Q=)
When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and still struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment.
So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop. It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality.
We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate.
**Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. I've seen time and time again how small acts have the power to create big, transformative change. And that's exactly how we're going to win this campaign this November.**
**[**That's why I'm asking you to chip in just $10 — about the cost of a dozen doughnuts — to send me to the Senate. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand before my weekly deadline to help me defeat Rick Scott? This campaign is powered by small-dollar donations, and every single gift makes a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78404123/453277803/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk4786-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDdiZTU0MS1hY2MzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Po11ZbUHzvhn6bP-q6ywCm-nM1fdVbUAPUt2CVjTD7Q=)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78404129/453277809/1575385346?refcode=jtk4786-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDdiZTU0MS1hY2MzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Po11ZbUHzvhn6bP-q6ywCm-nM1fdVbUAPUt2CVjTD7Q=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78404130/453277810/1575385346?refcode=jtk4786-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDdiZTU0MS1hY2MzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Po11ZbUHzvhn6bP-q6ywCm-nM1fdVbUAPUt2CVjTD7Q=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: help us flip Florida blue | | | Friend, I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $100,000 weekly goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about doughnuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority. here = = When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and still struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment. So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop. It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality. We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate. Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. I've seen time and time again how small acts have the power to create big, transformative change. And that's exactly how we're going to win this campaign this November. = f you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

| | | Peter, I want to start out by personally thanking you for being a member of our grassroots team. I know Hung is SO appreciative of all you’ve done for our mission so far, and I am too.

We have achieved so much already and the year has just begun. **We’ve already raised more than $100,000 in just one month!**

_Plus, our average donation was $25 - proof that we really are fueled by grassroots patriots who are sick and tired of career politicians like Tim Kaine._

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
The momentum is real
We're out-performing Jack Bergman where it counts the most - by garnering the support of hardworking people.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Your contributions are helping Bob Lorinser secure the Democratic nomination to challenge Rep. Jack Bergman this fall. If you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will be processed immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Friend,
Bob believes in campaign finance reform. He only sparingly allows us to celebrate fundraising because he believes politics and money should don't mix.
He's right, but Q4 results are in, and they reflect some big news.
Despite being outpaced by corporate donors, Bob Lorinser's 2023 FEC report shows genuine grassroots support, beating Rep. Jack Bergman in a critical category: "Small Individual Contributions."
We're so proud to be funded by everyday people chipping in what they can.
Without corporate PACs and dark money, Bergman's support with everyday voters is dwindling. The clear momentum behind Bob with hardworking families makes sense; He's spent his whole life in service to our communities.
No one should be able to buy political influence, and politicians shouldn't be for sale.
With your help, we're able to continue this grassroots movement to champion the working class, and i t's why so many are getting behind our campaign. We couldn't be more grateful and just wanted to say thank you.
Thank you.
-Andrew
Team Dr. Bob

body:
The future of this great country is not something we can just experience. It’s something to manifest. | | |
---
Peter -- In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution directly to Joe Biden’s reelection campaign. If you already know the stakes of making sure our President defeats Donald Trump in November and gets to serve four more years, just use this link to contribute today: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/together**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZwoXyfdeOmPkS0xvMaP_0yvd_hsvJZNRh8DDiyBiFm33_78TR0oumodEBUSsg1ejqFK1zua848nhhLkXPaWMyx-UnpdDxN88zyCfeSTCaW2lyMtdQM63fQexSnMoA5xCs7BejbywyCWbYqlPSO10O9C4Nqw5xyf3kir6pOPofW1xzWGngkHuf9uFdFyxHAzaeRZEr7igKGY4M3oKipz0ls7FdC7Vmkg1_SrqsqRi4lnx1WiHV3sEHWiax_XZ7w0VEV8en_uSaMRCQ6z3syw-QGCa4flyiGUzOmcrpfjKCeExNAMqIHmaaVDi6Is0wWSTUsEEwBWJ2cFF_QaMozUuO8Q/43k/QvIxl9vtSReQEIIFPETGLQ/h0/6zOTlzxgQek-ffSRrC6D87YMmzg_WNV3wK8YD1-D7ro) Otherwise, please give me a chance to explain. Because here is the truth: Last night, Joe Biden won the South Carolina Democratic Primary. But Donald Trump is moving fast on our heels, building his operation and getting ready to face us in the general election. That means President Biden -- our President -- needs our help. It’s a moment that reminds me of Bobby Kennedy’s eulogy of his brother, President John F. Kennedy, at the Democratic convention. Bobby Kennedy said that JFK would have never been able to accomplish any of what he did without the support of all of you -- the Democratic Party. He said that when we’re in it together, we can accomplish a great deal. That is true in helping President Biden catch up to any of Trump's advantages so we can win this race. That is true in helping President Biden continue to pass his agenda for working people in this country for four more years. That is true in helping Democrats win the existential struggle for our democracy against extremist Republicans who are systematically attacking the very foundations of our free society. No one person could do all of that alone. We all have a role to play. And today, it just so happens that the people who need our help the most are President Joe Biden and California’s own Vice President Kamala Harris. So please: [**Use this link to contribute $25, or whatever you can afford today, directly to Joe Biden’s reelection campaign. It all adds up when we all do our part, and together we can help President Biden catch up to any advantages Trump has built up.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZwoXyfdeOmPkS0xvMaP_0yvd_hsvJZNRh8DDiyBiFm33_78TR0oumodEBUSsg1ejqFK1zua848nhhLkXPaWMyx0AvP2J_kyEsUaOU6AqRfYLCOO1QR_m_HFuUMSr6AvifWTPZIaPvi5_GmiJVuQZgeYRwizj3PiRFMd96pkfGIPrsBaWBPdZktD9q9hNZe7k2HVS-iSUvqJXdk0C7VrGafIIBb2eqpAsvsslPpbk_AWwXSyztZKqoufa7v-UJKNB5xvBLh-RrCF4QrbaxchFp4gCZZHgQ8ZF-bWYzTjCvlCpTcoa8vi2KQTtkx0sVtEuOMYMmHBMRVu-8_2MqEVUEcQ/43k/QvIxl9vtSReQEIIFPETGLQ/h1/XNkYnLlhEY2DniJK2RGWkgzNF4d-xrSDeAaJ1C69K3k) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: The future of this great country is not something we can just experience. It’s something to manifest. | | | Peter -- In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution directly to Joe Biden’s reelection campaign. If you already know the stakes of making sure our President defeats Donald Trump in November and gets to serve four more years, just use this link to contribute today: Otherwise, please give me a chance to explain. Because here is the truth: Last night, Joe Biden won the South Carolina Democratic Primary. But Donald Trump is moving fast on our heels, building his operation and getting ready to face us in the general election. That means President Biden -- our President -- needs our help. It’s a moment that reminds me of Bobby Kennedy’s eulogy of his brother, President John F. Kennedy, at the Democratic convention. Bobby Kennedy said that JFK would have never been able to accomplish any of what he did without the support of all of you -- the Democratic Party. He said that when we’re in it together, we can accomplish a great deal. That is true in helping President Biden catch up to any of Trump's advantages so we can win this race. That is true in helping President Biden continue to pass his agenda for working people in this country for four more years. That is true in helping Democrats win the existential struggle for our democracy against extremist Republicans who are systematically attacking the very foundations of our free society. No one person could do all of that alone. We all have a role to play. And today, it just so happens that the people who need our help the most are President Joe Biden and California’s own Vice President Kamala Harris. So please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | The future of this great country is not something we can just experience. It’s something to manifest. That’s why I am asking for your help today. Because we all have a responsibility to do something in this moment. Thank you, Gavin Gavin Newsom Governor, California

subject: Your Must-See Campaign Events & Updates!

body:
We've got exciting news about upcoming events and rallies and a special message from RFK Jr. you won't want to miss.

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_3_24_d2&n=1)
---
|
---
Upcoming Events: An Exclusive Invitation to a Memorable Experience!
Don't miss out on an opportunity to embark on an extraordinary journey with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and connect with our future President. [RSVP now!](https://www.kennedy24.com/events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_3_24_d2&n=2)
|
* * *
---
[Tucson, Arizona](https://www.kennedy24.com/tucson-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_3_24_d2&n=3) \- Monday, February 5th at 6:30 PM
An exciting chance to see RFK, JR. speak about our fight to get on the ballot in AZ and hear how he will heal the divide in our government. You won’t want to miss this opportunity!
[Jackson Hole, Wyoming](https://www.kennedy24.com/jackson-hole?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_3_24_d2&n=4) \- Thursday, February 8th at 4:30 PM
The private reception with RFK, JR. will include Jackson Hole’s finest wine and most delicious bites. Join us for a special Q&A session and get your picture with the future President!
[Grand Rapids, Michigan](https://www.kennedy24.com/grand-rapids-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_3_24_d2&n=5) \- Saturday, February 10th at 1:00 PM
Don't miss the thrilling opportunity to see RFK, Jr. discuss our efforts to secure a spot on the MI ballot and unveil his platform of truth and honesty. Join us for an event you won't want to miss!
[Detroit, Michigan](https://www.kennedy24.com/detroit-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_3_24_d2&n=6) \- Saturday, February 10th at 6:30 PM
Experience an exclusive evening of support and connection at a private reception. Enjoy heavy hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, inspiring remarks, and a unique photo opportunity with RFK, Jr.
[Bergen County, New Jersey](https://www.kennedy24.com/bergen-county?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_3_24_d2&n=7) \- Saturday, February 17th at 6:30 PM
Attend an exclusive event in the Metropolitan NYC area, offering a rare opportunity for an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. with hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, and photo opportunities.
[Los Angeles, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/night-of-laughter-la?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_3_24_d2&n=8) \- Wednesday, February 21rd at 7:30 PM
Experience an unforgettable evening of laughter as Cheryl Hines hosts "A Night of Laughter with RFK, Jr." Secure your tickets now to enjoy performances by Tim Dillon, Rob Schneider, and more!
[Newport Beach, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/newport-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_3_24_d2&n=9) \- Saturday, February 24th at 7:30 PM
Join us at a private venue in the heart of Newport Beach for a special event. Experience an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. while enjoying hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, and memorable photo opportunities.
|
* * *
---
RFK Jr.: How I Would Fix The Border Crisis Immediately
Last week on Fox & Friends, I explained why the border crisis has become so unsustainable and what I will do immediately as president to fix this humanitarian nightmare.
When I visited the border in Yuma, Arizona last year, I saw the problems causing the crisis in real time. Here are the facts: The number of migrants crossing the border is at an all-time high. The physical barriers in the most highly-populated crossing zones have huge gaps. Border Patrol is utterly demoralized. And the Migrant Protection Act is no longer in effect.
Does the Biden administration seem to care about any of this? No. I will take immediate action to address what’s causing the border crisis and this humanitarian nightmare on day one of my presidency.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/border-fix-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_3_24_d2&n=10)
|

Delve into the unique appeal of limited edition items that reflect the essence of this historic campaign. Immerse yourself in the spirit of change and progress, and join a movement that holds the power to shape the future.

name: Bob Casey (via Mazie Hirono)
subject: I’m going to be up against a wall of Republican money in Pennsylvania
body:
|
#
_Hi Peter, this is Mazie. Please read this urgent message from my friend Bob Casey. He’s running for re-election for his Senate seat in Pennsylvania and his race is absolutely critical to preserving our Democratic majority._
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78404954/453280460/1468470916?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjM0Yzg4OS1iMmMzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fVGMi98VCqzVOTixBR4ZdZptGmnYRP-5xOeApmpYr14=) Peter, I'm going to be up against a wall of Republican money in Pennsylvania. My opponent is the wealthiest self-funder running for Senate anywhere in the country. He already put $1 million of his personal fortune into the race, and a super PAC supporting his campaign just announced raising nearly $18 million — that’s an astonishing amount. On top of that, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are all in on flipping this seat. When you’ve got this kind of money coming in against you, you need to build a team of supporters to help you fight back. I know for a fact that folks like you who chip in $5, $10, or $15 will make the difference in this Senate race. **[Pennsylvania could decide our Senate majority. [**Team Haley's Million Dollar Plus Donor Club Consists
of Multiple Democrat Mega Donors | | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/33607?id=384113.723.1.3464f06a6e00656c9835feb1ad864415)
---
**TODAY'S HEADLINE**
---
New FEC records reveal that SFA Fund Inc, the super PAC supporting Nikki Haley, has taken million-dollar-plus donations from individuals who have donated to Barack Obama, Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, Ohio United States Senator Sherrod Brown, and Pennsylvania United States Senator Bob Casey. Brown and Casey's 2024 races will likely decide the control of the United States Senate. It should come as no surprise that Loomer exclusively reported that Nikki Haley has a history of voting for Democrats. Haley receives donations from Democrats because her heart truly belongs to the Democrat Party...

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: New information about Josh Hawley’s family business to ban abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[1]Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate

Peter — from
overturning Roe to banning abortion drugs, Josh Hawley turned his mission
to criminalize abortion nationwide into a family business — and he’s
abused his power to do it. Please let me explain:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43328?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]Tweet from Josh Hawley on June 24, 2022: For those who wondered why I
said, two years ago, I would vote to confirm ONLY Supreme Court Justices
who acknowledged Roe was wrong, this is why. Amy Barrett was the first
openly pro-life nominee of my lifetime. And she was the deciding vote.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43328?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY

IN 2017: Matt Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north
Texas district court.

His confirmation stalled for years. We learned he even lied to hide just
how bizarre his obsession with controlling people’s bodies really is:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43328?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]Headline from The Dallas Morning News: John Cornyn says Judge Kacsmaryk
should not have taken name off anti-abortion article. Excerpt: 'The
process only works if we... have candor and truthful answers. So that's
significant,' said Cornyn, a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee
responsible for vetting Kacsmaryk's nomination.

IN 2018: While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made an
investment in his future.

So he became a campaign donor to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the
Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders
including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.

IN 2019: Now a U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his
campaign donor, a federal judge.

Hawley confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite
bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives
and personal freedoms.

IN 2022: A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by
activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used
safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions.

Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43328?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]Photos of Josh Hawley and Texas Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk on the left. On
the right, a Vanity Fair headline that reads: Erin Morrow Hawley is
leading the charge to ban abortion medication. She's also Josh Hawley's
wife.

APRIL 2023: Hawley’s donor judge ruled in favor of the suit led by
Hawley’s wife, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill
mifepristone in all 50 states.

This was the first time a judge has ever unilaterally tried to take a drug
off the market against FDA objections.

Then, in his official capacity as U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley submitted an
amicus brief demanding that the Supreme Court end a temporary injunction
blocking the ruling (in his wife's lawsuit) by a judge (his campaign
donor) to ban America's most commonly-used abortion medication.

AND NOW: We’ve learned that the mifepristone case, led by Hawley’s wife,
will be argued in front of the Supreme Court on March 26.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43328?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]POLITICO headline: Supreme Court sets date for high-stakes abortion
pill oral arguments. Excerpt: The Supreme Court on Monday set a date for
one of the highest-stakes and closest-watched cases of the term —
announcing it will hear oral arguments on how patients can access
mifepristone, the commonly used abortion pill, on March 26.

But this is hardly the first time that the Hawley family business has made
it all the way to the Supreme Court:

This is what corruption looks like — and this year, we’re going to make
Hawley own it. [ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43328?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]So if you’re ready to end these Big Brother attacks on
abortion and send a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri
in the U.S. Senate, please rush a donation of $10 or
whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign right now.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your
contribution instantly:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43329?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1007&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]Contribute $10
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43329?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=1008&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]Contribute $25
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43329?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=1009&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]Contribute $30
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43329?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=1010&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]Contribute $50
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43329?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=1011&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]Contribute $100
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43329?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=1012&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]Contribute $250
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43328?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1013&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]Give another amount

Senators shouldn’t be in the business of using their position to benefit
their family’s legal careers and activism — especially if there’s a
financial incentive to do so. And there shouldn’t even be a hint of
campaign donations impacting who, when, and how a judge gets on a court.

When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll vote to restore Roe v. Wade. But I’ll
also fight to end corruption like this by:

1. Barring Senators from voting on judicial nominees who’ve given to
their campaigns.
2. Barring Senators from lobbying any court to benefit an immediate
relative.

Everyday Missourians deserve a Senator who will stand up and fight for
their personal freedoms — not another corrupt politician obsessed with
controlling our bodies, families, and lives — and I’m ready to serve.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43328?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1014&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]If you’re with me, please rush a donation of $10 or
whatever you can afford to our grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley
today. Real people like you are the only folks I ever want to be
accountable to in the U.S. Senate, so your support means the world to me.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43328?refcode=em20240204-4742&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1015&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ ]DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY

Thank you,

— Lucas Kunce

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1016&akid=4742%2E614464%2EVtGAQJ

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
